clean_body: | | | | Want to go? | Friend, Are you not opening our emails? Kelly and President Trump are both inviting you to join them in sunny, 80-degree Palm Beach, Florida. But our accounts show that you STILL haven’t entered the raffle drawing. This is a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to meet President Trump and Alaska’s next Senator, Kelly Tshibaka. This offer is only for our TOP supporters, like YOU, and we know, President Trump and Kelly will be extremely disappointed if you don’t enter RIGHT NOW. Our team is close to reaching our entries quota of the day. Enter before we cannot accept anymore today. Remember if you win, we’ll pay for your hotel and flight, you’ll get your photo taken with President Trump! We hope to see you at Mar-a-Lago! Team Tshibaka | | | | ==

| | | **[BOMBSHELL REPORT: Trump just helped his House Republicans raise $17 MILLION in ONE NIGHT -- cash that will go directly to flipping the SIX seats they need to take back complete control in Congress. We need to respond NOW- so we're urgently calling for 2,500 gifts before midnight. Can you rush in $3 to defend our House Majority?](https://links.e.dccc.)**

We need you to know three critical things:

1\. Republicans only need to flip SIX seats to take back the House AND Senate.

2\. Trump and his House Republicans just held a MASSIVE fundraiser -- **and raised $17 MILLION in ONE NIGHT.**

3\. So now, President Biden has called on EVERY grassroots Democrat to fight back:

[](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/er4dfw-)

When our president asks us for help, we wouldn't dare let him down.

Joe's urgently counting on us to SAVE the House, Senate, and his entire presidency.

So we're calling for 2,500 gifts before midnight to answer his call and thwart Republicans' plans to destroy our House Majority.

**Can Joe count on your $3 right now to defend our House Democrats?**

subject: Kate Brown extended the mandates again!
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/a55d774c70cd/were-off-and-running-5139765?e=ae2345792a)
---
| |
---
| |
# Kate Brown just did it again.

Dear Fellow Oregonian,

Did you hear? Kate Brown just extended her emergency control over the lives of Oregonians through June 30, 2022. Her excuse? A new variant, which according to most medical experts, has symptoms mirroring those of the common cold. The vast majority of patients aren't even losing their sense of smell/taste during this one.

Once elected,_I will reverse any existing vaccine or mask mandates. Then I'll take it one step past that and support a constitutional amendment_ (yes, it's already drafted) severely limiting a governor's emergency powers so that no tyrant governor who might be elected after me can ever do what Kate Brown has done to us again.

The folks who created and continue to run the medical freedom group Arboc21 know my plans, and know I'm true to my word. I thank them for this timely endorsement!
My campaign needs your help. **Have you used your $50 political tax credit yet?** ($100 for couples filing jointly.) **This is a CREDIT, not a deduction.** It's so easy! Just donate $50 (or $100) to my campaign, and receive the full amount as a credit subtracted from your Oregon state taxes when you file.**It’s like a free donation!** _**Please donate today! **_ I didn't come into this race beholden to large companies or wealthy individuals.**I am 100% grassroots! ** Some candidates aren't; they're counting on buying this election with heavy TV advertising in the spring. Without excitement from the base, they will absolutely go on to lose the general for us. **Let's make sure that doesn't happen!**

_Thanks for your support!
Kerry_

clean_body: | | | | | | | Kate Brown just did it again. Dear Fellow Oregonian, Did you hear? Kate Brown just extended her emergency control over the lives of Oregonians through June 30, 2022. Her excuse? A new variant, which according to most medical experts, has symptoms mirroring those of the common cold. The vast majority of patients aren't even losing their sense of smell/taste during this one. Once elected,I will reverse any existing vaccine or mask mandates. Then I'll take it one step past that and support a constitutional amendment (yes, it's already drafted) severely limiting a governor's emergency powers so that no tyrant governor who might be elected after me can ever do what Kate Brown has done to us again. The folks who created and continue to run the medical freedom group Arboc21 know my plans, and know I'm true to my word. I thank them for this timely endorsement! My campaign needs your help. Have you used your $50 political tax credit yet? ($100 for couples filing jointly.) This is a CREDIT, not a deduction. It's so easy! Just donate $50 (or $100) to my campaign, and receive the full amount as a credit subtracted from your Oregon state taxes when you file.It’s like a free donation! Please donate today! I didn't come into this race beholden to large companies or wealthy individuals.I am 100% grassroots! Some candidates aren't; they're counting on buying this election with heavy TV advertising in the spring. Without excitement from the base, they will absolutely go on to lose the general for us. Let's make sure that doesn't happen! Thanks for your support! Kerry | "DONATE TODAY!" | Your gift of $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or more will help me achieve critical goals like attending events in all 36 Oregon counties! LEARN MORE AT | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2021 Kerry McQuisten for Oregon, All rights reserved.

Peter,

We’ve been excited to see an outpouring of support from conservatives standing with us to **turn Georgia RED and help Republicans WIN BACK the Senate majority.**

name: Mississippi Freedom Caucus
subject: Don’t Sell-Out Mississippian’s Healthcare
body:
| |
---
| [View in browser](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xODQ2MDUwMjY1NTMxMTYwODI4JmM9bjdwNyZlPTAmYj04NDM3NDEyMTImZD1qMG4xbTNq.8UXZaZVLT-Kv0cWwy61WlE0CRZoT96Zq3zvP7GM415c)
| | |
---
|
---
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| By Dan Eubanks
---
Don’t Sell-Out Mississippian’s Healthcare
In 2020 big Pharma had $1.27 trillion in sales worldwide. Out of the 195 nations that exist today, that dollar amount is greater than the GDP of 182 of them. In the United States alone, pharmaceutical and health companies spend an average of $233 million a year lobbying your federal government. That should be a huge red flag to the American people. That amount goes up even more when you factor in the level of dollars spent lobbying state governments. There are 1,274 registered pharmaceutical lobbyist in Washington DC alone. This particular industry spends more money lobbying your government at the federal and state level than any other industry that exists. Ask yourself why? If the last two years have taught us anything, it has taught us that there are powerful forces out there that want absolute control over both your body and personal liberty. Those that stand to make the most from this particular tyranny is big Pharma, and the politicians who line their pockets from their close association. On November 28th of this year, Mississippi Governor Tate Reeves nominated Dr. Lee Ann Griffin, a medical outcome specialist for Pfizer to head a post at the Mississippi State Board of Health. Our state board of health provides policy direction, along with our state health plan, as well as approves all rules and regulations of our health department. In addition, they appoint and oversee the state health officer (currently Dr. Thomas Dobbs). For anyone who’s job is being threatened because their employer is following the Biden vaccine mandate understands that when politicians mix their political desires with big business the people always lose. For anyone denied specific requested Covid treatments by your personal physician during the pandemic, because of the undue pressure applied to them by our state health director and the board, this should anger you. For anyone who believes politicians have already given the pharmaceutical industry too much power in driving our healthcare system and your personal health choices and liberty, then you MUST let your elected leadership know right now. Send an email with the form provided below to both the Governor and your state Senator. Ask Governor Reeves to pick another nominee, and for the Mississippi Senate to reject this current appointment. Do not allow politicians to sell your healthcare system. Do not allow someone with a clear conflict of interest to make decisions that are bad for Mississippi.
## Complete form below to send letter to Senators and Governor,
Governor Reeves and Senators,
I am emailing asking you to deny the confirmation of Lee Ann Griffin to the State Board of Health. As you know, our state board of health provides policy direction, along with our state health plan, as well as approves all rules and regulations of our health department. In addition, they appoint and oversee our state health officer. Griffin is an employee of Pfizer Pharmaceutical, her decisions on the State Board of Health will directly affect her employer. I believe this is a conflict of interest and would not serve the people of Mississippi. Please vote against the confirmation of Lee Ann Griffin. The people of Mississippi deserve a State Board of Health whose loyalty is only the the people not a large corporation. For Freedom,

| [Send Your Email](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xODQ2MDUwMjY1NTMxMTYwODI4JmM9bjdwNyZlPTAmYj04NDM3NDEyMjcmZD1mNWw1azBs.--5M5rQ_kSC7wIrMYANE0dLHz4qqA0mEXL5MuFs6DPE)

**On one hand, this is amazing news!** We're virtually tied with the Democrat incumbent even though I've never run for political office before. It's incredible that this race would be so close out of the starting gate!

**On the other hand, this is also alarming news** because national Democrats see how tight the race is and are desperately re-doubling their efforts to attack our campaign and prevent us from pulling ahead.

name: A Letter for the Senate GOP (VPP)
subject: we’ve had enough, team!!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
add your name for Mitch McConnell and his MAGA friends!
| **🚨 BREAKING NEWS ALERT FROM THE NEW YORK TIMES 🚨**
**Voting Battles of 2022 Take Shape as G.O.P. Crafts New Election Bills**

Team, this is just the latest right wing attack on our sacred right to vote -- _and we’re SICK of it!_ [That’s why we’ve drafted a BRAND NEW open letter to Senate Republicans and need 15,000 Democrats to sign on RIGHT NOW »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4597?t=6&akid=1037%2E878179%2Er6tOL7) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4597?t=7&akid=1037%2E878179%2Er6tOL7) | [DONATE $2 TO SIGN THE LETTER AND FIRE SENATE REPUBLICANS »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4598?t=8&akid=1037%2E878179%2Er6tOL7)
---
**TO:** SENATE REPUBLICANS
**FROM:** A Concerned American
**DATE:** December 21, 2021

**Dear Mitch McConnell and your MAGA minions,**

_How many times do we have to do this?_

The American people gave the Democrats a MANDATE to protect voting rights when we sweeped the 2020 Election.

The For the People Act.
The John Lewis Voting Rights Act.
The Right to Vote Act.

**These bills are incredibly popular with the American people and would ensure every person has the ability to vote in free and fair elections.

**Yet YOU continue to block these bills every chance you get! _Are you afraid of running a fair campaign?_
**
[I’m BEYOND sick of it, and I’m sick of you, which is why I’m donating $2 right now to VPP so they can FUND your FIRING »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4597?t=9&akid=1037%2E878179%2Er6tOL7)** | [DONATE $2 TO SIGN THE LETTER »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4598?t=10&akid=1037%2E878179%2Er6tOL7)
---
**I know why you refuse to support this legislation -- you and your alt-right friends know that if you can’t CHEAT, you can’t WIN!**

I’m so tired of you playing games with our constitutional rights, and it’s clear you’ll never come around to do the right thing.

That’s why I’m going to do everything in my power to kick you all out of power and shrink your majority even further! [And it starts right now with my $2 donation to VPP to BOOT you from office »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4598?t=11&akid=1037%2E878179%2Er6tOL7)
[DONATE $2 TO SIGN THE LETTER »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4598?t=12&akid=1037%2E878179%2Er6tOL7)
---
Regards,

**_xx A Concerned American_**
_!! SIGNATURE PENDING $2 DONATION!!_
[DONATE $2 TO SIGN THE LETTER »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4598?t=13&akid=1037%2E878179%2Er6tOL7)
---
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=1037%2E878179%2Er6tOL7). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=1037%2E878179%2Er6tOL7).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=1037%2E878179%2Er6tOL7) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=14&akid=1037%2E878179%2Er6tOL7). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=1037%2E878179%2Er6tOL7)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=1037%2E878179%2Er6tOL7)

name: Nicole Lopez
subject: We have some news.
body:
Firstly, history-maker and longtime Congresswoman of our district, Rep. Lucille Roybal-Allard, announced she will not be seeking reelection
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in a browser](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/59NtWAdRn/c?w=mRRa1-XJ9bh5B6NQJyYZkatgyos3XVcsH5YDRnMXA00.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zaG91dG91dC53aXguY29tL3NvLzU5TnRXQWRSbj9sYW5ndWFnZVRhZz1lbiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjRhZWQ3NDRlLWRjM2EtNGUwYi1hYWY1LTZhZmMxNzc0ZGZlMyJ9)_**
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | Last night there were a couple developments that will affect our campaign moving forward.
---
| | Firstly, history-maker and longtime Congresswoman of our district, Rep. Lucille Roybal-Allard, announced she will not be seeking reelection next year. As I said in my statement, Congresswoman Roybal-Allard served honorably and blazed the trail for Latinas like me who aspire to follow in her footsteps. Thank you, Congresswoman Roybal-Allard, for all you have done for immigrants, women, and the Latinx community. You have inspired a generation of young women, myself included, to advocate for our communities from City Hall to the halls of Congress. We look forward to making you and our district proud. Speaking of which, our district, which now includes the cities of Huntington Park, Walnut Park, Cudahy, Bell, Bell Gardens, Commerce, Downey, Bellflower, Lakewood and Long Beach, has been given a new district number. Our district will now be known as congressional district 42. You may also see the district identified as CD-42 or CA-42, but just know that our goal stays the same: to have a campaign that welcomes everyone and anyone who wants to create real change for our communities. I know it won’t be easy, but together we can prove the gatekeepers wrong by showing them that our community will speak up and demand change that will help all of us thrive, not just survive. I have one request today: [Will you join our movement by making a $1, $5, or $15 contribution to our campaign? Every dollar will help us hit the ground running in 2022. ](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/59NtWAdRn/c?w=vGGPSjujWEMCEO05t2IQKRJ1F28A6Hkzxbsgkpa-d2Q.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL25pY29sZS1sb3Blei1mb3ItY29uZ3Jlc3MtMSIsInIiOiIzNjk3MjVmYy1jNTUyLTRjMDMtMmNlYy03NDBjYzhlNTE5N2YiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI0YWVkNzQ0ZS1kYzNhLTRlMGItYWFmNS02YWZjMTc3NGRmZTMifQ) And if donating isn’t a possibility, please consider [signing up to volunteer](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/59NtWAdRn/c?w=JbLbipLbERgo4R1FEXGadKaQpOi2PPc-f9WScnW8PaA.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubmljb2xlbG9wZXpmb3Jjb25ncmVzcy5jb20vIiwiciI6IjM2OTcyNWZjLWM1NTItNGMwMy0yY2VjLTc0MGNjOGU1MTk3ZiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjRhZWQ3NDRlLWRjM2EtNGUwYi1hYWY1LTZhZmMxNzc0ZGZlMyJ9). Even an hour of your time will go a long way. May you and your family stay safe and healthy this holiday season. ¡La lucha sigue! Con ganas y sin miedo, Nicole López P.S. Want to help grow our movement? Share this email with 5 of your family members and friends. I appreciate it!
---

clean_body: Firstly, history-maker and longtime Congresswoman of our district, Rep. Lucille Roybal-Allard, announced she will not be seeking reelection | | Can't see this message? | | | | | | | Last night there were a couple developments that will affect our campaign moving forward. | | Firstly, history-maker and longtime Congresswoman of our district, Rep. Lucille Roybal-Allard, announced she will not be seeking reelection next year. As I said in my statement, Congresswoman Roybal-Allard served honorably and blazed the trail for Latinas like me who aspire to follow in her footsteps. Thank you, Congresswoman Roybal-Allard, for all you have done for immigrants, women, and the Latinx community. You have inspired a generation of young women, myself included, to advocate for our communities from City Hall to the halls of Congress. We look forward to making you and our district proud. Speaking of which, our district, which now includes the cities of Huntington Park, Walnut Park, Cudahy, Bell, Bell Gardens, Commerce, Downey, Bellflower, Lakewood and Long Beach, has been given a new district number. Our district will now be known as congressional district 42. You may also see the district identified as CD-42 or CA-42, but just know that our goal stays the same: to have a campaign that welcomes everyone and anyone who wants to create real change for our communities. I know it won’t be easy, but together we can prove the gatekeepers wrong by showing them that our community will speak up and demand change that will help all of us thrive, not just survive. I have one request today: And if donating isn’t a possibility, please consider . Even an hour of your time will go a long way. May you and your family stay safe and healthy this holiday season. ¡La lucha sigue! Con ganas y sin miedo, Nicole López P.S. Want to help grow our movement? name: Rand Paul
subject: how’s that spending going?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate |
body:
Thanks to Biden’s frivolous tax-and-spend philosophies, America is facing a 39-year high for inflation.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zfdinlbuin3b57l4a46fs561c6io252cg09kib0o_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkeq32t5nmeq33cjl61qn4cdkmoq37c3nm6or9ctn6ej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf6d3k6hhb0orlc5p6fcjkecqe9phkcdoj6sthmqqj8opm65jm2cbgeerj1cpim3jt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or7m8o6cc5immo6fdr5coqe1cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn48d245p25oh4cdgm0p37c1geaoj24no)
Friend, how’s the White House gonna spin this one? __ [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z0akb1vfncs99tfddk9g311kslfgnc11hbfnrlmg_rp22sh2s8i66ob0chjm0o75c9h2bs) Thanks to Biden’s frivolous tax-and-spend philosophies, America is facing a 39-year high for inflation. And we’re all feeling it. When we buy gas... when we buy groceries... when we go out for a meal. It’s hitting every single American right in the pocketbook. That’s why I’m thinking it’s about time we take back the House and Senate and get Biden’s spending under control. __ [**STAND WITH RAND: $100**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zbthcskh0p4c9k0g5960ufppoghm4uuc9quj3mg0_rp22sh2s8i66ob0chjm0o75c9h2bs) [**STAND WITH RAND: $75**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z1qefb7rnnnm32a5ivirm0fji0hcisj1jvgmnu20_rp22sh2s8i66ob0chjm0o75c9h2bs) [**STAND WITH RAND: $50**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zs5pl9tq6g11ura94i10q8br0u59at1filipbh10_rp22sh2s8i66ob0chjm0o75c9h2bs) [**STAND WITH RAND: $25**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z8jiob9c3bj57nb6j3ntof7a6tebdovnkhmn3dl0_rp22sh2s8i66ob0chjm0o75c9h2bs) Friend, make no mistake... this inflation issue is serious. With our debt reaching almost $30 TRILLION, Biden has contributed to a total fiscal crisis that must be addressed immediately. I will work tirelessly to balance our budget. I have introduced several balanced budgets in the Senate that would cut the debt and help rein in some of this inflation. But to make major changes, we’re going to have to work together. I hope you’ll join me by chipping in now: **[https://secure.winred.com/randpaul/action-3417615/](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zemm86qf2qjjgg5ib2m1nv1qsl2e6lhl2eieg1u0_rp22sh2s8i66ob0chjm0o75c9h2bs)** In Liberty, Rand Paul __ \----------- Forwarded message ----------- From: Rand Paul Date: December 18, 2021, 4:02 PM EST Subject: inflation up almost 7% and there’s one person to blame __ [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zd5ch8hj60a100p0ijp0bi9angqpucmk4ktvlq3g_rp22sh2s8i66ob0chjm0o75c9h2bs) | |
---
Friend,

Inflation up 6.8% over the last 12 months and there's one person you can thank for it: President Biden.

Since last year...
__
_⬆️ Gas is up 42.1%_
_⬆️ Energy costs are up 24.8%_
_⬆️ Used cars and trucks are up 24.4%_
_⬆️ Food is up 4.6%_
_⬆️ Clothing 3.4%_
__
[**STAND WITH RAND: END RECKLESS SPENDING**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z13r27f3shmec3frftpfhmgnb2bg08qfv43m0trg_rp22sh2s8i66ob0chjm0o75c9h2bs)

Americans have been hit by this Biden-inflation with high costs at every turn.

**_And instead of course correcting and making things better - Biden only wants to make it worse by passing MASSIVE tax-and-spend plans._**

The Congressional Budget Office estimates Biden's latest plan will add $3 trillion to the debt. The consequences will be devastating, friend.

That's why we have no choice but to take back the Senate and the House in 2022 and end this nonsense.

I’m committed to doing everything I can, but I need you on my side, too. _**[Will you help by chipping in now?](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z9u6ssuf4o82g95o9v3earp34veqva80qho9dp9o_rp22sh2s8i66ob0chjm0o75c9h2bs)** _
__
**_By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution_**
__
[**ONE-CLICK DONATE: $100**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zml7p0r371c6pmagg4r9dnsc69b1fjki060h42f0_rp22sh2s8i66ob0chjm0o75c9h2bs)
[**ONE-CLICK DONATE: $75**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zt1a2mre34t2258is41a1n255oksa9rkuniqjado_rp22sh2s8i66ob0chjm0o75c9h2bs)
[**ONE-CLICK DONATE: $50**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z7tourp3do5sp1c476lt9saum3ers2bqbeov3rn8_rp22sh2s8i66ob0chjm0o75c9h2bs)
[**ONE-CLICK DONATE: $25**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z9ct6hcatl04aasst38nakuqmmf7ecqmkt0ni4t0_rp22sh2s8i66ob0chjm0o75c9h2bs)
**_If you've saved payment information with Revv, your donation will go through automatically._**
__
_Friend, you know me. _And you know exactly how hard I’ll fight to end the out of control spending of these leftists who want to destroy this nation.

I’m not afraid of the tough fights.

I know that if we work together now, we CAN take back the Senate, and reject Biden’s radical, socialist policies that are making everything outrageously expensive.

**Please, chip in now to give us the headstart we need in 2022:[https://secure.winred.com/randpaul/action-3398659/](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zneb7556n5nonugb14v4hihk2u7pssv1ms7hnmv8_rp22sh2s8i66ob0chjm0o75c9h2bs)**

In liberty,
Rand Paul

name: Ben Shapiro
subject: 9 Antifa Leftists Arrested
body:
Insidious leftist ideology has taken hold of our educational system.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zam64ncbujv466be0avj112bq5hmijob4inh0ft0_rp22sh2s8i66ob0chjm0o76cph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65shlesob8olmm2qm6sj26donatlhedpr2p1m6dqmcdtmm9hn1dr7c3i79p1kcdrrfkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3cup30phgmaqr0ptncdj30s5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)
Fellow Patriot, Insidious leftist ideology has taken hold of our educational system. It’s never been more important that we expose it, because the Left has lit an ideological fire, and that fire is now consuming the minds of young Americans, burning itself through the most aspects of American culture and politics. That’s why it’s of utmost importance that I hear back from you today. I’m no stranger to the authoritarian attitudes on campus; I famously felt the brunt of it when conservative students invited me to speak on the University of California, Berkeley campus. Radical leftist groups like Antifa vowed to riot and cause harm to others. [**HELP US FIGHT THE RADICAL LEFT**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zao4rch1aach8sgehv1r49r5b5mbe6p5vs9ps5eg_rp22sh2s8i66ob0chjm0o76cph2bs) The fear of violence from leftist agitators was so great that:
* It cost $600,000 in security expenses and required hundreds of policemen to ensure that agitators didn’t disrupt or try to cause violence at my speech.
* The University shut down six buildings on campus during my speech and erected concrete barricades (YES, a wall) to secure the Berkeley campus.
* For the first time in 20 years, the City of Berkeley voted to allow the use of pepper spray against violent protesters.
* In the end, police arrested nine leftists for trying to sneak banned weapons into our event—with the likely intent to do harm.

It’s no longer just about the Left trying to suppress your conservative views on campus. It’s about using the threat of violence to silence the conservative values you and I share. [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zlpu86rg0d2udksve2nef47ki6p2p2rfdmcprg8o_rp22sh2s8i66ob0chjm0o76cph2bs) Meanwhile, schools roll out the red carpet for leftists like Angela Davis, Bill Ayers, Barack Obama, Bill Clinton, and Bernie Sanders. At Berkeley, taxpayer-funded school administrators tried to derail my event from even taking place. They told me that they didn’t have a lecture hall available, which was a lie. School administrators even cut the venue in half by not allowing students to sit in the balcony—a dirty tactic to minimize attendance. **The good news is the radical Left’s attempts to silence me completely backfired.****** More than 600 students showed up, and we were able to host an engaging and civil event. Then, OVER 10 MILLION PEOPLE watched my speech online (that’s more viewers than any of the major evening newscasts). This victory for the Conservative Movement would have never happened if it weren’t for the **Young America’s Foundation** **(YAF)**. When Berkeley tried to illegally block me from coming to campus, YAF sued the university —**and won.** But the radicals who rioted and tried to incite violence at Berkeley are relentless. Their stranglehold on America’s universities has not yet been broken. **Young America’s Foundation** has been an incredible partner in making sure I am able to share our conservative values with students on campuses across the country. In fact, I speak on campuses **_exclusively_** through YAF because I know YAF has the experience and leadership necessary to run the nation’s leading campus lecture program. Today YAF needs your help. **[Will you make a _TAX-DEDUCTIBLE_ contribution of $35 today to ensure that YAF can continue to present speakers, including Dr. Arthur Laffer, Katie Pavlich, Senator Ted Cruz, and many others to high school and college students? Without you, the mission to pass along our conservative values to future generations will stall out.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zkuatvlj279qrctbm61ftd92g4j1m1tq1v90tqvg_rp22sh2s8i66ob0chjm0o76cph2bs)** Let me tell you a little bit more about what YAF does to advance conservative ideas. Speaking to an audience of Young America’s Foundation students, Vice President Mike Pence noted, “Since its founding in 1960, YAF has been a bulwark of American greatness.” YAF valiantly defends the values we share by educating impressionable young people who have been ideologically poisoned by leftist propaganda for decades, by the very teachers and professors they’re told to trust. YAF’s team is the best at what they do. They are _**#1: the LARGEST and MOST effective conservative youth outreach organization in America**._ Here’s why:
* YAF introduces young audiences to the biggest names in the Conservative Movement through their leading campus lecture program. YAF speakers are the most inspiring conservative voices in America, including **Arthur Laffer, Katie Pavlich,** YAF’s Ronald Reagan Presidential Scholar and Vice President **Mike Pence, Dinesh D’Souza, Lila Rose, Steve Forbes,** Lt. Col.**Allen West** , Speaker**Newt Gingrich, Michael Knowles, Dana Loesch, James O’Keefe,** NFL star and Congressman **Burgess Owens, Star Parker,** Fox News’s**Jesse Watters,** and many others.
* YAF teaches **_millions of students_ **across the nation YOUR conservative values through breakthrough conferences, training seminars, and campus activism initiatives and activities. (In fact, YAF is the only Conservative Movement organization that has a full suite of conservative educational programs for high school students!)
* And YAF preserves and protects President Reagan’s ranch in Santa Barbara, California and Boyhood Home in Dixon, Illinois. They saved these national treasures so young people can learn about Ronald Reagan’s lasting accomplishments.

No other organization reaches conservative students with foundational American ideas on a bigger scale than Young America’s Foundation. **That’s why I prefer YAF to be my sole sponsor for campus events.** They fight for the right to ensure alternative voices are heard on college campuses. They stop campuses from being turned into Leftist echo chambers. I am glad I have YAF on my side and the side of the students. But YAF can’t do this alone. As the Left continues to stoop to desperate new lows to silence conservatives, it’s become more important than ever that our values are shared with the next generation of thought leaders. We both know that the Left doesn’t want a fair discussion of ideas. But that’s why YAF needs your help today. At any moment, a scheduled event could get shut down by campus radicals or administrators, and the YAF team must be ready to engage them on a moment’s notice. [**Will you contribute $35 or more today so that YAF’s rapid response team will always be ready to leap into action the next time leftists decide to shut down free speech and deprive students of the chance to hear your conservative ideas?**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zjs0gbvkhhkbdhhlegplfblaafiie2btq0es8on0_rp22sh2s8i66ob0chjm0o76cph2bs) Friend, a donation of $35 or whatever you choose does more than you know. The impact amplifying conservative voices will have on the future of our country can’t be overstated. I cannot encourage you enough to consider giving to YAF today. Partnering with YAF today is our opportunity to win a generation that values freedom. I can’t think of a better investment. Ronald Reagan stated, “There is no better way to establish hope for the future than to enlighten young minds.” I look forward to hearing back from you. -Ben Ben Shapiro [**Will you support Young America’s Foundation with a contribution of $35, $50, $100, or even $1000 today, to save this generation by presenting conservative ideas to students across the country? All donations to YAF are TAX-DEDUCTIBLE!**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zn18qefka8scidte4b1ro4osoeo3akss0v4inu80_rp22sh2s8i66ob0chjm0o76cph2bs) [**DONATE**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhn0hvqh9abndikk83ogm78flgsng08f7277hdb0_rp22sh2s8i66ob0chjm0o76cph2bs) [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8r0rhhhs12na0roskj32t0b4n0mr2o0fpjqkf80_rp22sh2s8i66ob0chjm0o76cph2bs) | | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z729d64lo9lhtlr8c449p2459inb6o5m5vvcvpj8_rp22sh2s8i66ob0chjm0o76cph2bs) | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zthj80geeep1ko6k1icndonkvua2bqut14q78aq0_rp22sh2s8i66ob0chjm0o76cph2bs) | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zdd0gp19sp23pj6eg37nv16a0d5smc69r8hkcku8_rp22sh2s8i66ob0chjm0o76cph2bs)

clean_body: Insidious leftist ideology has taken hold of our educational system. Fellow Patriot, Insidious leftist ideology has taken hold of our educational system. It’s never been more important that we expose it, because the Left has lit an ideological fire, and that fire is now consuming the minds of young Americans, burning itself through the most aspects of American culture and politics. That’s why it’s of utmost importance that I hear back from you today. I’m no stranger to the authoritarian attitudes on campus; I famously felt the brunt of it when conservative students invited me to speak on the University of California, Berkeley campus. Radical leftist groups like Antifa vowed to riot and cause harm to others. The fear of violence from leftist agitators was so great that: It cost $600,000 in security expenses and required hundreds of policemen to ensure that agitators didn’t disrupt or try to cause violence at my speech. The University shut down six buildings on campus during my speech and erected concrete barricades (YES, a wall) to secure the Berkeley campus. For the first time in 20 years, the City of Berkeley voted to allow the use of pepper spray against violent protesters. In the end, police arrested nine leftists for trying to sneak banned weapons into our event—with the likely intent to do harm. It’s no longer just about the Left trying to suppress your conservative views on campus. It’s about using the threat of violence to silence the conservative values you and I share. Our Southern Border looks like Swiss cheese. That thing now has more holes than a hobo’s socks.

Meanwhile, we’ve got a president who is so unwilling to do anything about it, he almost seems to be proud of his inaction. I haven’t seen leadership this poor since General Custer.

I think I’ve figured out President Biden’s plan of attack to solve the Border Crisis: **MAKE KAMALA IGNORE IT.**

body:
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z3d4vb3fku5va7am1gmrrvnv6f2a28tde29hkmvo_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbpbbc3ge8oefdti6kprasr0elpncc9mmupreoth6op3ep37cmq34c30mthrdchgsv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj66ljj6o70e9q6cdb0mmpmfc5lclp238h1e8he4933c5g68pr1c5hm6oh5u)
My team just informed me

| [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zk962ljj4albdesq5bnr46rndc1is9lt2a0vrslg_rp22sh2s8i66ob0chjm2ob3cdh2bs)
---

Folks,

I’d be lying to you if I said I wasn’t pretty upset about what my team just told me.

We came up well short of our November fundraising goal, and I’ve got to say that’s not good. Chuck Schumer’s going to be foaming at the mouth to take a shot at me this month, knowing that I don’t have the resources to fight back. name: ICYMI News
subject: What he says about the good life
body:
Are you struggling with a difficult question in your life? Often, I find myself in that position as well. It’s part of the hum
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
| | | This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zdva7osnbv4rbtnndpr8hb2h3o2ip5ao49uv3kn8_rp22sh2s8i66ob0chjm2ob6c1h2bs)
---
| |
Dear Friend of Knowledge, Are you struggling with a difficult question in your life? Often, I find myself in that position as well. It’s part of the human condition to be faced with difficult situations, choices, and people. We teach at Hillsdale College that we must carefully consider concepts such as morality, ethics, happiness, courage, character, and justice when we face difficult questions. In the _Nicomachean Ethics_ —the first book written on how best to live—Aristotle argues that human happiness chiefly depends upon a person’s character, which is formed by making good choices. But good choices don’t come naturally. That’s why every student at Hillsdale studies Aristotle. In fact, understanding Aristotle is so important to living a good life that we’ve produced our online course, **“Introduction to Aristotle’s _Ethics_ : How to Lead a Good Life.” **
---
| | And now you can own the course on DVD, along with a special Hillsdale College edition of Aristotle’s _Nicomachean Ethics_ , for personal study. You’ll not only study what Aristotle says about the good life with Hillsdale College President Larry P. Arnn, but you will also explore ways to put this knowledge to work.
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zr66l3d8u3v5jeqactkoo5atu0j6nndh1f85tha0_rp22sh2s8i66ob0chjm2ob6c1h2bs)
---
| | The DVD gives you a seat at the table in a seminar-style class like those here on campus, and you’ll read from the same book the students are in the course. In addition to the topics I’ve already mentioned, the course focuses on subjects including:
* Aristotle’s _Politics_ and the Nature of Man
* Deliberation and Choice
* Practical Judgment
* Contemplation and Action

Just consider what Rebecca, a free online course student, recently said: _“I have learned [through the Aristotle course] that every choice we make etches into our soul.”_ Make a good choice, and watch a special preview video of the course. Then reserve your DVD and book today using this secure link: [**_https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/aristotle-dvd-book-offer_**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zjjr11234lc5iatek775bp48pd6m9gp77324pc98_rp22sh2s8i66ob0chjm2ob6c1h2bs) After watching the preview, if you’re struggling with a thorny question, I hope you’ll join Rebecca and many others by reserving your DVD of [**“Introduction to Aristotle’s _Ethics_ ”**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3v1n1cg2ommgh1g337mutq38b9rn3pda727qan0_rp22sh2s8i66ob0chjm2ob6c1h2bs)**** along with its companion book __ today _._ Quantities of the DVD and book are limited, so don’t wait too long to decide. Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

name: Tom Brejcha
subject: 9 felonies for exposing Planned Parenthood
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| Dear Friend, I'm writing this letter to you today because, quite frankly, David Daleiden cannot. You may remember David as the undercover journalist who spent 30 months investigating and capturing video evidence of Planned Parenthood 's top leadership --- medical directors, national program directors, even its Senior Director of Medical Services -- **callously negotiating the harvesting and sale of aborted baby body parts.** **And now, he’s been charged with nine bogus felonies.** **[Which is why I’m asking you to make an emergency donation to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND right away.](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._cClZpJGRXnGA)** You see, after David released the shocking videos of the illegal and disgusting actions of abortion executives, Kamala Harris, then California's Attorney General, colluded with Planned Parenthood to file felony charges against David... _**... Kamala Harris even ordered the California Department of Justice to raid David's home and confiscate his unpublished videos.**_ I won't sugarcoat it. If not cleared of these charges, David faces steep fines and years in state penitentiary and the consequences of being a convicted felon. While Kamala Harris --- a bought-and-paid-for ally of the abortion industry --- is sitting one heartbeat away from the presidency. That's the bad news. But here's the good news... David is fighting back. In fact, he's taking another opportunity to drag more of Planned Parenthood's dark criminality into the spotlight with two new federal lawsuits. That's right. The Thomas More Society has filed a federal civil rights lawsuit in California on behalf of David against former California Attorney General and now VicePresident Kamala Harris for prosecuting David in bad faith, twisting and perverting California's anti-eavesdropping law to persecute a citizen journalist because of his political views. Then the Thomas More Society filed a defamation (libel) lawsuit in federal court in New York against Planned Parenthood, which said David created a "fake" and "false" "smear campaign" against Planned Parenthood. In other words, the best defense is a good offense. The truth is we could no longer let David suffer such a trampling of his free speech and due process rights without a counterattack. The timing couldn't be more important. This is a critical opportunity to put Kamala Harris, Planned Parenthood, and the rest of the abortion industry on trial for conspiring to silence David in order to cover-up their illegal activities. **[That's where your emergency donation to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND comes in --- by giving today you can stand with David in his hour of need.](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)** The reality is. . . You couldn't be there when David entered the dark underbelly of the abortion industry --- sitting across the table from abortionists haggling over the price of baby body parts with cold-blooded clarity... "I want a Lamborghini." You couldn't be there as David saw with his own eyes the preborn children who had been killed with great precision and delicacy to preserve their organs for maximum profit. You couldn't be there when the videos were released and Kamala Harris and Planned Parenthood conspired to crush David with trumped up legal charges and an armed raid on his home in which they seized laptops, hard-drives, and recording equipment. And you couldn't be there with David (our criminal defense team was there) when he voluntarily appeared in both Texas and California for booking and processing --- fingerprinted and photographed for a mugshot like a common criminal. But, now, this is the reality... there is something you can do. **[You can make an emergency donation to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND to help vindicate this pro-life hero.](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)** My name is Tom Brejcha. I'm the president and chief counsel of the Thomas More Society --- a not-for-profit law firm underwriting and helping to spearhead David's criminal defense. The Thomas More Society is proud to have defended many renowned pro-life and religious leaders in America's pro-life movement such as Joe, Ann, and Eric Scheidler, the Pro-Life Action League, Shawn Carney and 40 Days for Life, Abby Johnson, the Susan B. Anthony List, David Bereit, Lila Rose and Live Action, Students for Life, Sidewalk Advocates for Life, Created Equal, former Kansas Attorney General Phill Kline, the March for Life, and many more. Because when dark forces like Planned Parenthood unleash their full might to legally, financially, and personally destroy our clients --- **we fight back.** I have to tell you, despite all that David is facing, his spirits remain high. Of course, I've never known anyone in this kind of position who didn't feel an empty pit in his stomach. But David's not giving up. His willingness to fight back is a true profile in Pro-Life courage. Now I'll get right down to it... **We anticipate David's legal defense will cost us more than $6 million. That's right, SIX MILLION DOLLARS.** In addition to the criminal case and the new federal civil rights and defamation lawsuits, we're currently representing David in THREE other cases.
* The civil lawsuit filed by Planned Parenthood where we are appealing the jury's verdict, along with the judge's order permanently banning David from doing any more undercover journalism against Planned Parenthood. Recently, we posted a $700,000 appeal bond to keep Planned Parenthood’s nasty collection agents from harassing him with collection agents and even seizing his belongings. We’re fighting back, but we’ll need your help.

* The civil lawsuit brought by the National Abortion Federation and the "gag order" injunction that still prohibits David from releasing any more of his video evidence exposing Planned Parenthood's illegal fetal tissue business. And now, in light of the Planned Parenthood civil lawsuit, NAF has moved for summary judgment – they want a ruling against David without a trial at all!

* And finally, the civil lawsuit filed by Planned Parenthood personnel in federal court in Seattle, where we just achieved a victory for a second time on appeal, but it appears we may need at least a third victory on appeal before this case ends.

That's why David needs your financial support today. **[And that's why I'm praying you will donate $35 or more to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND right away.](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-Hn02A)** I won't guess how much you're able to send today. Whether it's $35, $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, $1,000 or more... ... I will only say that time is of the essence. So I do ask that you make your donation as soon as you can. **This truly is a "David versus Goliath" type of battle --- with Kamala Harris, Planned Parenthood, and the radical left arrayed against our "David."** It's a grave injustice that David is the one being hit with felony charges and massive civil penalties while Planned Parenthood (so far, at least) has gone unpunished. By clearing David of these charges... you and I can allow him to continue with his incredibly important lifesaving work. Remember, over 12 million people on YouTube alone watched the shocking footage he captured. Since that time, 26 states --- over half the country -- have moved to strip Planned Parenthood of taxpayer funding. It's no wonder Planned Parenthood and their allies want to destroy David. They'd love to see him rotting away in penitentiary rather than exposing their criminal and inhumane activities. You and I cannot let that happen. **[So please don't delay. Donate $35, $50, $100, or more to stand with David Daleiden today.](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)** I've asked my staff to let me know as soon as we get it so I can let David know that you're standing with him. I know he'll be deeply touched by your generous support. May God Bless You, Tom Brejcha
President & Chief Counsel P.S. Kamala Harris, Planned Parenthood, and their allies want to destroy David. They'd love to see him rotting away in penitentiary rather than exposing their criminal, ghoulish activities. You and I cannot let that happen. Can I count on you to support the official criminal defense of David Daleiden? **[David is a pro-life hero. Will you make a generous donation to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND of $35, $50, $100 or more to stop this attempt to crush him?](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)** [**DONATE**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._4Kw) [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-1g) The Thomas More Society is a not-for-profit, national public interest law firm dedicated to restoring respect in law for life, family, and religious liberty. [Please consider supporting our efforts with a generous, tax-deductible donation.](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.) © Thomas More Society | [www.thomasmoresociety.org](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIxMzU2LThlMDY5ODA5ZTM3ODQ0NmRiNDE2ZTlmMzFhNmE4NDUwIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjkiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3d3dy50aG9tYXNtb3Jlc29jaWV0eS5vcmcifQ/WJ7GaIrSO8qxb5MsL-VblA)
309 W. Washington Street Suite 1250, Chicago, IL 60606
---
P.O. Box 523692, Springfield, VA 22152If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIxMzU2LThlMDY5ODA5ZTM3ODQ0NmRiNDE2ZTlmMzFhNmE4NDUwIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/eWgriGLJfteTs_YZVUM78Q) to unsubscribe.
---

clean_body: Hello, This is NOT the news we wanted to share. With less than 48 hours until our most critical deadline yet, we’re still falling dangerously short of our goal and what we need to help Admiral Mike Franken defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue. These goals and deadlines are very real. Unless we have the resources to fight back against Chuck Grassley’s corporate PAC war chest and Mitch McConnell’s Super PAC lies, we could lose this race – and Democrats’ fragile Senate majority. Mike Franken isn’t taking money from corporate PACs. Instead, he relies entirely on campaign contributions from people like you. With time running out until our critical deadline, we’re counting on grassroots donors like you to give right now if Mike is going to win and protect our Democratic Senate majority. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Paid for by Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc PO Box 13401 Des Moines, IA 50310 United States

|

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39924925/322037022/-1576960734?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzQ4ZWY3MS0yZjYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6t8nCrwe2taV7IzSLwCeN7W4tdjX85fVrMKmtAFC4rM=)

Friends,

Thank you for making 2021 a year of real progress, despite the many challenges we faced.

You made this year about more than supporting this campaign -- you made it about people coming together to build a brighter future for Pennsylvania and working families all across the country.

**[Now, as 2021 comes to a close in just a few days, I want to hear what you're excited about fighting for in 2022. Please, take a moment to answer this short survey and let me know exactly what's on your mind, friend.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39924926/322037023/-1195121734?ms=em21_21122_survey&refcode=em21_21122_survey&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzQ4ZWY3MS0yZjYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6t8nCrwe2taV7IzSLwCeN7W4tdjX85fVrMKmtAFC4rM=&emci=c0becb05-cd61-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=a748ef71-2f63-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=18516396)** [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39924928/322037025/-1195121734?ms=em21_21122_survey&refcode=em21_21122_survey&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzQ4ZWY3MS0yZjYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6t8nCrwe2taV7IzSLwCeN7W4tdjX85fVrMKmtAFC4rM=&emci=c0becb05-cd61-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=a748ef71-2f63-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=18516396) As a member of Congress, a Marine, and a former federal prosecutor, I've found if you include diverse opinions and take the time to listen to people, you'll find creative solutions to complex problems.

I truly believe we can find a way to rise above the partisanship to create good-paying jobs, protect women’s rights, strengthen unions, fund our schools, allow our seniors to retire with dignity and security, and build an economy that works for everyone.

I won't pretend to have all the answers, but I know that we can do it together. This campaign is built by working families who have decided that enough is enough, and it's time to put people first and political gamesmanship aside.

**[That's why having your input is so important. So please, take our survey and let me know -- from your perspective -- which issues are worth fighting for in the year ahead.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39924931/322037029/-1195121734?ms=em21_21122_survey&refcode=em21_21122_survey&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzQ4ZWY3MS0yZjYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6t8nCrwe2taV7IzSLwCeN7W4tdjX85fVrMKmtAFC4rM=&emci=c0becb05-cd61-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=a748ef71-2f63-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=18516396)**

| | Peter, When we started this campaign back in March, my top priority was to build a movement rooted in love, empathy, and doing right by our neighbors. This came from my experience as an organizer fighting for marriage equality here in rural North Carolina and throughout the South and my experience on two county commission campaigns. In each, we won – even when no one said we had a chance, because we came to the work with humility and tenacity. What I learned was that if you organize everywhere, if you put the time into meeting people where they are and having meaningful conversations with them, **it will make all the difference.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39925009/322037194/-468352360?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_211222_FR_EOY2Organizing_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzQ4ZWY3MS0yZjYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wwAgR3oT8jrhaNaIa5cf9e6R-7aeWmB0_pgFfdQHh2A=) And that is why I am excited to share that both me, and our amazing team of staff and volunteers, have knocked doors and spoken to voters in every county in Western North Carolina since July. clean_body: | = | | Peter, When we started this campaign back in March, my top priority was to build a movement rooted in love, empathy, and doing right by our neighbors. This came from my experience as an organizer fighting for marriage equality here in rural North Carolina and throughout the South and my experience on two county commission campaigns. In each, we won – even when no one said we had a chance, because we came to the work with humility and tenacity. What I learned was that if you organize everywhere, if you put the time into meeting people where they are and having meaningful conversations with them, it will make all the difference. = And that is why I am excited to share that both me, and our amazing team of staff and volunteers, have knocked doors and spoken to voters in every county in Western North Carolina since July. And, with your help, we are fired up to start the new year by getting out there to do it again. = | | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Our entire team is dedicated to building a grassroots organizing program that will go above and beyond by forming the type of real connections and continued conversations that will be the key to winning, both in May and in November. But we cannot do it without you, or your support. – Jasmine | | We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. name: Ashley Ehasz
subject: Wishing you well this holiday season
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ehasz for Congress
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39927684/322046563/-46617290?refcode=fl_em_na_20211222Happyholidays_ae_full_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YWU1OWE5Ny0zMzYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q_vJibUBgOfJXDe9Dce-lGCCA4AYmKw96MjkBartRxs=)
---
Friend, The last few months have been a whirlwind ever since I announced my campaign for Congress here in Pennsylvania’s 1st District, and I just wanted to take a moment to slow down and say thank you. It isn’t easy running for office, especially when we’re going up against an incumbent with a $1.5 million war chest behind him! But I believe in what we’re doing: I believe every person and family in this district deserves the opportunity to put food on the table, to get the care they need, to get a good education, and to thrive. Our representatives should be making life easier, not harder. It’s the honor of a lifetime to be considered for this important role, and I’ve had such an inspiring time so far meeting with so many of you in person or hearing from you over the phone or online. **I know that if we come together, we the people can achieve the leadership we deserve in Congress next year. I’m so hopeful for 2022, and I hope you are too!** We have a lot of work ahead of us, but for now, I hope you’re able to take this time to slow down and relax with loved ones. Thank you again for your support, and I wish you happy, healthy holidays. Respectfully, Ashley | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39927685/322046564/-46617290?refcode=fl_em_na_20211222Happyholidays_ae_full_xx_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YWU1OWE5Ny0zMzYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q_vJibUBgOfJXDe9Dce-lGCCA4AYmKw96MjkBartRxs=)

name: Christina Davidson
subject: No Jab No Job
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Health Freedom Defense Fund
body:
I don't know you and you don't know me, but the government is forcing me to choose between the jab and my job, and I'm writing to you today because I think we have something important in common. I think you're a patriot, and I think you know what's at stake. You know that freedoms given away are never given back... | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59082214:J5IhG1ENm:m:1:3253819041:C8462AE7AFBBD9D8C3661C6BB353B324:r)
---

Peter,

I don't know you and you don't know me, but the government is forcing me to choose between the jab and my job, and I'm writing to you today because I think we have something important in common.

I think you're a patriot, and I think you know what's at stake.

You know that freedoms given away are never given back.

And no matter your vaccination status, you know that your medical decisions are between you and your doctor - not you and your government, or you and your boss.

**That's why I'm suing the federal government alongside of 6,000 other federal employees with the help of the Health Freedom Defense Fund and why I hope I can count on your generous support today.**

[**Will you give $25, $50, $100 or more and give us the ammunition we need to win this legal battle?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59082214:J5IhG1ENm:m:1:3253819041:C8462AE7AFBBD9D8C3661C6BB353B324:r)

My name is Christina Davidson, I'm a paramedic firefighter, and I've worked for the Department of Defense for 14 years.

**_If I did what the government is doing I'd lose my license on the spot._**

I'm not allowed to give my patients medication without their consent, and I'm not allowed to threaten them to take medication.

But that's exactly what's happening to me and thousands of other employees across the country, and that's why we need you on our side.

_Because what starts with us won't end with us._

**If they can do it to me, they can do it to you.**

We're taking on this legal battle because we know if we give up and give in, it's only a matter of time before they come after you, your livelihood and your family the way they came after ours.

We want to stop tyranny in its tracks and codify our medical rights into law once and for all.

[**But we don't stand a chance without you.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59082214:J5IhG1ENm:m:1:3253819041:C8462AE7AFBBD9D8C3661C6BB353B324:r)

I won't mince words...we've got our work cut out for us.

The government is going to fight us every step of the way.

They've already shown us how far they're willing to go to push these mandates.

They've blatantly defied the courts, and are encouraging private employers to do the same. The President has even told businesses to ignore the courts.

Federal employees lucky enough to get an exemption are required to undergo "reeducation" training.

On top of regular threats, we're told we have no chance of promotion unless we shut up and take it.

And if we're fired, it won't just be a matter of finding a new job.

They're making it so that we'll never be able to find work again.

They want to make us so desperate that we have no choice but to surrender once and for all.

This has nothing to do with health.

**They want to break our wills, break our spirits, and send a loud, clear message that they have control over our lives.**

And if we let them win, there's no turning back.

[**Which is why I hope you'll fight along with me with a generous gift of $25 or more today to help fund lawsuits to fight vaccine mandates and preserve medical freedom.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59082214:J5IhG1ENm:m:1:3253819041:C8462AE7AFBBD9D8C3661C6BB353B324:r)

**I don't know if you're vaccinated - and I don't want to know.**

It's none of my business.

I want to know if you'll stand up for your countrymen when it matters most.

Thank you for your consideration.

Sincerely,

Christina Davidson
Paramedic & Firefighter
Proud Supporter, Health Freedom Defense Fund

| [ DONATE ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59082214:J5IhG1ENm:m:1:3253819041:C8462AE7AFBBD9D8C3661C6BB353B324:r)
---

---

| Paid for by Health Freedom Defense Fund
[www.healthfreedomdefense.org](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59082215:J5IhG1ENm:m:1:3253819041:C8462AE7AFBBD9D8C3661C6BB353B324:r)

---

Team, Before we log off for the holidays and begin a new year together, we want to make sure you have one more opportunity to share your thoughts and concerns with Wes as the campaign approaches the new year. As we close the book on 2021 and enter 2022, we know there’s a lot to think about: the continued spread of COVID-19, access to good-paying jobs, affordable healthcare, and high-quality education for our kids, the growingly present impacts of climate change, and so much more. **Now that Wes has chosen Aruna as his running mate and we’re gearing up our campaign for the upcoming election year, he wants to know your top priorities for 2022.** **[Take a minute to complete our end-of-year survey now to share your thoughts with Wes →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39928426/322048450/-2037132892?refcode=fl_email_su_20211222survey_wmfm_60da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNWIwMDU0OS0zNTYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0bF0z-7wim3ZlSOiVOYQU2a4Oo8vyXyDvrsjwXMJ-Dk=&emci=13b00549-3563-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=15b00549-3563-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=24635485)** | [TAKE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39928427/322048452/-2037132892?refcode=fl_email_su_20211222survey_wmfm_60da_xx_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNWIwMDU0OS0zNTYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0bF0z-7wim3ZlSOiVOYQU2a4Oo8vyXyDvrsjwXMJ-Dk=&emci=13b00549-3563-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=15b00549-3563-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=24635485)

Friend, the bipartisan investigation into the Jan. 6 riot is uncovering new evidence against Donald Trump every day, **and I need you to hear the most important details as this case rapidly evolves:**
In his final days in power, Donald Trump repeatedly tried to pressure the Department of Justice into overturning the Georgia election results, and he even asked his advisors about **sending the military to the states he lost** in an attempt to stay in power.
These plans didn't come to fruition. Instead, his son's girlfriend raised $3 MILLION for the Jan. 6 rally, where Trump told a group of agitated protesters that, **"If you don't fight like hell, you're not going to have a country anymore." **
We all know what happened next, friend. I'll never forget the moment that Trump supporters stormed the U.S. Capitol and fought their way through Capitol police officers. **I was in the House gallery, ducking for cover and fearing for my life.**
This is America, friend, and in this country, we abide by peaceful transitions of power – no matter who wins. No one is above the law, which is exactly what I said when I managed Trump's first impeachment trial. **But some far-right Republicans, including Marco Rubio, are trying to let Trump off the hook.**
**Trump loyalists like Rubio want you to forget that Trump nearly destroyed our democracy. They want you to forget that Trump bribed a foreign official, pressuring him to interfere in the 2020 election.** And, they want you to let Trump run for president all over again. **I won't let that happen, friend, but I can't overcome Trumpism alone, so I have to ask you:**
**Do you believe that Donald Trump and his associates should be held accountable for their misdeeds?**

name: Matt Castelli
subject: Hope for the New Year
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Castelli for Congress
body:
Over the past few months, I have traveled the 21st district, meeting with parents, veterans, kids, teachers, and farmers and learning a bit of each of your stories.
| **Hope for the New Year**

Over the past few months, I have traveled the 21st district, meeting with parents, veterans, kids, teachers, and farmers and learning a bit of each of your stories.

2021 has been a tough year for everyone. Over 800,000 Americans have died of COVID-19, small businesses haven’t returned to pre-pandemic operations, children are struggling to recover lost time in the classroom, the cost of basic needs has skyrocketed, and everything seems just, well, harder.

The holidays are already an especially hard time of year for many people, despite the curated images we might see on social media.

For every picture of a big family enjoying a big feast, there are tenfold as many dinner tables with a newly empty seat, a veteran wondering where their next meal will come from, or grandparents celebrating alone amid COVID fears. For every cute couple in front of a tree, there’s a recent divorcee unable to spend the holidays with the inlaws they came to love as family and a person without a partner to kiss at the dawn of a new year. For every video of young children opening presents there are couples struggling to have children of their own.

While the “magic” of this holiday season may seem elusive for many of us, I am still filled with tremendous hope.

I’m hopeful because I have seen how our community of friends and neighbors have braved this year of hardship with fellowship, with resilience, and with love.

I hope you will join me over these holidays in slowing down, honoring the company of our loved ones and the lives of those we must celebrate without, and spreading the greatest gift we can give — love — to friends, neighbors, and strangers alike.

I look forward to hearing from you in 2022 — your hopes, your fears, your dreams, and your worries.

Until then, wishing each of you the gift of love during these holidays and the hope for what all of our tomorrows might bring.

Matt Castelli

---

name: Mike Gibbons
subject: Fixing the Mess in Washington
body:
At this point, the U.S. dollar is backed by nothing and is going to be worth nothing
| | | |
---
[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sN_tZXFQR82AmadRb20Bkm_AaCxE2tQepTd6zlOYtreN7i9NELPDaCpY3tFAKNVOSw8Rd8pX19rkOv1TkBI60BGQKXOMoYyZnxhGX-Oyn9tqZ63rngpyPlBQpNTmtiM6-UsB4SvJH_CkSD-xcJEqHVCMc8JuXU0sY1Cv-3UtywLzBBBlWvXPIw==&c=yC--d2Dh9nGXMgDNWNcBkrqfiYPtTxdBoYzYegE5rkeCHDP5_3qYqA==&ch=n79gO-sHq0E-t7ewSD4ff43pQ6Ef2qbm43NAH1qBQED7i6xEXnQINg==)
---
Hi Peter,
At this point, the U.S. dollar is backed by nothing and is going to be worth nothing. Still, the Democrats want to ruin it further with more reckless spending.
With high gas prices and families struggling to pay for Christmas celebrations, it is clear Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer do not care about fixing the actual problems with our economy.
We need people in office who understand how to get our economy back on track- which is why I am running for Senate.

name: Valerie Foushee
subject: what my parents taught me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Foushee for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/qfi4G-TGIa35bUZ6QH6dMbnO_u1vXy1MAVoig4iy61c=/0TCsNHf81UA4Y2hfd-z_IHjBOmebN5hgBu48_WK7jQA=?refcode=BLU-VFC-20211222-1-EM)
---
| Peter,

Growing up, I watched my parents do everything possible to support my five siblings and me. They each worked 2 or 3 jobs at a time, doing whatever they could to keep our family afloat.

Through my parents, I saw firsthand what hard work looked like. It's why I started working for the Neighborhood Youth Corps when I was 14, which helped underprivileged children find employment. I also worked at the UNC hospitals, and as a church secretary so I could afford to go to college and obtain the education and opportunities that my parents could not.

**Thanks to the sacrifice of my parents and the work ethic they instilled in me, I was empowered to serve my community and work to make a considerable difference in public schools, policing, and state laws.

[_I want to keep working hard in Congress as NC-06 's next representative because we must continue making progress for the people._](https://act.myngp.com/el/qfi4G-TGIa35bUZ6QH6dMbnO_u1vXy1MAVoig4iy61c=/0TCsNHf81UA4Y2hfd-z_IHjBOmebN5hgBu48_WK7jQA=?refcode=BLU-VFC-20211222-1-EM)**
---
| [SUPPORT VALERIE ](https://act.myngp.com/el/qfi4G-TGIa35bUZ6QH6dMbnO_u1vXy1MAVoig4iy61c=/0TCsNHf81UA4Y2hfd-z_IHjBOmebN5hgBu48_WK7jQA=?refcode=BLU-VFC-20211222-1-EM)
---
I've done volunteer work since I was a little girl. From being engaged in the Head Start Program to volunteering in my sons' schools, **I wanted to see my communities constantly strive for progress.**

I have always wanted to give families in our community more opportunities than I had growing up here in Orange County. And in Congress, I'll have an even more significant opportunity to get things done.

[_**So, if you believe in a leader who works hard and has a bold vision to improve our communities, please contribute to our grassroots campaign today. ->**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/qfi4G-TGIa35bUZ6QH6dMbnO_u1vXy1MAVoig4iy61c=/0TCsNHf81UA4Y2hfd-z_IHjBOmebN5hgBu48_WK7jQA=?refcode=BLU-VFC-20211222-1-EM)

Amiguis, Look, we’re going to be real with you for a second here: what we’re seeing nationally, the biggest impediment to progress is **not** the Republican Party. It’s conservatism. Yes, even some Democrats in office right now might as well switch their party lines (including Lou Correa). [**If you agree we need more progressives in office to push out conservatism, can you make a contribution to our campaign today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39931430/322062165/938621104?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211222conservadems_O4Cweb_full_SLB_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MGQ2Mjc1ZC0zOTYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pzy4mwM_kculsVwMAib8ZJyIUKgPUxXGbTU9Eyh39D4=) I mean, for starters, take a look at the Build Back Better Act. It’s a much watered down version of what we could have had because conservative Democrats stonewalled every chance they had. Or how conservative Democrats do the absolute most with halting any sort of progress when it comes to healthcare. Looking at Lou Correa, again, he’s blocked efforts in the past to lower prescription drug costs (that shouldn’t come as a surprise since he takes money from Big Pharma). We don’t have the luxury of being polite. Mike is not here to play patty-cake with Democrats or Republicans. When it comes to fighting for Medicare For All, a Green New Deal and justice for our undocumented neighbors, we’re going to fight like hell. At the end of the day, we only have each other. That’s why we need your support today, amiguis. We’re going up against an incumbent who has deep pockets from corporate PAC money — **we don’t have the luxury to sell out.** [**Can you make a $10 or $25 donation to our campaign before the day ends?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39931431/322062166/938621104?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211222conservadems_O4Cweb_full_SLB_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MGQ2Mjc1ZC0zOTYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pzy4mwM_kculsVwMAib8ZJyIUKgPUxXGbTU9Eyh39D4=) | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39931433/322062168/938621104?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211222conservadems_O4Cweb_full_SLB_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MGQ2Mjc1ZC0zOTYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pzy4mwM_kculsVwMAib8ZJyIUKgPUxXGbTU9Eyh39D4=)

clean_body: | = Amiguis, Look, we’re going to be real with you for a second here: what we’re seeing nationally, the biggest impediment to progress is not the Republican Party. It’s conservatism. Yes, even some Democrats in office right now might as well switch their party lines (including Lou Correa). = I mean, for starters, take a look at the Build Back Better Act. It’s a much watered down version of what we could have had because conservative Democrats stonewalled every chance they had. Or how conservative Democrats do the absolute most with halting any sort of progress when it comes to healthcare. Looking at Lou Correa, again, he’s blocked efforts in the past to lower prescription drug costs (that shouldn’t come as a surprise since he takes money from Big Pharma). We don’t have the luxury of being polite. Mike is not here to play patty-cake with Democrats or Republicans. When it comes to fighting for Medicare For All, a Green New Deal and justice for our undocumented neighbors, we’re going to fight like hell. At the end of the day, we only have each other. That’s why we need your support today, amiguis. We’re going up against an incumbent who has deep pockets from corporate PAC money — we don’t have the luxury to sell out. = | = ¡Ándele! — Team Ortega | Our campaign is fueled by every day people like you chipping in whatever they can. Can you give $25 or whatever you can right now to help us stay on track on our December campaign costs? = | = | Paid for by Ortega For Congress Ortega For Congress PO Box 1271 Anaheim, CA 92815 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .
