name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: Fwd: Women's healthcare on the line
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
I had to make sure you didn't miss this, Friend: With the precedent of _Roe v. Wade_ being challenged at the Supreme Court, we are witnessing a modern-day crisis when it comes to the fundamental human rights of women in America. Mere decades ago, it was Republican-appointed Chief Justices and their courts that paved the way for landmark cases that protected civil rights - including the right to choose. Their decisions were rooted in the 14th amendment of our Constitution. But now? Trump-appointed justices are turning their backs on the 14th amendment, signaling that they are prepared to let human rights abuses like Texas' abortion ban stand. **If the Supreme Court is going to fail us, we must look to our co-equal branch of government: Congress.** **The House of Representatives has already passed companion legislation to my bill that would enshrine the right to choose into federal law.[I need top Democrats like YOU to demand the Senate do the same. Please - this is _critical_ - add your name to my petition and urge the Senate to pass the Women's Health Protection Act!](https://petitions.signforgood.com/blumenthal-whpa?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1114-su-nd&redirect=https://surveys.signforgood.com/blumenthal-WHPA-SCOTUS?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1114-su-nd)** Thank you, Dick
---
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Richard Blumenthal**
Date: Mon, Dec 20, 2021
Subject: This is an issue of human rights

[ ](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=JoclxAwvxFkAXUYpg%2BzRglWBD1eTdKKw&url=http%3A%2F%2Frichardblumenthal.com%2F)
Friend,
Once again, the U.S. Supreme Court has let Texas' abortion ban stay in place as it awaits further legal challenges. The conservative majority of the court greenlighted, for now, the most extreme abortion ban in the country - jeopardizing the human rights and safety of women in the second most populous state in America.
We can protect the constitutional right to healthcare - right now, no matter what the courts do - by passing the Women's Health Protection Act in the Senate. That's why I must ask you to again urge the passage of this vital piece of legislation, but before you do, please allow me a moment to explain why your continued activism is so important.
As I've been saying all along, the abortion bans that have sprouted up in states like Texas, Mississippi, and Louisiana aren't just about access to safe and legal abortion care. This extremist lawmaking, mainly from right-wing Republican men, represents successful attempts to violate the fundamental human and civil rights of women.
The Framers of our Constitution - fearful of a too-powerful central government after the tyranny of monarchy - used 10 amendments, the Bill of Rights, to limit the powers of federal government and guarantee freedoms to the states. The horrors of state-based, tyrannical laws, such as the enslavement of Black Americans, led to the 14th Amendment being ratified to override state laws to protect equality and civil liberties.
A century later, under the leadership of Republican-appointed chief justices, it was the 14th Amendment that paved the way for landmark civil rights decisions to end segregation, legalize interracial marriage, protect the right to contraception, and in the case of _Roe v. Wade_ , give women control over their own reproductive health choices.
**But thanks to Donald Trump 's appointment of three Supreme Court justices, the Court is abandoning this doctrine aligned with the 14th Amendment, signaling instead that they will once again allow states to pass laws that trample all over civil rights. **
**It is a disgrace that this is where we find our nation 's highest court, but if Trump justices are likely to dismantle reproductive freedoms, then it is up to Congress to act. [Not after _Roe v. Wade_ has been completely undermined, not weeks or months or years down the road. Congress must act NOW. So please, even if you've done so already, sign on to my new petition demanding the Senate pass the Women's Health Protection Act and enshrine abortion rights into law.](https://petitions.signforgood.com/blumenthal-whpa?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1114-su-nd&redirect=https://surveys.signforgood.com/blumenthal-WHPA-SCOTUS?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1114-su-nd)**
[ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://petitions.signforgood.com/blumenthal-whpa?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1114-su-nd&redirect=https://surveys.signforgood.com/blumenthal-WHPA-SCOTUS?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1114-su-nd)
For the rights of women in Texas and of everywhere in America, we must take action before it's too late. Thank you for doing your part.
Dick
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Blumenthal for Connecticut email list, please click here.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=aldjkT1dUzQZAE7x3krxyVWBD1eTdKKw&url=http%3A%2F%2Faction.richardblumenthal.com%2Fp%2Fsalsa%2Fsupporter%2Funsubscribe%2Fpublic%2Findex.sjs%3Funsubscribe_page_KEY%3D550%26Email%3D%5B%5BEmail%5D%5D%26email_blast_KEY%3D%5B%5Bemail_blast_KEY%5D%5D)
Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut

[](http://www.salsalabs.com/?email)

name: Team Maggie
subject: big public-facing deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |
---
Team – It’s clearer than ever exactly how precarious Democrats’ Senate majority is. Losing just ONE seat means handing control to Mitch McConnell... A McConnell majority would:
* Oppose climate change protections, block paid family leave, and kiss voting rights goodbye.
* All but guarantee another far-right extremist is nominated to the Supreme Court, cementing a conservative majority for generations to come.

New Hampshire is a deep purple state, and pundits say that Senator Maggie Hassan is one of the most vulnerable Democrats in the country. **Losing this race means losing Democrats' majority.** Winning requires getting ads on the air and talking to voters in all corners of the state. Right now, we’re short of the budget we need to do that. **[Please donate $5 or as much as you possibly can to protect New Hampshire’s vulnerable Senate seat. name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: VERY Important Update From Jackson Lahmeyer
body:
There Is So Much To Do But What Am I Going To Do? 7 months ago, I launched my bid for the United States Senate in Oklahoma with the backing of Genera
| | [](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=1947206.1160.1.40ba809fb66c7f6dba11e2f210dde272) |
---
## There Is So Much To Do But What Am I Going To Do?
---
7 months ago, I launched my bid for the United States Senate in Oklahoma with the backing of **General Michael Flynn**. I've never ran for office before, but the FAVOR of the Lord has been upon our efforts. Since launching this great campaign (which has truly become a movement) many other great leaders have joined in on the fight by endorsing me: **Sebastian Gorka, Roger Stone, Mike Lindell, Senator Wendy Rogers, Pastor Greg Locke and OKGOP Chairman John Bennett** as well as many others. We have had _over 6000 individuals donate to the campaign_ as well. With this type of momentum, I have had CNN, the Washington Post, the New York Times and MSNBC all do _trash_ hit pieces on me. This means we are over the target. **The US Senate race in Oklahoma has become a national race that people all over the country are watching including President Donald J. Trump.** One of the reasons this race is so crucial is because of _the power one Senator holds._ One Senator can STOP everything happening in DC by the use of the filibuster (which I will utilize). This is one of the reasons that Mitch McConnell, who I will NEVER support, has _earmarked $7 million against me in support of Lankford, who McConnell owns._ A US Senator does not just impact individuals from the state he or she represents but **every single American is impacted by the decisions a US Senator makes** (only 100 Senators). Therefore, I want to layout to you some of the decisions I will make in DC. As I have stated from day 1: _the most important issue we face is Election Integrity._ I have and will continue to be the loudest voice in Oklahoma beating the drum that we need fair & legal elections. This is to be done at the state level (just like ending abortion is to be done at the state level). I was the FIRST person in Oklahoma politics to call for a forensic audit of Oklahoma, particularly in Tulsa, Oklahoma & Cleveland counties. **In DC, I have 3 important objectives to strive for early on:** 1\. I will sponsor legislation that **bans** federal funding to any school district in America that teaches _Critical Race Theory_.
2\. I will sponsor legislation that **bans** _Chinese Nationalists or any other foreign entity from owning American farmland_ (300k+ acres of Oklahoma farmland is currently owned by Red Chinese Nationalists). As well as making it a felony for any American that fronts on behalf of the Chinese Nationalists.
3\. I will do everything I can to have **one of the greatest mass-murderers** in history be held accountable. I believe that _Anthony Fauci needs to be fired, arrested and convicted of crimes against humanity_ for his involvement in the funding of Gain of Function research in the Wuhan Lab where the COVID19 virus was created.
| 1. | I will sponsor legislation that **bans** federal funding to any school district in America that teaches _Critical Race Theory_.
---|---
2. | I will sponsor legislation that **bans** _Chinese Nationalists or any other foreign entity from owning American farmland_ (300k+ acres of Oklahoma farmland is currently owned by Red Chinese Nationalists). As well as making it a felony for any American that fronts on behalf of the Chinese Nationalists.
---|---
3. | I will do everything I can to have **one of the greatest mass-murderers** in history be held accountable. I believe that _Anthony Fauci needs to be fired, arrested and convicted of crimes against humanity_ for his involvement in the funding of Gain of Function research in the Wuhan Lab where the COVID19 virus was created.
---|---
**I also have 3 long-term objectives while in the US Senate:**
1\. _Finish building the border wall and empower border patrol_ to protect our country from the invasion of illegal immigrants.
2\. _Address the National Debt and rate of inflation_. Currently, we are on an unsustainable path. We must cut spending, lower taxes and stop printing so much money.
3\. **END CHILD SEX TRAFFICING**. This is one the biggest issues our nation faces yet nobody (Republican or Democrat) wants to acknowledge it. I will make the commitment to shine a light into this area of darkness and hold accountable those that are abusing and often times murdering so many of our children.

name: Andrew Gillum
subject: Sending this email is such an honor
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/12.2021mr [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/12.2021mr]Hi there, Andrew Gillum here.
It’s an honor to be emailing about my dear friend and public servant, Michele Rayner.
Michele is exactly the kind of leader we need in Florida. For years now, elected officials in the Republican party have been moving us backwards, and hard-working Floridians have been forced to pay the price.
I remember when I was running for Governor -- people kept telling us that if we want to win in Florida, we shouldn’t be strong supporters of advancing women’s reproductive rights. That fighting back against the NRA is too dangerous.
But let me tell you this: A true leader will do exactly this -- fight against special interests, and fight for the people and the people only.
Michele is this leader and more, and she’s exactly what we need for Florida’s 13th district. Will you join me in supporting her campaign by chipping in $5 or whatever you can? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/12.2021mr]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.
Express Donate $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/12.2021mr?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=ag] Express Donate $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/12.2021mr?express_lane=true&amount=20&refcode=ag] Express Donate $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/12.2021mr?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=ag] Express Donate $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/12.2021mr?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=ag] Express Donate $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/12.2021mr?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=ag] Another Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/12.2021mr?refcode=ag]When enough of us come together and decide to fight -- decide that enough is enough, and that we’re tired of Republicans holding us back, we can and will be successful.
We can’t have politicians doing the minimum -- we need folks who are willing to push for bold legislation, be a voice for the voiceless, and put people first. And this is exactly what Michele Rayner has done throughout her entire career in public service.
I’m ready to change Florida for the better -- I know you are too. Will you become a part of this grassroots movement and people-powered campaign by donating to Michele’s campaign today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/12.2021mr]
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/12.2021mr]Thanks,
Andrew

body:
|

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39934090/322076176/-325589832?refcode=gra_headerlogo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjE4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0N2ZmMjYzOC00MDYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lo_rRgEY9Ibwfu4meR4ZGcoble0xfDWObewQ9kN0lSc=)

| | Hey everybody, my name is Ian and I’m Charles Graham’s new Finance Director. I’m so happy to be part of this team! I want to take a moment to introduce myself, but I wouldn’t be doing my job if I didn’t first [**ask you to chip in $25 or whatever you can to our end-of-year fundraising goal. Charles has been catching me up to speed, and I know it’s so important that we hit this goal so that we have strong numbers to report come 2022.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39934091/322076177/892043497?refcode=EM_BS_GRA_211222_FR_Ian_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjE4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0N2ZmMjYzOC00MDYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lo_rRgEY9Ibwfu4meR4ZGcoble0xfDWObewQ9kN0lSc=) | | | [Chip in $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39934092/322076178/892043497?refcode=EM_BS_GRA_211222_FR_Ian_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjE4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0N2ZmMjYzOC00MDYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lo_rRgEY9Ibwfu4meR4ZGcoble0xfDWObewQ9kN0lSc=)

Now that that’s out of the way – hello! I’m joining Team Graham as an NC native. I deeply believe in Charles’ platform and his approach to solving problems, so I can’t wait to see him in action.
I have a long history with political campaigns in North Carolina, so I know a thing or two about what it takes to raise the resources necessary to _win_ here.
And Charles is doing everything right — he’s been transparent, honest, and genuine. I know with supporters like you, he can really make history by being the first Native American elected to represent North Carolina in Congress.
[**So, folks, will you help me kick off my first month on the job on a high note by chipping in to help us reach our FEC end-of-year fundraising goal?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39934094/322076180/892043497?refcode=EM_BS_GRA_211222_FR_Ian_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjE4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0N2ZmMjYzOC00MDYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lo_rRgEY9Ibwfu4meR4ZGcoble0xfDWObewQ9kN0lSc=)

Peter, Thanks again for joining our team here at Stop Stacey. We are deeply committed to ending Stacey Abrams' reign of power both here in Georgia, and across the entire United States. She recently announced that she’s running for governor again, and from her comments in the past, we can rest assured that she views it only as a stepping stone to the presidency. **The thought of Stacey Abrams in the Governor’s Mansion — is a terrifying idea. She has worked so hard already to push her extreme agenda forward, and she’s even had some success already!** In order to STOP her, we want to know what you think is the most alarming aspect of her agenda. Is it her misleading lies about Georgia’s new election laws? Hurting our economy by bullying the MLB All-Star game out of Atlanta? Her desire to stack the Senate and Supreme Court with radical leftists? Something else? **Please take our quick survey and let us know what you think, Peter.**

Peter,

Four years ago today, Trump signed into law – backed by nearly all Republicans and not a single Democratic vote – one of his only legislative accomplishments: to give corporations and the wealthiest Americans one of the biggest tax cuts in modern U.S. history.

**Peter, I'm not celebrating.**

Because while Republicans and CEO billionaires gleefully applauded the 2017 tax cuts that gave even more breaks for the richest 1%, **it has been working class Americans who are forced to foot the bill.**

**[It's simple: when Republicans control Congress, working class Americans pay the price. Chip in $5 to make sure Democrats keep the House in 2022 so I can keep fighting to level the playing field>>> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39934255/322076519/-941512608?refcode=em21_211222_TaxcutAnniversary&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZWZmMjYzOC00MDYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WZ_wKz5KB_CPm4J_uP0gNVBqanyQ1yLCf1vH9uic3co=) ** [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39934256/322076520/-941512608?refcode=em21_211222_TaxcutAnniversary&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZWZmMjYzOC00MDYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WZ_wKz5KB_CPm4J_uP0gNVBqanyQ1yLCf1vH9uic3co=) [DONATE MONTHLY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39934257/322076521/-941512608?refcode=em21_211222_Taxcut Anniversary&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZWZmMjYzOC00MDYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WZ_wKz5KB_CPm4J_uP0gNVBqanyQ1yLCf1vH9uic3co=) Meanwhile, real wages for middle class Americans have barely budged in the last 40 years, **all while the middle class still pays more in taxes than the top 400 richest Americans.**

But that didn't stop Trump and Republicans from slashing Corporate tax rates and taxes on the wealthiest Americans in 2017, and it won't stop them from doing it again if given the opportunity.

It's unconscionable. Our country cannot afford to let Republicans' short-sighted greed destroy our economy and the hope of prosperity for _all_ hard-working Americans.

**Peter, The combined wealth of Jeff Bezos and Elon Musk is now more than the bottom 40% combined** and the top 1% of Americans now own 92% of the wealth in the country.

That's why it's so critical we elect more Democrats to the House and Senate. With your help, we can make the wealthiest corporations and billionaires pay their fair share so we can get to work making healthcare affordable for all, ending childhood poverty, investing in universal pre-k and tuition-free community college, and so much more.

name: George P. Bush
subject: Merry Christmas
body:
Amanda and I want to wish you a very Merry Christmas from our family to
yours. We are so grateful to all those of you who have come beside us this
year in support and have blessed us with your time and friendship.

What a wonderful time of year to come together as a family and celebrate
the birth of Christ.

“For to us a child is born,

to us a son is given,

and the government will be on his shoulders.

And he will be called

Wonderful Counselor, Mighty God,

Everlasting Father, Prince of Peace.”

Isaiah 9:6

I pray that this holiday season is filled with joy and blessings for you
and your family.

Merry Christmas, and God Bless Texas.

George P. Bush

ReplyForward
[image: beacon]

I’m not running for Governor to collect accolades or express my ideas for Maryland’s future on a debate stage. I’m running because I love this state, and I want to see all Marylanders reach their full potential.

The truth is, we are dealing with serious inequities here in Maryland. Families are priced out of housing, ZIP code too often determines destiny in our schools, too many folks are facing astronomical prescription drug costs, and it’s too difficult to receive the benefits workers have sacrificed to earn.

**While politicians talk about these problems, I’ve spent my entire career getting stuff done, expanding opportunity and fighting to advance civil rights.** I’ve delivered for Marylanders as President of the Montgomery County Council and Maryland Labor Secretary, and I’ve fought for justice, equality, and worker’s rights as the head of President Obama’s Civil Rights Division and U.S. Labor Secretary.

**I’ll continue to deliver for Marylanders as Governor, but I need your help to make our shared vision a reality.**

**_[Please donate now to make the next 6 months count, and help me deliver for Marylanders as Governor.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39934672/322078331/1729229235?refcode=bpi-em-20211223-6-months-ND&amount=6&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4M2U3YmVlYS00MDYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GpX3Z8DylPWeibPDOEwyOcR67lnxTkP9y6ymBRS14Bw=)_**

Tom

name: Paul Begala
subject: a crucial battle
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/mzn2PjYc-XInPqz69XFe5KFoy3yup_Pps1lQucYKwgY=/1iYumrBHBiRNuLdi69-UHdeTK9GCwRAOO6vCU-4K7lo=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20211222-1-EM&amount=25)
---
| Peter,

It's Paul Begala.

I've been involved with Democratic politics for decades. After seeing how the governor's race played out in Virginia last month, I can tell you confidently that Republicans are building momentum there and targeting Abigail Spanberger's race.

Here's what else I can say for sure: [_**The best thing you can do to ensure Abigail wins in 2022 is to contribute to her campaign before the final FEC fundraising deadline of the year.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/mzn2PjYc-XInPqz69XFe5KFoy3yup_Pps1lQucYKwgY=/1iYumrBHBiRNuLdi69-UHdeTK9GCwRAOO6vCU-4K7lo=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20211222-1-EM&amount=25)
---
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://act.myngp.com/el/mzn2PjYc-XInPqz69XFe5KFoy3yup_Pps1lQucYKwgY=/1iYumrBHBiRNuLdi69-UHdeTK9GCwRAOO6vCU-4K7lo=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20211222-1-EM&amount=25)
---
Control of the House could very well come down to Abigail's district, and **we need service-minded people like her in Congress.**

Since she flipped VA-07 blue in 2018 for the first time in decades, she's been working around the clock to lower prescription drug costs, increase access to affordable, quality healthcare, and has invested in Virginia's economic future by helping pass the infrastructure package.

What's more, Abigail's commitment to public service can be traced throughout her career - from the CIA to the House - and it's essential we see hard workers like her re-elected to Congress.

Abigail's district is one of the most competitive in the nation, and next year's election is shaping up to be closer than ever. With National Republican and outside spending groups pouring in funds to defeat her, [_**she needs your support to continue delivering for Virginians.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/mzn2PjYc-XInPqz69XFe5KFoy3yup_Pps1lQucYKwgY=/1iYumrBHBiRNuLdi69-UHdeTK9GCwRAOO6vCU-4K7lo=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20211222-1-EM&amount=25)

[_**{{FirstName or 'team'}}, will you contribute $5, $10, or even $50 to support her campaign today?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/mzn2PjYc-XInPqz69XFe5KFoy3yup_Pps1lQucYKwgY=/1iYumrBHBiRNuLdi69-UHdeTK9GCwRAOO6vCU-4K7lo=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20211222-1-EM)

Thank you,

Paul Begala
Democratic Strategist

name: Rushern Baker
subject: Where we are
body:
https://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2]

Friend,
As we begin heading towards the new year, I wanted to take a moment to reflect on this race. Right now it’s wide open. Polling data, including polling from our opponents, shows that we are one of the top two candidates in this race but there are still a lot of undecided voters to win over. We need to keep that in mind as we enter 2022.
I’m thrilled to be on the ticket with Nancy as my running mate. We share a vision for Maryland’s future that we’d be so proud to be a part of. Speaking of Nancy - she was just elected as President of the Corporate Board for the Metropolitan Washington Council of Governments and I wanted to personally and publicly congratulate her! She deserves this and they are lucky to have her.
In other news, we’ve been getting great press on our decision to move the Governor’s office to Baltimore City if elected. It’s time we get to work in our most populous city. If Baltimore thrives, Maryland thrives. Let’s lift our blessed state into a future with equity for ALL Marylanders!
I can’t wait to see what this campaign’s future has in store. So let’s all keep our eye on the prize and win this thing!
http://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2 [http://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2]
Thank you,
http://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2 [http://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2]
Rushern L. Baker, III
https://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2]

Every morning I get an email from ActBlue sharing what was raised online the day before, and I comb through our budget and adjust our spending based on our progress to our online fundraising goal. All of our donations, no matter the size, add up quickly and help me determine what we can and cannot do when building this operation. = | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = = Just a few dollars here, a few dollars there help us spend more on things like running ads, knocking doors, and traveling across the state to meet with voters. Thank you for your contribution! I hope to see your name on my morning ActBlue update tomorrow. Anna Brichacek Campaign Manager, Liz Mathis for Congress = Liz Mathis is a lifelong Iowan, State Senator, and former local news reporter running to represent Iowa's 2nd Congressional District in Congress. = | = | Liz Mathis is running to represent Iowa's 2nd Congressional District. To learn more, please visit | Paid for by Liz Mathis for Congress Liz Mathis for Congress PO Box 2370 Cedar Rapids, IA 52406 United States If you'd only like to receive our most important email updates, you may to request fewer emails from Liz's campaign. If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Jacob Wynn
subject: We can win the future
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Young Politician Committee PAC
body:
We all know what’s been going on since Joe Biden and the radical Democrats took over power in Washington. |
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=692b051751b64483867a350308742393&_e=PYJglwYK_wrusHgBpyAeV8EQ9svpyEhR-YROuj_32R12qjqcUW4OZoQYWxSFD9XG1NYVRbKb4VIFpe6QBaBnhhZUwciFAAQYYjoQmNSaRnU4R3aldLRtJO1j__eUQIAHoVq-5PVkZqNJRItiRm5jZKYlgSPu5ewQ4HwNyZx9bD_FsYB9AK01OZVxkgD2WUALP0uiOdXU1UYum24WtDIWvsT_wxtAAUqgZrBsQQZFg6-2168L8_swaX2N-8SNeH4Gh8RaoT3GgULboPclDVXfCXfGFfFm92HsVC8x2U80jovPgjX7jTcUZe12HhyzjnEE3rJYrYpBqKoiRx6RzfRUSaJegMzKYDsSJnjv5Ke_f-6DDQLRFNc5f774qnwJJGMR_GmNUaJD2-6oj8IjEalqI4vUCJfIX0hHAbims_5Tj_WiIgAuXsVHlv2pa5Yw_0qUsAYYmQ8qtQZ0QskZ4zXT2ab470xwcXAb4gWR_JZrCVg%3D)
---
Fellow American--

We all know what’s been going on since Joe Biden and the radical Democrats took over power in Washington.

Biden, Pelosi, and Schumer have spent over three decades **doing nothing** but making America weaker while forcing their awful agenda on an unwilling America.

Under President Donald Trump, America became energy independent for the first time in decades -- but Biden immediately reversed that and caused skyrocketing prices at the pump for hard working Americans. **We cannot allow this to become the norm.**

[**Help Win the Future >> Support the Young Politician Committee**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=692b051751b64483867a350308742393&_e=PYJglwYK_wrusHgBpyAeV8EQ9svpyEhR-YROuj_32R12qjqcUW4OZoQYWxSFD9XG1NYVRbKb4VIFpe6QBaBnhhZUwciFAAQYYjoQmNSaRnU4R3aldLRtJO1j__eUQIAHoVq-5PVkZqNJRItiRm5jZKYlgSPu5ewQ4HwNyZx9bD_FsYB9AK01OZVxkgD2WUALP0uiOdXU1UYum24WtDIWvsT_wxtAAUqgZrBsQQZFg6-2168L8_swaX2N-8SNeH4Gh8RaoT3GgULboPclDVXfCbanp711_wG4hRuAoKn7TrUqR2dZtWxSRkuG9vPUb-MWiAuwjqrAvVHPc-vqeo9tW1N4f4LyC-wwx4Nzk5LTVSMKlK7EaEBBZX-b2HnNOQda7fnqV87bJNgeAD68Td2ouGpMvF2kYi1B5a9zs38FeIwFddXnFN-IjLKKkrUGiO7A_p-xehJnmGhNSdfzReIz_g6y3bWAYcXZbRJ48ed60xw%3D)
**Biden’s only “success” is forcing Congress to pass a handful of multi-trillion-dollar bills that waste taxpayers’ money on endless giveaways to liberal supporters, raising our national debt to nearly $30 trillion, and driving up inflation and prices on practically everything in America.**

Everything the Democrats stand for is making our future look less and less like the “American Dream” and more like an American nightmare...

Fellow American, the radical Left has gained a lot of ground and are willing to do anything to keep it and reversing their damage to America’s freedom and prosperity won’t happen overnight. clean_body: We all know what’s been going on since Joe Biden and the radical Democrats took over power in Washington. | Fellow American-- We all know what’s been going on since Joe Biden and the radical Democrats took over power in Washington. Biden, Pelosi, and Schumer have spent over three decades doing nothing but making America weaker while forcing their awful agenda on an unwilling America. Under President Donald Trump, America became energy independent for the first time in decades -- but Biden immediately reversed that and caused skyrocketing prices at the pump for hard working Americans. We cannot allow this to become the norm. Biden’s only “success” is forcing Congress to pass a handful of multi-trillion-dollar bills that waste taxpayers’ money on endless giveaways to liberal supporters, raising our national debt to nearly $30 trillion, and driving up inflation and prices on practically everything in America. Everything the Democrats stand for is making our future look less and less like the “American Dream” and more like an American nightmare... Fellow American, the radical Left has gained a lot of ground and are willing to do anything to keep it and reversing their damage to America’s freedom and prosperity won’t happen overnight. We have to empower the youth of America if we want to stop the Democrats. If we want to have any chance of turning things around for the long term, we have to restore the promise of America’s future. It was liberals who inflicted these dreadful policies on our country -- and only the leadership, experience, and support of mature conservative patriots will finally counter that damage, Fellow American -- I know it’s a lot to ask, Fellow American, but if we want to make a bold stroke for America’s future then we have to start now. body:
Ally Isom is fighting for the right things, and Utahns are taking note.

| | {First Name},
Ally Isom is fighting for the right things, and Utahns are taking note. In a [new survey](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001o4MuTSu182lN1ZST0tguNhiN3Nx5QjiSPgBjLAw1Twz_JoRoSDGNSehz5FSEq0rHQfqHomjnHgDFTVllp_G5Y-ykxySmVIFVcBBnkHnrjkU5hGnE7DL7Pc0ZDz_moZuioi9o9_lKko5DPhDifh2mRt3lfdF9lvYqK8PAdtwu1EvyF9T06nQbFliylCK1lnOXCv5cPEjTkT5B9JTUCdie_Zl9-bptHGhcHGjSnGTSLZFpaOJEI1-4rpX7YKvw71GOB3aMGXqIIT0=&c=PB9l4LP8CnaMHU6FwjLP5fry86Z-fQvqM5FlXTt6R2rTPBDphyNeoQ==&ch=xDvDaFUYlECC5ZdlaIbEXTJn7jcZqMeyCptPI3zjb4ko0jCU2t2ang==) on 33 potential statewide candidates, Ally was the HIGHEST RANKED U.S. Senate candidate and top three candidate in the state overall among all Utah registered voters, coming in just after our incumbent Governor Spencer Cox. The research noted Ally's potential to make a strong senatorial candidate IF she receives the funds necessary to boost name ID in order to defeat Mike Lee.
Taking on a powerful D.C. incumbent was never going to be easy, but because Ally is fighting for the right things at the right time, our momentum is growing! Ally's notably high favorability ranking in this new poll shows she is the conservative alternative to Lee [who will get the right things done for Utah](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001o4MuTSu182lN1ZST0tguNhiN3Nx5QjiSPgBjLAw1Twz_JoRoSDGNSehz5FSEq0rHQfqHomjnHgDFTVllp_G5Y-ykxySmVIFVcBBnkHnrjkU5hGnE7DL7Pc0ZDz_moZuioi9o9_lKko5DPhDifh2mRt3lfdF9lvYqK8PAdtwu1EvyF9T06nQbFliylCK1lnOXCv5cPEjTkT5B9JTUCdie_Zl9-bptHGhcHGjSnGTSLZFpaOJEI1-4rpX7YKvw71GOB3aMGXqIIT0=&c=PB9l4LP8CnaMHU6FwjLP5fry86Z-fQvqM5FlXTt6R2rTPBDphyNeoQ==&ch=xDvDaFUYlECC5ZdlaIbEXTJn7jcZqMeyCptPI3zjb4ko0jCU2t2ang==).

name: Michelle Lujan Grisham
subject: I need your insight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by New Mexicans for Michelle, John Wertheim, Treasurer
body:
Should the federal government legalize cannabis?
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39937672/322093052/671940327?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1142-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNWQ2MDY0YS00OTYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZlJbvHYOpxNBbvw7Ii4Ey1eWr55-tQaJCnhxklVekBY=&emci=a7f0073d-885f-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=35d6064a-4963-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=24265352)
---
Peter, I look for any chance to build a better, brighter New Mexico. **That’s why I was proud to sign cannabis legislation into law this year.**
Cannabis legalization will open up so many opportunities for New Mexicans. This law will create jobs in our state, generate more revenue for state and local governments and finally end the failed war on drugs – which has disproportionately harmed communities of color.
Legalizing cannabis is a win-win for our state: It allows both communities and individuals to thrive. **But I couldn’t have signed this bold, progressive law without careful deliberation and input from people like you.****** Before signing that bill into law, I convened a bipartisan working group on cannabis, researched legalization in other states and I directly asked supporters like YOU for advice, Peter.
**Now, I’m coming to you for advice again, Peter. Democrats have suggested federally legalizing cannabis throughout the U.S. – and I want to know where you stand. Please, tell me what you think before 11:59 p.m. tonight:**
| | **Should the U.S. federally legalize cannabis?**
---
| | | [YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39937675/322093055/671940327?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1142-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNWQ2MDY0YS00OTYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZlJbvHYOpxNBbvw7Ii4Ey1eWr55-tQaJCnhxklVekBY=&emci=a7f0073d-885f-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=35d6064a-4963-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=24265352)
---
| [NO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39937677/322093057/671940327?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1142-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNWQ2MDY0YS00OTYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZlJbvHYOpxNBbvw7Ii4Ey1eWr55-tQaJCnhxklVekBY=&emci=a7f0073d-885f-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=35d6064a-4963-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=24265352)
---
I’m always looking to the future to expand our bold agenda – and I’m so grateful for your support. Without you, we wouldn’t be able to pass progressive laws like this one.
Thanks for helping New Mexico pave the way toward a better and brighter future.
Michelle Lujan Grisham

| | Peter, We wrote you yesterday about Republican Florida Governor Ron DeSantis' plan “to reestablish a World War II-era civilian military force that he, not the Pentagon, would control,” according to CNN. DeSantis refuses to specify what he will order the force to do aside from “emergency response,” threatening that it will be able to “mobilize very, very quickly.” Remember, Peter, DeSantis recently called for a dedicated police force to “investigate election crimes and fraud,” according to the Associated Press. In reality, this force would disqualify thousands of valid votes from Democratic women over the age of 60 who rely on ballot drop-boxes. That's because Democratic women over 60 are voting in larger numbers than any other demographic in Florida, and now they're rallying behind Val Demings' campaign for Senate. Today we're asking you directly to rush in an urgent donation to help us elect Val Demings to the Senate and shift the political tide against DeSantis' hyper-militarized right-wing authoritarianism by expanding our 50/50 Majority and ending the GOP's partisan filibuster. If you haven't already, can you please rush in $10 to bolster Val Demings and all our brave Democrat challengers & defending incumbents right now? Val Demings was just two points behind in this race until the GOP's on-call millionaire donors cut Rubio's campaign a blank check last month. And today, with control of the Senate, voting rights protections, and abortion rights hanging in the balance, we are still $5,000 of our goal to protect Demings. Without your help, Peter, we'll be forced to leave Val's campaign defenseless, handing DeSantis and Rubio unchecked power to further suppress our votes and militarize our country. Will you take a moment to donate right now and help us give Val the tools to fight back, expand our 50/50 Senate Majority, and end the filibuster to protect our voting rights? **[This can't wait, Peter: Please, rush in $5, $10, $25, or even more right now to bolster campaigns like Val Demings', expand our 50/50 Senate Majority, and finally get this country back on track.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/39937919/322094158/-1699842291?refcode=OUT_20211222_GEN_FDR_A&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE5Y2ZmYmZjLTQ5NjMtZWMxMS05NGY2LTAwNTBmMmU2NWU5YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=_Kicc9jTKcRxT4eCBzI2mV4fge3G5KrkwwWy8NFp8gA=)** | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

In reality, this force would disqualify thousands of valid votes from Democratic women over the age of 60 who rely on ballot drop-boxes. name: Dr. Bob Lorinser
subject: It was a Conservative's dream in 1997 – Now they call it "socialism"?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
Friends , the false labels are worthless. What was once Republican-led dream legislation in 1997 is now mislabeled socialism. Back then, it was passed with overwhelming bipartisan support. **The Child Tax Credit was a Conservative's dream in the '90s, now it's "socialism"?** **_What was once Republican-led dream legislation in 1997 is now mislabeled socialism. Back then, it was passed with overwhelming bipartisan support._** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39937948/322094299/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDQ4OWQ1MS00YTYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JYoxZOkPbLssM0MOs2VEHMhEh7T5IgVvt3Aoqw_0M1s=) **_The Dr. Bob Lorinser for Congress campaign is 100% funded by individual donors. With a deadline in 8 days, Dr. Bob is up against corporate PACS and dark money. We need you. Can you pitch in and make a contribution today?_** [HELP ME SUPPORT WORKING FAMILIES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39937949/322094300/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDQ4OWQ1MS00YTYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JYoxZOkPbLssM0MOs2VEHMhEh7T5IgVvt3Aoqw_0M1s=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39937950/322094301/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDQ4OWQ1MS00YTYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JYoxZOkPbLssM0MOs2VEHMhEh7T5IgVvt3Aoqw_0M1s=) [ON-CLICK IMMEDIATE $29 DONATION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39937951/322094302/1277889215?express_lane=true&amount=29&refcode=express_lane_29&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDQ4OWQ1MS00YTYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JYoxZOkPbLssM0MOs2VEHMhEh7T5IgVvt3Aoqw_0M1s=) Good morning, Friends. Recently, we produced a [**piece outlining the debilitating cost of childcare**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39937952/322094303/-1672207108?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDQ4OWQ1MS00YTYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JYoxZOkPbLssM0MOs2VEHMhEh7T5IgVvt3Aoqw_0M1s=&emci=15cbdcd0-4763-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=04489d51-4a63-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=15167427) for Northern Michigan, UP families. Our district's average cost of childcare is over $700 per child per month – sometimes costing parents half their monthly salary. Several****[**childcare provisions in the Build Back Better (BBB) Framework**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39937953/322094304/396623375?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDQ4OWQ1MS00YTYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JYoxZOkPbLssM0MOs2VEHMhEh7T5IgVvt3Aoqw_0M1s=&emci=15cbdcd0-4763-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=04489d51-4a63-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=15167427) would reduce this burden on families. Unfortunately, there are many misconceptions about the Child Tax Credit. We hope to replace the current hyperbole and divisive political rhetoric as we briefly review its initial purpose and history. **Purpose of the Child Tax Credit (CTC)** The Child Tax Credit (CTC) is a Federal benefit that reduces income tax liability for Americans with children. It was created in 1997 and has expanded several times. The CTC's purpose is to help working families offset the cost of raising children. The program is intended to help low- to middle-income taxpayers, and it's phased out for high-income families. The credit is meant to support working families and ease the tax burden of overwhelmed parents. For the lowest in income bracket, it's a proven way to keep working families off welfare. **History of the CTC** The CTC was started by Republicans in 1997 and met amendments several times over 20 years by **_both_** parties. **The Child Tax Credit was first created in 1997 under Republican-sponsored legislation. President Clinton (D) signed the Taxpayer Relief Act into law.**
* The CTC was established as a **non-refundable $400** credit for children under age 17
* It passed with overwhelmingly bipartisan support in the House and Senate. Northern Michigan and the Upper Peninsula’s Congressman, Rep. Bart Stupak, voted Yea, as did **_every_** Michigan House Republican.
* The debate around it hinged on whether or not to offer it only to income-tax payers or to payroll tax-payers as well, the latter referring to the working poor.

**The program was amended in 2001 in the passage of the Economic Growth and Tax Relief Reconciliation Act signed into law by President George W. Bush (R).**
* The credit increased the amount of the credit to **$1,000** per child and made it **partially refundable.**
* **Republicans** passed it with partisan support (House 230-197 & Senate 62-38).

**The CTC was amended in 2012 in the passage of the 2012 American Taxpayer Relief Act signed into law by President Barack Obama (D).**
* The bill made the **$1,000** per child credit **fully refundable.**
* A **Republican-controlled** House (256-171) and Democratic-controlled Senate (89-8) passed the act.

**The credit was amended in 2017 in the passage of the 2017 Tax Cut and Job Act signed into law by President Trump (R).**
* Congress increased the credit to **$2,000** with a refundable limit of $1,400.
* **Republicans** passed the act with support in both the House (227-205) and Senate (52-49).

**The Child Tax Credit was amended in 2021 in the passage of the American Rescue Plan Act signed into law by President Biden (D).**
* It increased from**$2,000 to $3,600** for those under six and $3,000 for those six to age 17. All working families will get the**full credit** if they make up to $150,000 for a couple or $112,500 for a family with a single parent.
* The bill passed with Democrat support in the House (219-212) and Senate (50-49).

**_Non-Refundable:_**_Limited to only taxes owed._ **_Partially Refundable:_**_If the amount exceeds the owed taxes, a_** _“refund”_** _was given for the additional amount._ **_Fully Refundable:_**_Recipients are likely to be eligible for a refund on it, which would then offset taxes you would have to pay at the end of the financial year_ The latest changes to the CTC found in the American Rescue Plan are only temporary and set to expire at the end of this year. The** Build Back Better** Framework would extend this benefit one additional year, and I support this provision as written. The Child Tax Credit is a relief for families raising children in the current 21st-century economy. Our government recognizes that those who need relief are everyday American people, the middle class, and below. It is right and just. The Center on Budget and Policy Priorities says [**the benefits**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39937954/322094305/-1377341489?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDQ4OWQ1MS00YTYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JYoxZOkPbLssM0MOs2VEHMhEh7T5IgVvt3Aoqw_0M1s=&emci=15cbdcd0-4763-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=04489d51-4a63-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=15167427) of expanding CTC outweigh minor employment effects, stating more than 99% of low- and moderate-income working adults affected by the proposal would remain employed after it takes effect. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39937955/322094333/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDQ4OWQ1MS00YTYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JYoxZOkPbLssM0MOs2VEHMhEh7T5IgVvt3Aoqw_0M1s=) Legislators need to ask how we support our families after the CTC expires. A debate based on the facts is critical. The credit is a meaningful way to help families, and its principle (tax-cuts) transcends both parties. If this is not the solution, what’s the better plan? Some prominent members of Congress are calling the Child Tax Credit “socialism,” possibly not knowing its history and falling back on taglines. We must debate this issue by avoiding worthless rhetoric and false labels. I am interested in addressing the issue at hand with a strong understanding of all its complexities. Like many Republicans and Democrats before me,**I support the Child Tax Credit** and what it has done for America and our families. I’m always interested in improvements and new solutions, so when a new plan is worth considering, and when I’m so honored to serve as Northern Michigan and the Upper Peninsula’s next Congressman, I will be at the negotiation table. I will advocate on your behalf and ensure relief continues to support hard-working American families. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39937956/322094334/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDQ4OWQ1MS00YTYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JYoxZOkPbLssM0MOs2VEHMhEh7T5IgVvt3Aoqw_0M1s=) _**The Dr. Bob Lorinser for Congress campaign is 100% funded by individual donors. With a deadline in 8 days Dr. Bob is up against corporate PACS and dark money. We need you. Can you pitch in and make a contribution today?**_ [HELP ME SUPPORT WORKING FAMILIES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39937957/322094335/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDQ4OWQ1MS00YTYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JYoxZOkPbLssM0MOs2VEHMhEh7T5IgVvt3Aoqw_0M1s=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39937958/322094336/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDQ4OWQ1MS00YTYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JYoxZOkPbLssM0MOs2VEHMhEh7T5IgVvt3Aoqw_0M1s=) [ON-CLICK IMMEDIATE $29 DONATION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39937959/322094337/1277889215?express_lane=true&amount=29&refcode=express_lane_29&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDQ4OWQ1MS00YTYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JYoxZOkPbLssM0MOs2VEHMhEh7T5IgVvt3Aoqw_0M1s=) You may [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/15cbdcd0-4763-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b/04489d51-4a63-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDQ4OWQ1MS00YTYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JYoxZOkPbLssM0MOs2VEHMhEh7T5IgVvt3Aoqw_0M1s=&id=116937387). Friend,
If you currently live in AZ-02, today is the last day to sign Kirsten's nominating petition before the new congressional map is approved!

name: Marisa Wood
subject: Why I'm supporting Project Hope.
body:
Did you know that there are a staggering 4,900 homeless youth in LA County alone? |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39938489/322097173/883924314?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDU2OGFjOC00YzYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VqYkyhpFRlbCZeIQvDkb9ocfa2d7Vi5SJOvWcFALQyA=)
Friend,

With the holidays in full swing, I wanted to highlight an incredible organization supporting homeless youth in our community.

Project Hope is dedicated to building homes and communities of support for youth who age out of foster care and end up homeless. This is certainly a big issue here in the Central Valley, and there are a staggering 4,900 homeless youth in Los Angeles County alone. One primary cause of homelessness is the lack of access to educational opportunities, which is why I'm proud to work with Project Hope to help kids earn their GED.

The other day, I hosted a Gingerbread House Building Contest to raise money for their efforts. The results were creative... _and tasty!_
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39938491/322097176/212328181?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDU2OGFjOC00YzYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VqYkyhpFRlbCZeIQvDkb9ocfa2d7Vi5SJOvWcFALQyA=&emci=898c8cc5-3663-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=fd568ac8-4c63-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=21170704)
As many in our community celebrate the holidays, it's important to me that we remember those who are less fortunate and do everything we can to support them. That's part of why I'm running for Congress against Kevin McCarthy, and it's also why I'm asking for your support for Project Hope today:

**[Will you chip in a donation to Project Hope to support homeless youth here in California? Your support will help Project Hope purchase land in order to build a community of 25 sustainable tiny homes to house homeless youth.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39938494/322097179/212328181?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDU2OGFjOC00YzYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VqYkyhpFRlbCZeIQvDkb9ocfa2d7Vi5SJOvWcFALQyA=&emci=898c8cc5-3663-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=fd568ac8-4c63-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=21170704)**

Thanks for your support,

Marisa

Marisa Wood is a public school teacher and Democrat running a historic campaign to unseat GOP Leader Kevin McCarthy in California's 23rd District. 2022 is our best shot in decades to finally defeat McCarthy. Consider supporting Marisa's campaign by [making a grassroots contribution here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39938500/322097186/883924314?refcode=em-footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDU2OGFjOC00YzYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VqYkyhpFRlbCZeIQvDkb9ocfa2d7Vi5SJOvWcFALQyA=) If you'd prefer to send a check, our address is: Marisa Wood for Congress, PO Box 12103, Bakersfield, CA 93389.

We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/898c8cc5-3663-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b/fd568ac8-4c63-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDU2OGFjOC00YzYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VqYkyhpFRlbCZeIQvDkb9ocfa2d7Vi5SJOvWcFALQyA=&id=124172018). |

Friend,

It's that time of the year! End of year fundraising time, of course.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39938589/322097527/1228154474?refcode=em21_211222_eoy1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDhhMmM1YS00ZDYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NT6Z_eyvoEs_Nc1iMFJ-JablO8fIVNn5321WVMedoaw=)

I'm sure you've got an inbox full of candidates asking you to chip in to their campaigns, so I wanted to break down exactly why this deadline is so important for us.

**[But first, I'll ask -- if you're able, please chip in $5 so that I'm able to keep up with the GOP's political fundraising machine>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39938590/322097528/1228154474?refcode=em21_211222_eoy1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDhhMmM1YS00ZDYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NT6Z_eyvoEs_Nc1iMFJ-JablO8fIVNn5321WVMedoaw=)**

2022 is going to be a huge election year for Democrats running for office -- historically, the President's party loses congressional seats during the midterm elections. If that happens, the do-nothing Republicans will continue to stonewall our agenda and refuse to pass policies that will benefit everyday Americans. As we've seen from Bryan Steil's voting record, they're more interested in helping their big-money donors than making our lives easier.

This is a bit of inside baseball, but the next reason is FEC deadlines. After midnight on December 31st, every dollar we raise will be public information -- and you'd better believe our challengers are going to look. I may not be able to compete with Steil's corporate PAC money, but **[with support from our grassroots supporters (that's you!) we'll send a message to Wisconsin Republicans: we're coming for you. $5 will help us take back our House seat.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39938591/322097529/1228154474?refcode=em21_211222_eoy1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDhhMmM1YS00ZDYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NT6Z_eyvoEs_Nc1iMFJ-JablO8fIVNn5321WVMedoaw=)**

If that happens, the do-nothing Republicans will continue to stonewall our agenda and refuse to pass policies that will benefit everyday Americans. As we've seen from Bryan Steil's voting record, they're more interested in helping their big-money donors than making our lives easier. This is a bit of inside baseball, but the next reason is FEC deadlines. After midnight on December 31st, every dollar we raise will be public information -- and you'd better believe our challengers are going to look. I may not be able to compete with Steil's corporate PAC money, but = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = And finally, what we do with the money we raise -- I've been traveling all over southeast Wisconsin talking to voters, and let me tell you, that gas bill has gotten pricey. Later in the year, it'll go to media buys, TV and radio ads, literature to give to voters, yard signs, maybe even a billboard. name: Doug White
subject: This number was shocking to me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Doug White for Congress
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93505/images/White-FullColor-Logo-RGB.jpg]

Friend,
In the two months since I announced my candidacy for Congress, my campaign has received overwhelming support from Central Washington and across the state. While my campaign continues to grow, I want to share some critical information with you about my opponents in this race.
There are a total of 6 Republicans running for this seat right now. T ogether those 6 Republicans have raised $1,218,533 and counting . That represents billionaires, corporations, and special interests trying to make sure they keep this seat in their column. Central Washington can’t afford to let any one of them win this election.
I am the only Democrat in this race and my campaign is only just getting started. Even though we are still in the early stages of the campaign, the end of this month is our campaign’s most important deadline. After December 31st, our campaign will make our first financial report to the Federal Election Committee. Making a strong first showing will be essential to making sure this campaign is competitive and has a chance to win next year.
Our campaign is not relying on corporate donations or special interests like my Republican opponents are. We are relying on grassroots donors like you to help us make history and flip this seat in 2022.
Can you make a donation today to help us reach our end-of-the-month goal? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dougwhiteem]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dougwhiteem [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dougwhiteem]
Your support is greatly appreciated,
Doug White
www.DougWhite4Congress.us [http://www.DougWhite4Congress.us]

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: Patty Murray
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
Giffords PAC just endorsed Senator Patty Murray for reelection.
#
Peter,
There is an epidemic of gun violence in this country. We recently watched in horror as yet another school shooting unfolded before our eyes, this time in Oxford Township, Michigan.
Enough is enough. We need a strong Democratic majority to champion gun safety reform. That’s why it’s so critical that we reelect Democrats like Patty Murray who are leading the fight.
**I’m so proud to announce that Giffords PAC has endorsed Senator Patty Murray for reelection.** From ending the federal funding ban on gun violence research to introducing legislation to limit high capacity magazines, Patty has a strong record on gun safety measures and is working tirelessly to end gun violence. _We need to do everything we can to send her back to the Senate in 2022._
**[Together, we flipped the Senate -- but we need to defend and grow our majority so we can keep making progress in the fight for gun safety. Will you make a $5 donation now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39938785/322098600/-1755198853?refcode=pm_em_211222_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOWNkNzI3YS00ZjYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=p8U1QNQmI1cCYKpLRevd7XWvj5SI-mvJBYm1hPbGPRg=)**
Folks in Washington state and across the country have been desperate for our leaders to take action on gun reform -- but the GOP and the gun lobby have fought to derail Democrats’ efforts.
Now, with a razor-thin Senate majority, we are closer than ever to getting life-saving gun safety measures over the finish line. But we can’t let the GOP win in 2022 and roll back our progress.
**[I’m thrilled to support Patty Murray’s reelection so we can keep a strong advocate for gun safety in the Senate. Are you with me? Contribute $5 to her campaign now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39938786/322098636/-1755198853?refcode=pm_em_211222_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOWNkNzI3YS00ZjYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=p8U1QNQmI1cCYKpLRevd7XWvj5SI-mvJBYm1hPbGPRg=)**
My very best,
Gabby Giffords

clean_body: Giffords PAC just endorsed Senator Patty Murray for reelection. Peter, There is an epidemic of gun violence in this country. We recently watched in horror as yet another school shooting unfolded before our eyes, this time in Oxford Township, Michigan. Enough is enough. We need a strong Democratic majority to champion gun safety reform. That’s why it’s so critical that we reelect Democrats like Patty Murray who are leading the fight. I’m so proud to announce that Giffords PAC has endorsed Senator Patty Murray for reelection. From ending the federal funding ban on gun violence research to introducing legislation to limit high capacity magazines, Patty has a strong record on gun safety measures and is working tirelessly to end gun violence. We need to do everything we can to send her back to the Senate in 2022. = Folks in Washington state and across the country have been desperate for our leaders to take action on gun reform -- but the GOP and the gun lobby have fought to derail Democrats’ efforts. Now, with a razor-thin Senate majority, we are closer than ever to getting life-saving gun safety measures over the finish line. But we can’t let the GOP win in 2022 and roll back our progress. = My very best, Gabby Giffords **= As Washington's senior U.S. Senator, Patty Murray is working to help families, solve problems, and defend our progressive values._ PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY

|

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39939960/322103155/-1576960734?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTQ3NTdmOC01MTYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XTTOi9jyh23BJ8uAxsTZ7JFSiGiwOaHgXYBd0sZovJc=)

Folks --

There's a new Republican candidate joining the Pennsylvania Senate race -- hedge fund millionaire and Connecticut resident David McCormick.

His first order of business as he prepares to enter the race? **Hiring Stephen Miller, Hope Hicks, and other Trump alums to help run his campaign.**

That's right -- **Stephen Miller, the architect of Trump's travel ban, family separations at the border, and so many of the Trump administration's most destructive policies** \-- is coming to Pennsylvania to run a campaign for a millionaire from Connecticut.

**[The entire Trump machine is coming to Pennsylvania — and Conor Lamb is the only candidate in this race who can beat them. | | | The International Center for Nonprofit Law finds that at least _36 states_ have passed anti-protest laws since January 2017 – including laws protecting drivers who _run over_ protesters. [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xvsu9hCVaerzAxagfczWNtR7WNj0Vvrg4HKrNk9USOunoX-04ND2SQFX-pBY04xC8Gfg2oVh9YOk2Q2yQclfg2AFhbCH-FLf3NrbADJsv5ocu3D-N4MeaCsfz3_07xKPnWAz6YlPegdfbvs-kST_cuguIciNAx_rHVe1N7dvE1oHtyLeFYwlTFroD5bor36JmEqTwLMCLESeCYFA8mD4eG9wxE-j1dDGdvwuJ3Sv3qskQjZfeWrWI7RyFq-Hom-fpw11Jtnpt0NT-Th0RIFx3z9XBLAOrRnpEfmgfO_8FwiotL877CbnA6kTLwM8AQcvJbBCZq_JrQV2GmLhnI4Dbb/3i2/-u1pPrZaToqqttATcNp9nA/h0/PYkt5DZYf2SgxVX2sCgs0KqIe8UJ6kLn9YGn7oJpcuA)

Melanie’s primary opponent sponsored a local bill allowing police to _sue_ peaceful protesters for tens of thousands of dollars. His bill would have opened private citizens up to thousands of dollars of liability just for speaking up about police misconduct.
**[Stand up for the First Amendment against a rising authoritarian tide. body:

Capricorns are often defined by their reliability, determination, faithfulness, and consistency – and no one fits this description better than John. [_**So before you sign off for the holidays, I hope you’ll RSVP to join us for this special virtual celebration for John’s 47th birthday.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39940447/322105430/835679108?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZWEwYTMyNC01NDYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XDbwZYekDi7tv2NFfNJn0XS1dmyyb7sdRo5iJ0RKg5M=&emci=62158219-4163-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=4ea0a324-5463-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=24635484)

clean_body: Capricorns are often defined by their reliability, determination, faithfulness, and consistency. | = Hi there Peter, Today marks the official start of Capricorn season, which means John’s birthday is right around the corner. On January 5th, John will be turning 47 (hard to believe, I know!), and to celebrate his special day the team and I are throwing him a virtual birthday party. | Capricorns are often defined by their reliability, determination, faithfulness, and consistency – and no one fits this description better than John. Every year the girls and I look forward to celebrating his birthday together, and I am excited to celebrate with you all in the coming new year! | I hope you have a joyous and peaceful holiday and enjoy some time resting and unwinding safely. Thank you for your time and I hope to see you on the 4th, Melissa Steel King * | | = Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer John King for Governor PO Box 8429 Silver Spring, MD 20107 United States | | | ---|---|--- = = If you would like to learn more about John King's historic campaign for Maryland governor, text PROGRESS to 48178 or visit our . body:

| Peter,
---
| Democrats can sense just how powerful the America First wave is going to be in 2022...
They're jumping ship in droves, with top Democrats across the country choosing to retire rather than face the energy and enthusiasm of millions of fed-up Americans.
A whopping 20 of these Democrats and counting are deciding not to run for re-election next year! They know that momentum is on OUR side!
---
| | | [KEEP UP THE MOMENTUM HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mrG6MJ6JXOL8odIBGDH9Dbo7CTnM5BtPxmncXCHHUOv-m8x5FET7K-Stw-Ce-yu4PDsS4TCJ-P8Rn2kHIwF2ZcGP1nsjSRJLKC5nc7O0fsGIf-pedEW-kPIZpJecUdps-Uy4guV0VdytdDOQZhNPOZec0-_IdKhRKs2-edFasfEnjKA3d6OORA==&c=BNrf2dBbZKpyALflT0zK5vbhCQHILlt52ePgFJb7_aJoK1ss_tUCcA==&ch=xM6Z40vb4ujdhgVi_21H_wZ9EvvjHukfWeM4IFIaM1DvRqRe9XQaPA==)

And now the radical Left knows their time is up...
Next year, we're going to win elections across the country. We're going to take back power from the America Last woketopians. We're going to conduct oversight on an administration and Deep State that have become even MORE unaccountable.
[And there's nothing they can do to stop us. ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mrG6MJ6JXOL8odIBGDH9Dbo7CTnM5BtPxmncXCHHUOv-m8x5FET7K-Stw-Ce-yu4PDsS4TCJ-P8Rn2kHIwF2ZcGP1nsjSRJLKC5nc7O0fsGIf-pedEW-kPIZpJecUdps-Uy4guV0VdytdDOQZhNPOZec0-_IdKhRKs2-edFasfEnjKA3d6OORA==&c=BNrf2dBbZKpyALflT0zK5vbhCQHILlt52ePgFJb7_aJoK1ss_tUCcA==&ch=xM6Z40vb4ujdhgVi_21H_wZ9EvvjHukfWeM4IFIaM1DvRqRe9XQaPA==)

name: Wade Herring
subject: Standing up for taxpayers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wade Herring for Congress
body:
Friend–
In most homes December is a time with family, friends, and neighbors.
But Buddy Carter, just this week, is using his time and our tax money to introduce legislation aimed to divide communities and provoke outrage.
I don’t stand for our elected officials making bogus claims about our schools instead of working to actually improve the lives of their constituents.
We need to end this foolishness – it’s an embarrassment to Georgian families who deserve better representation in Washington.
If you would like to join me in standing up against these attacks on our children’s education, please click here to throw in a few dollars to support our campaign today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/herring4congress?refcode=12222021whem]
In Service,
Wade

Contribute Today [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/herring4congress?refcode=12222021whemf]
clean_body: Friend– In most homes December is a time with family, friends, and neighbors. But Buddy Carter, just this week, is using his time and our tax money to introduce legislation aimed to divide communities and provoke outrage. I don’t stand for our elected officials making bogus claims about our schools instead of working to actually improve the lives of their constituents. We need to end this foolishness – it’s an embarrassment to Georgian families who deserve better representation in Washington. If you would like to join me in standing up against these attacks on our children’s education, please click here to throw in a few dollars to support our campaign today. subject: After Rubio's attacks, we're falling short
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
If I don't have the resources to reach Floridians, it could destroy my chances of defeating Marco Rubio
| | |
---
I'm concerned, friend. Marco Rubio's campaign has already unleashed attack ads to defeat me, and they are a total distortion of who I am and what I stand for.

Unfortunately, Republican ads have a habit of resonating with the same voters I need to win. **And if I don't have the resources to reach Floridians, it could destroy my chances of defeating Marco Rubio and defending our Senate majority. **

With polling already showing me two points behind Rubio, I cannot afford to miss my $25,000 midnight fundraising goal – but I'm still falling short as of 5 p.m. My team pulled your supporter record, so please take a look at where things stand:
| | **SUPPORTER RECORD**

name: Team Franchot
subject: Join the team!
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/FAWlogo_Blue%404x.png]Dear Peter,
With 2022 just a few days away, we want to make sure that you have an opportunity to place yourself right in the center of our people-powered movement by volunteering with our campaign.
https://www.franchot.com/action [https://www.franchot.com/action]Peter Franchot is an unprecedented candidate for these unprecedented times, and he has a transformative agenda to change the way that government does business. From building world-class public transit, to achieving statewide 5G, to piloting fully-debt free paths to higher education and more, Peter will focus his brand of proven, honest leadership towards measurably improving our citizens’ quality of life.
Our momentum is building. A recent poll has shown that Peter is leading the rest of the Democratic field by a wide margin, and he’s already won the endorsements of over 100 current and former elected officials representing every one of Maryland’s counties and jurisdictions.
But that still might not be enough in what is shaping up to be Maryland’s most expensive election in state history. To get our people-powered movement to the finish line, we are relying on grassroots supporters like you to help us build our growing coalition of support by reaching out to voters. From knocking on doors, to placing phone calls, to joining us at an event, to sharing updates on social media and more, there are many ways for you to get involved.
Together, we’re going to make history in 2022. Click here to sign up with Team Franchot. [https://www.franchot.com/action]
We hope to see you soon,
Team Franchot
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franchot?refcode=em122221&amount=20.22]By Authority: Friends of Peter Franchot; Tom Gentile, Treasurer
Friends of Peter Franchot
P.O. Box 6648
Annapolis, MD 21401
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/95576eb2-f35c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b/85a5c758-5963-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTgyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NWE1Yzc1OC01OTYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dM6nhwXcWfniacdyAaRZp-2cxUKiZu4qoN3SERdS2YE=&id=136194660 .

body:
What was President Trump’s biggest accomplishment?

| Peter -- as one of President Trump’s _biggest supporters_ , we wanted to give you the chance to share your feedback. **[Which of President Trump’s accomplishments was the most important to you, personally?](https://go.electrepublicans.org/feedback-trump-accomplishments-m012ita49xbmn9ss0qi6?utm_content=text-highlighted&sc=hd&amt1=10&amt2=15&amt3=30&amt4=70&amt5=100&amt6=150&amt7=200&money_bomb=true&recurring=true&deadline=11%3A59+PM+TONIGHT&money_pledge_callout=TRUMP%E2%80%99S+%E2%80%9CTRUTH+SOCIAL%E2%80%9D+IS+COMING%21+He+has+appointed+Devin+Nunes+as+his+new+CEO%2C+and+he%E2%80%99s+readying+for+launch%21+KEEP+THIS+BOX+YELLOW+IF+YOU+PLAN+TO+JOIN+TRUMP%E2%80%99S+SOCIAL+MEDIA.&recurring_callout=%F0%9F%87%BA%F0%9F%87%B8+TRUMP%21+%F0%9F%87%BA%F0%9F%87%B8+TRUMP%21+%F0%9F%87%BA%F0%9F%87%B8+TRUMP%21+President+Trump+has+been+teasing+a+2024+Campaign+for+the+White+House%2C+but+he+won%E2%80%99t+run+unless+Republicans+reclaim+the+Majority%21+Keep+this+box+yellow+to+help+Elect+Republicans+and+DRAFT+TRUMP+in+2024%21&e=1a1fe10c9303676f5a8934f3586944e0&utm_source=electrepublicans&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=768996785169049174&n=1)**

* Enforcing immigration laws to protect American communities and American jobs
* Rebuilding our military, defeating terrorist organizations, and confronting rogue nations
* fighting back against drug addiction and opioid abuse
* something else personally important to you

Peter,

**I'm running for Iowa's Senate seat against GOP Sen. Chuck Grassley – and if we flip this seat blue, Democrats will be practically guaranteed to maintain the Senate majority that supporters like you worked so hard to win last year.** Nobody will work harder than I will to make that happen, but I hope you'll allow me a moment to explain why I need your help tonight.
Sen. Grassley has been in Washington for _seven terms_ – and right now he's never been more vulnerable: His approval ratings are lower than they've been in nearly four _decades,_ and 64% of likely voters don't want to reelect him! This is an unprecedented opportunity for Democrats, but Mitch McConnell's allies have already raised nearly $30 million to take back the Senate and keep vulnerable seats like this red.
**We can win, but only if we build up a powerful grassroots movement that can compete against a seven-term incumbent and Mitch McConnell.[That's why I'm asking 1,347 members of this team – including you, Peter – to become Senate Majority Defenders by making a contribution of $5 or more today. name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: They made this decision because we made the case.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats

We just got some very welcome breaking news. We just got some very welcome breaking news: The Biden-Harris Administration has extended the pause on federal student loan payments until May 1. Now, understand this: They made this decision because a grassroots movement demanded it. They made this decision because people spoke up about what it would mean to have to start making payments again. They made this decision because we made the case. So thank you, thank you, thank you for being in this fight. Raising your voice matters. This is how we make change. And this is how we’re going to take the next step to get the administration to cancel $50,000 of student debt. It would jumpstart our economy, start to close the racial wealth gap, and lift a burden off tens of millions of people who never should have had to take on this much debt to begin with. We’re going to do this — side by side. Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth
| **Our final FEC fundraising deadline is coming up next week. Grassroots donors like you are powering the fight for big, structural change.**

If you can, will you chip in $3 or whatever makes sense right now to help re-elect Elizabeth and put more Warren Democrats in office across the country?
