name: Team ODP
subject: Remember the 2017 tax scam
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
|
Four years ago, Donald Trump and Congressional Republicans rammed the Republican Tax Scam through Congress. This sham tax scam is one of the cornerstones of Trump's presidency -- it gave MASSIVE tax breaks to the wealthy few (including some of Trump's personal friends!) and left the middle class behind.

Team, if we lose the Senate majority in 2022, we lose our chance to pass meaningful tax reform that will actually **help** the middle class. The road to the Senate majority runs right through Ohio, and if we want to see any progress in Congress, we need to make sure we work together to flip Ohio blue in 2022.

**The end of the year is quickly approaching. This is our last chance to put forward a strong fundraising report to build the infrastructure needed to win.**

[**Will you help us flip Ohio blue and elect a senator who will fight for the middle class? Chip in now before the deadline »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39942206/322114080/1492199982?refcode=em21_211222_taxfr_fndd_gq_act___odp_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211222_taxfr_fndd_gq_act___odp_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTk4MjA3NC01YjYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i66HdIb8woxYRPglJ9pzmmGFS2dvvBepF3pO0mD-ovs=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | **[Chip in $5 now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39942208/322114082/1492199982?refcode=em21_211222_taxfr_fndd_gq_act___odp_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211222_taxfr_fndd_gq_act___odp_ettx&utm_medium=email&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTk4MjA3NC01YjYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i66HdIb8woxYRPglJ9pzmmGFS2dvvBepF3pO0mD-ovs=)**

name: Patrick Clark, Keystone Progress
subject: Disappointed? Tell Manchin and Toomey.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www
body:
Dear Friend,

Please contact the offices of Sen. Joe Manchin (WV) — and our own Sen. Pat Toomey, while we're at it — TODAY to tell them we expect them to support Build Back Better. Nearly half the Senate was unified to pass this biggest effort to fight climate change in U.S. history, a massive support system for families and workers — until Sen. Coalbucks threw a hissy fit.

CONTACT THEM HERE. TELL THEM YOU SUPPORT BBB.

Senator Joe Manchin
[https://www.manchin.senate.gov/contact-joe/email-joe]

Senator Pat Toomey
[https://www.toomey.senate.gov/contact/email-senator-toomey]

Manchin continues to rake in millions from carbon, and he’s the BIGGEST threat to our last chance at meaningful climate change legislation. If Manchin and 50 Republican senators - including Toomey from PA - had been in this position back in the 1930s, we'd likely still be in the depths of the Great Depression today.

We strongly support the leadership of President Biden in fighting for his Build Back Better plan. There is no denying the wealth of incredible programs that would directly benefit the working families of PA, West Virginia, and all of Appalachia.

- It creates good jobs in clean energy, bolstering our workforce while fighting climate change.
- It will greatly increase health care coverage.
- BBB will provide home care to elderly people with disabilities and create more affordable housing.
- It offers families much needed support by establishing universal pre-K, halving families' spending on child care, and giving working families up to $300 monthly with the Child Tax Credit. The thing that made Manchin reject BBB? They say he didn't want to support the Child Tax Credit. He didn't trust us to spend money in a way he found appropriate.

Does that make you angry? It makes me furious. That's why I'm writing today.

We need to mobilize around this RIGHT NOW, and continue to mobilize throughout next year. Please donate to support our efforts to empower voters to influence our lawmakers to make decisions that support their constituents' needs! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=122221]

Thank you,

Patrick Clark
Keystone Progress

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=122221 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=122221]

https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/ [https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/]

Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www.kpef.info. Not affiliated with any candidate or candidate's committees.

Keystone Progress
354 S Atlantic Ave
Pittsburgh, PA 15224

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.everyaction.com/unsubscribeUnique/0f05099c-5b63-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b/1305099c-5b63-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkxNjI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjEzMDUwOTljLTViNjMtZWMxMS05NGY2LTAwNTBmMmU2NWU5YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=EeLSRFNpyPG82Q7LVBzzrYFRZH2UURAfAxAZbdSYsYM=&id=111098838 .

Liberty is a right given to us by our creator and guaranteed by our nation's Constitution.
As the Biden Administration's tyrannical vaccine mandate for private employers takes effect, the federal government is telling us that the ruling class delegates our liberty, and we must earn it with compliance.
The radical notion that the government should dictate health decisions for millions of Americans is dangerous, wrong, and unconstitutional.
I am running for congress to take a stand against government overreach and fight for the right to medical freedom for all.
Please JOIN ME! name: Rachel Kliewer
subject: Here’s why I joined Madison’s campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Oklahomans for Madison
body:
| I’ll keep this short. I left my job to work with Madison as she grows her campaign for a united Oklahoma because, yes, I believe in her historic campaign to become the first woman ever elected to the Senate from our state.

But also I’m in this race because I’m disillusioned with the politics as usual that we see from career politicians like James Lankford. He doesn't work for you or me, he works for his own gain.

Equal protection and reproductive rights, paid leave for workers, improving our education system that is ranked _amongst the bottom_ of all states... Lankford doesn’t care if we have any of these basic human rights, but Madison does and she’s ready to fight like hell on our behalf.

**[Her FEC reporting deadline is coming up and it’s a big one. This is our first chance to show everyone the strength of our movement and it will impact our race for all of 2022. Madison must have a good report — will you contribute to her campaign today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39942471/322115392/-1020040127?amount=10&contactdata=lXCxjR2RN3BrQ0FxpRXlvxg7w8Yr8ns8mbjlpMhJdqUnWeAmcm9DBKt8QI9xr%2BIOQPOh3jDYvr86bIv3MhIV3smg%2Ba53iZhQX6MF8stW%2Fsw%3D&refcode2=b279eb8d-5d63-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&refcode=MH_EM_FR_1MO_211222_1_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMjc5ZWI4ZC01ZDYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l1QC3Ol0axzVjmBASH6HWrGgJ7Le_6MKuku3kXkdFZU=)**

Our country is facing major challenges that demand action from servant leaders to work together to build on America’s legacy. Madison is running for Senate to work towards the promise of the American dream and represent Oklahomans who have been left behind by self-serving politicians. I’m Mitch McConnell’s #1 target.
#
With the Senate split 50-50, Mitch McConnell only needs to flip ONE seat to regain control and I’m his #1 target! His GOP allies have already spent more than $3 million on attack ads to defeat me and a top election analyst just downgraded my chances of winning to ‘TOSS-UP’.

I simply can't afford to miss this goal: Senate control hinges on my toss-up race in Nevada and Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight is reporting I’m in severe danger of losing.
The latest polling has me down but I’m still within the margin of error -- that means I can still turn this around if we take action now!
This is a make-or-break moment, and Senator Rosen said I could count on this team to help me out. With the GOP on my heels, your immediate donation could be the difference between winning or losing in Nevada. Please, I'm personally asking you to chip in before midnight.
**[Split $5 or more between my campaign and Jacky Rosen to help me close the polling gap, protect Nevada's critical toss-up seat and defend our Democratic Senate majority!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39943064/322117307/288876117?refcode=jr_em_nd_211222_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Henderson&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDU4ZGM1My02MDYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k6CroRuDtCOKKNAxNWzfAlXmprzLF7SIhKGYScmAfIs=)**
I can't thank you enough for your commitment to defending this seat and our Democratic Senate majority.

Catherine Cortez Masto

We know that $3 doesn’t sound like much, especially compared to our wealthy opponents’ self-funding, but it all adds up fast when everyone chips in.
[So, please. name: =?utf-8?Q?Janice=20McGeachin=20for=20Idaho=20Governor?=
subject: Merry Christmas from the McGeachin for Governor Campaign!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Janice for Idaho, Machele Hamilton Treasurer [unsubscribe](https://janicemcgeachin
body:
Christmas is a wonderful time to reconnect with family and friends, send and receive cards and gifts, and remember the birth of Christ. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/janicemcgeachin/merry-christmas-2021?e=823fa8e224)
---
| | [ ](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=a2a1c8d33b&e=823fa8e224)
---
| Dear Friends,
---
| | Christmas is my favorite time of year. It's a wonderful time to reconnect with family and friends, send and receive cards and gifts, and remember the birth of Christ when he came to save us from our sins. For me, Christmas also represents a time to reflect on the year and to consider the successes, challenges, and learning opportunities we can take with us into the New Year. It's also a good time to count our blessings and give thanks. 2021 has been a difficult year in many ways, the second year in which we have had to contend with lockdowns and mandates imposed across the country by many Democrats and sadly, far too many Republicans. Here in Idaho, we have lost many talented healthcare workers, first responders, scientists, and technicians to vaccine mandates that are forcing Idahoans out of their careers. Last week, Arizona Gov. Doug Ducey issued an executive order that says the state, counties, cities or towns can't mandate the COVID-19 vaccine for employees. Meanwhile in Idaho, with both the Governor and the Legislature failing to act, Boise's Democrat mayor has imposed vaccine mandates on city employees. Despite these ongoing challenges, I am thankful to see courageous conservative leaders across the state stepping up to defend individual Liberty against the purveyors of mandates and other infringements on our personal freedoms. I look forward to 2022 and more opportunities to Make Idaho Free Again. I am also very thankful 2021 is ending with West Virginia Sen. Joe Manchin rejecting Biden's socialist wish list and potentially saving Americans trillions of dollars in higher taxes and increased debt. There has been very little good news coming out of Washington D.C. this year, and seeing Biden's signature legislation imperiled is likely the best news we'll get prior to the midterm election results next November. This Christmas, let's celebrate the liberties that we still enjoy and let's recommit ourselves to the important work of restoring those liberties which have been taken from us. The renowned British statesman Lord Acton once observed that "Liberty ... is itself the highest political end," and this is the attitude we must embrace as we enter into 2022. **From myself, my family, and the McGeachin for Governor Campaign, I wish you all a very Merry Christmas and a Happy New Year!**
---
|
---
| Sincerely,
Janice McGeachin for Idaho Governor
---
| **P.S.** Please [**DONATE**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=2eb1509984&e=823fa8e224) if you are able, [**VISIT OUR CAMPAIGN STORE**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=1ba12c144c&e=823fa8e224) to see our unique merchandise, [**LIKE**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=ae858247f0&e=823fa8e224) and [**FOLLOW**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=33d05eff23&e=823fa8e224) us on social media, and [**VISIT OUR WEBSITE**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=23a3b862fe&e=823fa8e224) to learn about some of the other ways you can get involved with the Janice McGeachin for Idaho Governor Campaign.
---

name: Gabe Vasquez
subject: Help me get on the ballot in 2022!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GABE VASQUEZ FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39943417/322120908/-1265502844?refcode=fl_email_su_20211222holidays_GV_full_SLA_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZDhjMTNmNC02MTYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g-nsNCovTuedjR3YM_54SPypQjonHanAn5g5zvdYEUo=&emci=8f25fdf8-705f-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=dd8c13f4-6163-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=4482565)
---
**** Team, Before I log off to spend time with my family and friends for Christmas, I wanted to reach out one more time to express my thanks for all of your support in 2021, and ask if you can help get me on the ballot in 2022. First, I just want to wish each and every one of you very happy and healthy holidays with your loved ones. This has been a difficult year for many, and I hope you’re able to relax and rejoice with family, friends, and community members as we end the year. Since I announced my campaign for Congress here in New Mexico’s 2nd District last September, I’ve been humbled and honored by the outpouring of support you’ve shown me, whether by coming out to one of our many events across the district, chipping in a grassroots donation, or spreading the word on social media. Now, as we prepare to officially enter the election year, we have a BIG opportunity for you to get more involved in this campaign:**We're collecting signatures right now across the district to get our campaign on the primary ballot.** But we only have until February to get them, so we’re going to need all the help we can get! [**If you’re willing and able to help collect signatures to move our campaign forward in the New Year, sign up to volunteer, and my team will reach out with more details about how you can get involved.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39943420/322120918/-1265502844?refcode=fl_email_su_20211222holidays_GV_full_SLA_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZDhjMTNmNC02MTYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g-nsNCovTuedjR3YM_54SPypQjonHanAn5g5zvdYEUo=&emci=8f25fdf8-705f-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=dd8c13f4-6163-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=4482565) | [VOLUNTEER](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39943423/322120928/-1265502844?refcode=fl_email_su_20211222holidays_GV_full_SLA_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZDhjMTNmNC02MTYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g-nsNCovTuedjR3YM_54SPypQjonHanAn5g5zvdYEUo=&emci=8f25fdf8-705f-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=dd8c13f4-6163-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=4482565)
---
Thank you again for joining me in building this people-powered movement to flip this seat and give NM-02 the leadership we deserve in Congress.
Feliz Navidad and happy holidays!
— Gabe

| Gabe Vasquez is a first-generation American and City Councilor running for Congress to challenge Yvette Herrell and fight for New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District. He's building a people-powered movement to flip this critical House seat from red to blue and take his experience in office, passion for the environment, immigrant and civil rights, and economic justice to Congress for the people of southern New Mexico.
---

clean_body: | ** Team, Before I log off to spend time with my family and friends for Christmas, I wanted to reach out one more time to express my thanks for all of your support in 2021, and ask if you can help get me on the ballot in 2022. First, I just want to wish each and every one of you very happy and healthy holidays with your loved ones. This has been a difficult year for many, and I hope you’re able to relax and rejoice with family, friends, and community members as we end the year. Since I announced my campaign for Congress here in New Mexico’s 2nd District last September, I’ve been humbled and honored by the outpouring of support you’ve shown me, whether by coming out to one of our many events across the district, chipping in a grassroots donation, or spreading the word on social media. Now, as we prepare to officially enter the election year, we have a BIG opportunity for you to get more involved in this campaign:We're collecting signatures right now across the district to get our campaign on the primary ballot.** But we only have until February to get them, so we’re going to need all the help we can get! | Thank you again for joining me in building this people-powered movement to flip this seat and give NM-02 the leadership we deserve in Congress. Feliz Navidad and happy holidays! — Gabe | Gabe Vasquez is a first-generation American and City Councilor running for Congress to challenge Yvette Herrell and fight for New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District. He's building a people-powered movement to flip this critical House seat from red to blue and take his experience in office, passion for the environment, immigrant and civil rights, and economic justice to Congress for the people of southern New Mexico. | = | PAID FOR BY GABE VASQUEZ FOR CONGRESS Gabe Vasquez for Congress Drawer L Mesilla, NM 88046 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: A big problem, friends
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight reports that Republicans are favored to retake the Senate for Mitch McConnell in next year's election
#

Friend, we have a big problem, so I won't sugarcoat it: My campaign fell short of our mid-month fundraising goal last week and now we're behind in a race that experts say could decide Senate control.
Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight reports that Republicans are favored to retake the Senate for Mitch McConnell in next year's election, and it's clear why: They only have to flip one seat – and they’ve made me and Mark Kelly their top targets.
In fact, National Republicans have already started running ads to attack us in Georgia and Arizona. That's why we have to close this budget shortfall immediately – so I have to ask: [**Can you split an urgent contribution of $3 or more right now between my campaign and Mark Kelly’s to help us defend these seats and hold the Senate? Do it before our FEC deadline ends in just a few days.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-warnock-dec21?refcode=em211222-1-15&t=1&refcode2=1834_6688874_B5hAtX&akid=1834%2E6688874%2EB5hAtX)
While Mark and I have spent our time in office fighting to beat this virus, lowering costs for hardworking families, and creating good-paying jobs, Republicans have been dead set on attacking us ahead of the 2022 midterms.
Now their mega donors are funneling millions into dark-money groups, spending whatever it takes to try and flip our seats, retake control of the Senate, and block our agenda at every turn. So we cannot accept this missed fundraising goal – or any missed goals going forward. In a race this important, every single dollar counts.
Every minute we waste not hitting our goal is another minute we give the GOP to mobilize against us. So please, friend, I have to ask: [**Will you split $3 or more right now between my campaign and Mark Kelly’s so we can defend these seats and hold the Senate?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-warnock-dec21?refcode=em211222-1-15&t=2&refcode2=1834_6688874_B5hAtX&akid=1834%2E6688874%2EB5hAtX)
**[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-warnock-dec21?refcode=em211222-1-15&t=3&refcode2=1834_6688874_B5hAtX&akid=1834%2E6688874%2EB5hAtX)**
Thank you so much. It’s not just about how much money we raise before this critical FEC deadline, but how many people are chipping in toward that number.
— Rev. Raphael Warnock

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=4&akid=1834%2E6688874%2EB5hAtX).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

name: Aadland For Colorado
subject: Joe Biden is a failure
body:
Radical Left policies are a disaster
---
| | | | | | Volume 21 | December 22, 2021
---
|
---
| A Word From Erik
---
| | |
---|---
|
Joe Biden and the Washington elite are failing America--and the numbers show it.

In a poll released last week, more than one in two voters disapprove of Biden's handling of the economy, taxes, and crime. Simply put, the Biden administration with their Radical Left policies has been a disaster on all fronts.

The Fox Business poll released Dec. 16 shows that 59% of those polled disapprove of Biden's handling of the economy, while 57% dislike his position on taxes, and 56% think he has mishandled crime. And we are only one year into his administration. Here are some other signs of failure:

* Government spending: 36% approve; 59% disapprove
* Immigration: 36% approve; 59% disapprove
* How things are going in the country: 35% satisfied; 65% not satisfied

Biden and his supporters in the Senate and in Congress are in trouble with the American people and they know it. I will bring solutions to Washington--lower taxes, secure borders, restraints on spending and judicious assistance for our states and local governments to implement judicial reform and refund the police.

Enough is enough. We need new leadership comprised of those who love this country and want to serve it. Help me get our government back on track, and in its rightful, limited place, by donating today.

|
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| Campaign Update
---
| |
---|---
|
Last week I appeared on the Mandy Connell and Peter Boyles shows, spoke at the Liberty First meeting in Colorado Springs, then celebrated the holidays with my campaign staff in downtown Denver.
This week I will be talking with voters and then taking time with my family to enjoy Christmas.

I will stay in touch with you through these emails as we welcome in the New Year. I am deeply grateful for your kind support and contributions. I hope you have a Merry Christmas and a Happy New Year!

I sincerely hope to see you soon on the trail!
| |
---

name: Maggie Hassan HQ
subject: bad news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |
---
We'll be frank: Republicans have spent more money attacking Maggie Hassan than any other Democratic Senator in the country. But last quarter, we didn’t raise as much money as other top Senate campaigns. **This is bad news for our Senate majority.** Maggie won the closest race in the country in 2016 by a margin of just 1,017 votes. If we continue to be outspent, and don’t make up the funds necessary to fight back, we could lose this election – and the Senate. **[Before we go any further, can you rush an emergency donation of $5 so we can fight back against the GOP’s attacks?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39944050/322124948/-913685435?refcode=e20211222_outraised&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDJjOTM4YS02NDYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZBycxFFGwsNsHyz_cxtJeoGVK4DICnKb6LsppNJCldg=)** | | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39944053/322124951/-913685435?refcode=e20211222_outraised&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDJjOTM4YS02NDYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZBycxFFGwsNsHyz_cxtJeoGVK4DICnKb6LsppNJCldg=)

And in one week, we’re closing the books on our biggest fundraising deadline of the campaign. After the FEC quarter ends, all our numbers will go public, and the GOP will see exactly how much we raised – and they’ll decide how much to spend against us.
**If you donate to a campaign today, please make it ours.** We’re falling behind our end-of-year goal, and need to make up the difference ASAP.
**[Rush $5 or whatever you can today. name: Tim Ryan (via Serve America)
subject: re: Joe Manchin
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39944066/322124994/-2057546413?refcode=20211222_SA_TR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYmViNDVhZS02NDYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tUHgWLlII-57TsjslwIkW0Wipn_KovFJ1XHlaiJduWg=) Friend, This is not the news I was hoping for. Senator Joe Manchin just announced he will not vote for the Build Back Better Act, killing any hope for passage of this historic bill. The Build Back Better Act is a lifeline for working families across the country. It will lower prescription drug costs and cap insulin at $35. It will extend the child tax credit, cutting taxes for those who need it and putting money directly in the pockets of parents. And it will ensure corporations and the wealthiest 1% start paying their fair share. **It’s clear a 50-50 tie in the Senate is not good enough. If we want to make progress on the issues that matter, we can’t let a single Senator stand in our way. And Ohio is the best chance we’ve got to expand our majority.** [**Please, split $25 between my campaign and Serve America PAC to help us flip Ohio blue. Political analysts have rated us as one of the most winnable races for Democrats, but only if we have your grassroots support. Let’s turn this anger into energy and energy into action.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39944067/322124996/2038802527?refcode=20211222_SA_TR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYmViNDVhZS02NDYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tUHgWLlII-57TsjslwIkW0Wipn_KovFJ1XHlaiJduWg=) [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39944069/322124997/-2057546413?refcode=20211222_SA_TR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYmViNDVhZS02NDYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tUHgWLlII-57TsjslwIkW0Wipn_KovFJ1XHlaiJduWg=)
Look, I’m not afraid to stand up to my own party and tell them no when I have to. But I’m pissed off that Senator Joe Manchin is refusing to help us get this bill across the finish line. We should be fighting to make working people’s lives easier—not harder. That’s why Americans elected us and it’s time we deliver on our promises. When we win this Senate race, I can assure you I’ll do just that. \-- Tim Ryan
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39944070/322124998/1848844371?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYmViNDVhZS02NDYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tUHgWLlII-57TsjslwIkW0Wipn_KovFJ1XHlaiJduWg=&emci=bbceaa7b-2f63-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=ebeb45ae-6463-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=194769) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39944071/322124999/-1745464800?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYmViNDVhZS02NDYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tUHgWLlII-57TsjslwIkW0Wipn_KovFJ1XHlaiJduWg=&emci=bbceaa7b-2f63-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=ebeb45ae-6463-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=194769) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39944072/322125001/341442065?hl=en&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYmViNDVhZS02NDYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tUHgWLlII-57TsjslwIkW0Wipn_KovFJ1XHlaiJduWg=&emci=bbceaa7b-2f63-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=ebeb45ae-6463-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=194769) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39944073/322125002/-368236352?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYmViNDVhZS02NDYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tUHgWLlII-57TsjslwIkW0Wipn_KovFJ1XHlaiJduWg=&emci=bbceaa7b-2f63-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=ebeb45ae-6463-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=194769)

name: Laura Loomer
subject: He’s a Sitting Duck!
body:
I just got word from a little birdy, that my opponent's fundraising company just DROPPED him because he can't raise enough money!
| | | [](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/vhdja6bw892dpcq892KDYbnolw/3PA763ApbqGCz4K43psx5qiw)
Patriot,

[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/vhdja6bw892dpcq892KDYbnolw/3PA763ApbqGCz4K43psx5qiw) I just got word from a little birdie that my opponent's fundraising company **just DROPPED him because he can 't raise enough money!**

Do-Nothing Daniel Webster is a five-term incumbent, with NO enthusiasm from the voting base, and NO national support from patriots!

**He is a sitting duck, and this is our chance to knock him out!**

[**We can defeat Do-Nothing Dan together if you support my campaign for Congress!**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/vhdja6bw892dpcq892KDYbnolw/3PA763ApbqGCz4K43psx5qiw)

Last quarter, I outraised him by $43,000 - but he's still sitting on a campaign war chest of $313,000!

**It 's a huge gap to cross by the date of the Republican Primary, but we can absolutely do it!**

[**Will you please chip in today?**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/vhdja6bw892dpcq892KDYbnolw/3PA763ApbqGCz4K43psx5qiw)

With only NINE days left until the end of the fundraising quarter, [**I 'm in a rush to raise $23,059 by Midnight on New Year's Eve**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/vhdja6bw892dpcq892KDYbnolw/3PA763ApbqGCz4K43psx5qiw).

If you haven't already done so, [**will you pitch in $20, $50, $100 or more?**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/vhdja6bw892dpcq892KDYbnolw/3PA763ApbqGCz4K43psx5qiw)

Please?

It's funny. The big-name, establishment fundraising firms won't work with me, not because I can't raise money, but because **I 'm a danger to the GOP establishment, and they're following orders to blacklist me**.

So it's just me, and a small team that works so hard, seven days a week to raise the funds that we need for this race - and we rely on you to pull through so we can have a victory in 2022.

As I mentioned, my deadline is nine days away. [**Please donate any amount that you can today, and let 's send a Do-Nothing RINO Republican packing!**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/vhdja6bw892dpcq892KDYbnolw/3PA763ApbqGCz4K43psx5qiw)

Thanks again for all that you do, and [**please, donate today**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/vhdja6bw892dpcq892KDYbnolw/3PA763ApbqGCz4K43psx5qiw).

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

| Winter has officially begun and we are so excited to be quickly approaching 2022!
As Christmas Day nears, I want to sincerely thank you for your support in my U.S. Senate campaign efforts. We have come a long way and are prepared to work hard all season towards a primary victory in May.
***
Our Christmas party in Cleveland this past week had a great turnout and brought in many new supporters. My team was able to share the Gibbons message, connect with new and old friends and gain new volunteers as well. Thanks to all who attended and made the night a huge success.

name: John Fetterman
subject: I am humbly asking for your support for my campaign.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Allow me to speak my truth.
#
I'm coming to you today to personally ask if you'll **[chip in your first $5 to our campaign.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/38860?refcode=em20211222-3920&t=1&akid=3920%2E434096%2EIsZ7bW)** Before I get to that, I'd like to share something with you that I'll admit is a bit unconventional:
**I'm about to tell you why NOT to vote for me.**
[****](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/38860?refcode=em20211222-3920&t=2&akid=3920%2E434096%2EIsZ7bW)
I know this isn't exactly your typical politician's stump speech, but please allow me to speak my truth:
No disrespect – although it may be perceived that way – but if Senators Manchin or Sinema are your ideal senators, then I am *not* your candidate.
If you are looking for a candidate that had to "evolve" on core issues like the $15 minimum wage, then don't vote for me.
If you want a candidate that has outdated views on marijuana, then you and I might have to agree to disagree.
If what you think our democracy needs in this pivotal moment is a candidate who's going to get compliments from Mitch McConnell and his sedition-curious GOP, then I am quite simply not your guy.
Here's the thing, Derek: Right now, some Democrats in the Senate are choosing to stand in the way of bold, transformative, and once-in-a-lifetime legislation. Policies that have the power to lift millions of working people out of poverty, and that actually deliver on President Biden's agenda for American families.
It is my solemn pledge to you that I will not be one of those kinds of Senators. I will *always* act with conviction and vote in favor of progress for the working families of our Commonwealth.
**Derek, if you want a Democrat that you can depend on, that you know is always going to stand up and fight for you, and is actually going to vote like a Democrat, then I am humbly asking for your support in our campaign.**
**[So, if you're still in my corner after reading this note, then I must ask: Will you chip in anything you can today to support our grassroots campaign? I can't get to the Senate on my own — I'm relying on all of yinz to have my back as we fight together to flip this seat blue.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/38860?refcode=em20211222-3920&t=3&akid=3920%2E434096%2EIsZ7bW)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/38860?refcode=em20211222-3920&amounts=5&t=22&akid=3920%2E434096%2EIsZ7bW)**
If you give me your vote now, then you’ll always have mine in the Senate. You will always be able to depend on me to have your back and fight for you when I am in Washington.
Thank you for everything, Derek.
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania
P.S. I know my campaign and I come to you often to ask for your support, and here's the honest reason why: **With more candidates jumping into this race each day, we're gearing up for one of the most competitive — and most expensive — races in Pennsylvania's history.** I've refused to accept a cent of corporate PAC money, so I'm relying on folks like you. **[Will you chip in your first $5 or more to our campaign if you're committed to flipping this seat blue in 2022?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/38860?refcode=em20211222-3920&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=3920%2E434096%2EIsZ7bW)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20211222-3920-footer&t=24&refcode2=3920_434096_IsZ7bW&akid=3920%2E434096%2EIsZ7bW)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=25&akid=3920%2E434096%2EIsZ7bW)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=3920%2E434096%2EIsZ7bW)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Helping others in need
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Schiff for Congress
body:
|
#
Derek, The saying goes, “it’s far better to give than it is to receive.” Every holiday season I take this to heart because there’s so much truth to it. Thanks to the coronavirus vaccine and booster shots, this holiday season brings a bit of normalcy. But our country and the rest of the world are still battling an unprecedented pandemic and its rippling effects on our economy, communities, and overall well-being. Millions of Americans are experiencing the holidays without a family member, friend, or loved one. Many are struggling to put food on the table for themselves and their families. During these difficult times, it’s more important than ever that we come together and support one another. [**That’s why today I’m asking for you to split a contribution to the Los Angeles Regional Food Bank and Project Angel Food. It’s a simple way to give back to our community and help those who might be struggling to make ends meet.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39944138/322125453/-426814437?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_CHA_GEN_AC_20211222_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODYxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTUwYTE1MS02NTYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mUOMQrwTPBm5Kf9JzyWGfgHXwqOm1_f6_ocTC-l9s8Y=) **LA Regional Food Bank** provides meals for those struggling with hunger in our community every day, but especially now as the COVID-19 pandemic is causing unprecedented levels of demand for food assistance across Los Angeles County. For every $100 raised, the LA Regional Food Bank can provide 400 meals. **Project Angel Food** prepares and delivers healthy meals to feed people impacted by serious illness and compromised immune systems — exactly the sort of people at greatest risk from COVID-19. **Please, if you can, make a split donation to the Los Angeles Regional Food Bank and Project Angel Food to help those in need. 100% of your donation goes to them. No one should ever go hungry — period.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation will go through immediately:_ **** | | | **[EXPRESS DONATE $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39944139/322125454/-426814437?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_CHA_GEN_AC_20211222_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODYxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTUwYTE1MS02NTYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mUOMQrwTPBm5Kf9JzyWGfgHXwqOm1_f6_ocTC-l9s8Y=)**

name: Team Kulla
subject: Warm Winter Greetings! 🎄
body:
In this end of the year season of darkness and light, of Christmas and Yule, and of New Years, I hope you find time to rest, to dream, to hunker down ... | | | [](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=61c34490e1daa12194357c9e&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.kullafororegon.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D61bf4d9051cada07877347b4%26ss_email_id%3D61c34490e1daa12194357c9e%26ss_campaign_name%3DWarm%2BWinter%2BGreetings%2521%2B%25F0%259F%258E%2584%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2021-12-22T15%253A30%253A47Z&w=605f96f8c17ee25104ffec43&l=en-US&s=2HKhBVV2Hp6SEFxpqfi8gZejynE%3D)
---
|
## Warm Winter Greetings!
---
---
|
---
| _We’re staying warm with memories of summer fun, like this year’s family paddle from West Salem to Grand Island!_
---
**A message from Casey:** We’ve made it past the longest night and the shortest day (and dang it was dark). Hooray!In this end of the year season of darkness and light, of Christmas and Yule, and of New Years, **I hope you find time to rest, to dream, to hunker down.** The newest variant of COVID is here, and the projections are bleak, so let’s emphasize more of that hunkering down and dreaming. And **take comfort** in knowing that our campaign team is making plans for a big 2022. We are planning four big trips around rural Oregon in January, so if you are outside of the Portland-to-Eugene corridor, stay tuned for a visit from me. If you are in the Willamette Valley, also stay tuned for a visit! But, COVID will be with us, and plans of all kinds are likely to continue changing too. In fact, as we’ve seen time and again, COVID will be with us for the foreseeable future, and that means **we need a Governor who knows public health like a county commissioner does, who reads the science, who supports the scientists,** and who knows how to work with rural and urban Oregonians to keep people safe and healthy, regardless of their views. **I will do it. We will do it.**May your end of the year be bright as the sun returns, ever so slowly.**In peace, Casey ( & all of Team Kulla)**
---
---
|
---
| _May your holidays be filled with wonder!_
---
|
---

This is how we turn Ohio around: | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39944248/322126087/-1406512299?amount=25&refcode=ea.479bf7ef-6563-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ms=ea.479bf7ef-6563-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzliZjdlZi02NTYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_md9VwAuEfuYctIorIFWTRgpmBPQvj1pumRHWtJKJjQ=) Friend, **I’m working to get Ohio out of this rut we’re stuck in — too few jobs, too much debt. Laws that let the ultra-wealthy and corporations get richer while regular Ohioans are struggling to get by.** Our communities are hurting after years of single-party GOP rule. Something’s wrong here — and our people deserve change. You see, I have the big ideas and bold solutions we need to get Ohio back on track. As governor, I’ll legalize marijuana and invest that tax revenue right back into our communities to create new, good-paying jobs. We’ll prioritize advancing clean energy, rebuilding our infrastructure, and expanding high-speed broadband — all while bringing jobs to folks who need them. I've done the math. We can create over 120,000 new jobs in Ohio that pay $60,000 a year. We can fix what is wrong in our state and give our people the opportunity they deserve. It’s our duty. **[It won’t be easy, but I know that we can accomplish anything when we work together. We’re about to hit our end-of-year filing deadline, so we need your support more than ever. John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. It's why he founded Ohio’s Innocence Project back in 2003, why he ran for mayor of Cincinnati — the town where he grew up – and why he and his wife, Dena are raising their son to respect the principles of justice, equality, and compassion. **Now, he's running for governor. He's already led a comeback for Cincinnati, and he's ready to lead a comeback for Ohio, too.**

name: Team Great America
subject: Wish the Trump’s Merry Christmas!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Great America PAC**
body:
Sign your personal Christmas Card for President Trump and Melania Trump and make this holiday season extra special for them. 🎄 This is the last chance to sign your personal card to President Trump! | [](http://links.action.greatamerica4usa.com/u/click?_t=b93111d5faf54ad99e89d66d6b494312&_m=a476c5e4581144728076997474502171&_e=gMyXIi3xnh1meZ7GCnowUTGV-6aGBkQoycY3CqYLW-Uo_28Qqkuoix4w0kEH5HiakMQIm0HoBMo9Nt-lAAQXvT1d0WlkFOgkrUXRK0e7Qxxk7uxAJ4Bt6Cc95342oN_-AveIVTTKpHLJNkA2F0YcF25py-M674lKHxe6_XEjh2jxpRsVoWiAZe_5KwPgcai8oB6LADHwwl5sOkVPlGQCz0VnoRvlrm-XQiZSoSYvdA7EzwK6hN6pZNPHEtaRSiTgUvGXRwTkQ5eKYva84JX-4doK31BU_NMp63XIDHsd_Y7mLJgj0DNuuw7Ozv9KeRqB5LU1cmYpEH2mSNAB5XnvSPhe1Yq06NRQ3owlt97_fEzaLNhq4svCuQLrHnbm07uaRfq-VmbFcHgDpZUSYgBN_w0bo1vFd9AcWdZD3HfrLLmwdirAxvjZClrZK8rB69Ev)
---
Peter,

That’s why Pelosi’s DCCC just announced they’re spending $30 million in key districts like this one to try and win over these voters. We need your help to fight back with outreach efforts of our own that show them the damage the Democrats’ agenda is doing to their communities and our country as a whole. clean_body: | | | | My latest endorsement. | Friend, Did you see the email from Senator Rand Paul the other day? I am so honored to have been endorsed by Senator Paul. He fights for our Constitutional rights, individual liberties and our everyday freedoms. These are the same values that I will bring to Washington. Together, we will stand up to the big-government bureaucrats, the career politicians, and the left-wing radicals that are intent on destroying our Country. Thank you, Harriet Hageman —-- FORWARD MESSAGE —--- Sender : Rand Paul To : Subject : I endorse Harriet Hageman Friend, The past year has shown the true colors of the Democrats and their Washington, D.C. allies. They will do whatever it takes to further Biden’s socialist agenda. And Liz Cheney has shown that she would rather support Biden, Harris, and Pelosi than fight for the people. That is why I am proud to stand with President Trump and endorse Harriet Hageman to serve as Wyoming’s next lone member of Congress. We must stand up to “Republicans” who cave to the masses, and, in Liz Cheney’s case, join forces with Nancy Pelosi. Harriet understands the value of hard work, integrity, self-sufficiency, and honesty. Which is the type of person we need to FIGHT for your freedoms! You know I am not afraid of the tough fights and neither is Harriet. I know that Harriet will fight for our entire Bill of Rights like she’s fought for Wyoming for over 20 years and Harriet understands that must have an America First foreign policy that makes our country safer and more secure. That’s why I’m proud to step up and support Harriet Hageman to be the next Congresswoman from Wyoming. Thank you, Rand Paul | | | |

name: Kat Cammack
subject: FWD: Can you believe it’s almost election year?
body:
Did you catch my team’s message about the upcoming elections?
---
| | | | | | Friend,
Kat here. Did you catch my team's message about the upcoming election year?
We are so close to finally taking back the House and putting an end to the big government madness in Washington, but the fight isn't over yet.
We are a little more than a week away from election year and we need to be pushing on all cylinders. President Biden and Nancy Pelosi suffered some huge losses in 2021, but they're not throwing in the towel yet.
We're not gonna give up either. I have fought hard against the Biden administration on their socialist spending sprees and unconstitutional mandates, but I need your support to keep pace with the Left.
Here is the link to donate to my fight: [https://secure.winred.com/katcammack/fwd-can-you-believe-it-s-almost-election-year](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Rx8NQsjvOw_sX61OAuFHnS5ge1DfKRFuRfUYB3IidPtekxFJlUA9ALEoQEtomJCv-VSQ_H3mQL_6r6zBIL0Cvco9udePBpBxEj10lBRoTNFAz0XoG03FjtZzO9O8SyVIG0YJzjEHT7jN-FNoJkg-zSVwRv4e8NM8Brx_EgniDeQ90ORtoLaiLeTDI4gCJfWFwe_idKkXXeKckvlYRj4RyUKRshE7jr5F&c=dJNIs4LRxJS9R1QxoE_f-h7ANyfxW7Ch9vfPVPaWp3nDSvpn8AohlQ==&ch=Ot7m6XXTGQ629j7tRMwYDrTzp1owc_U4xvknLTnUHpEVGWs6_UhKCg==)
As a Constitutional Conservative and an "America First" Republican, I will continue to stand in the way of the Biden/Pelosi socialist agenda and fight for the American people.
However, I can't do this without the support of patriots like you. Please consider a donation down below to make 2022 the year we flip the House and put America First again.
Again, here is the link to contribute: [https://secure.winred.com/katcammack/fwd-can-you-believe-it-s-almost-election-year](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Rx8NQsjvOw_sX61OAuFHnS5ge1DfKRFuRfUYB3IidPtekxFJlUA9ALEoQEtomJCv-VSQ_H3mQL_6r6zBIL0Cvco9udePBpBxEj10lBRoTNFAz0XoG03FjtZzO9O8SyVIG0YJzjEHT7jN-FNoJkg-zSVwRv4e8NM8Brx_EgniDeQ90ORtoLaiLeTDI4gCJfWFwe_idKkXXeKckvlYRj4RyUKRshE7jr5F&c=dJNIs4LRxJS9R1QxoE_f-h7ANyfxW7Ch9vfPVPaWp3nDSvpn8AohlQ==&ch=Ot7m6XXTGQ629j7tRMwYDrTzp1owc_U4xvknLTnUHpEVGWs6_UhKCg==)

Thanks for joining the fight,
Kat Cammack

| Friend,
We are only a few weeks away until 2022. This is our chance to take back the House and put America back on top.
Nancy Pelosi and President Biden are floundering. They know America has had enough of their corrupt socialist schemes on Capitol Hill, but this doesn't mean they are going to give up. They are calling in their elite mega-donors, begging for MILLIONS of dollars in an attempt to turn America blue permanently.

clean_body: Did you catch my team’s message about the upcoming elections? | | | | | | Friend, Kat here. Did you catch my team's message about the upcoming election year? We are so close to finally taking back the House and putting an end to the big government madness in Washington, but the fight isn't over yet. We are a little more than a week away from election year and we need to be pushing on all cylinders. President Biden and Nancy Pelosi suffered some huge losses in 2021, but they're not throwing in the towel yet. We're not gonna give up either. I have fought hard against the Biden administration on their socialist spending sprees and unconstitutional mandates, but I need your support to keep pace with the Left. Here is the link to donate to my fight: == As a Constitutional Conservative and an "America First" Republican, I will continue to stand in the way of the Biden/Pelosi socialist agenda and fight for the American people. However, I can't do this without the support of patriots like you. Please consider a donation down below to make 2022 the year we flip the House and put America First again. Again, here is the link to contribute: == Thanks for joining the fight, Kat Cammack Sent from my iPhone | \---------Forwarded Message------- From: Team Cammack Date: Sat, December 18, 2021 at 10:10 AM Subject: Can you believe it's almost election year? | Friend, We are only a few weeks away until 2022. This is our chance to take back the House and put America back on top. Nancy Pelosi and President Biden are floundering. They know America has had enough of their corrupt socialist schemes on Capitol Hill, but this doesn't mean they are going to give up. They are calling in their elite mega-donors, begging for MILLIONS of dollars in an attempt to turn America blue permanently. We aren't going to let that happen, and we know you won't either. | | | == | Kat will always fight for our Nation and the US Constitution in the face of tyranny. The Radical Leftist agenda in Washington will end, but we must be united. This is a team effort and there's no one Kat would rather have in her corner than YOU. With your support, Kat can get a head start in front of Nancy to take back the House in 2022. == | | | == | Thanks for your support, Team Cammack | | == | == == == | | Kat for Congress | 5200 NW 43rd Street, Suite 102-180, Gainesville, FL 32606 | | Sent by mailto:info@katforcongress.com

name: HAPPY BIRTHDAY DR. FAUCI (via DCCC)
subject: 🎂 🎂 shh, it’s a surprise 🎂 🎂
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
Sign Dr. Fauci's birthday card! >>
| | | **It 's almost Dr. Anthony Fauci's birthday!!

And here at Democratic HQ, we want to celebrate Dr. Fauci's special day with a card signed by our grassroots supporters -- _but your name 's not on it yet!_

Will you sign his card ASAP so that this year's birthday is his best yet?**

**[https://action.dccc.org/card/fauci-birthday](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/er4dfw-)**
| [SIGN THE CARD: Wish Dr. Anthony Fauci a Happy Birthday >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/aRwEBe4R0ZF_)
---

Dr. Fauci's birthday is just DAYS away!

And after almost two years of Republican attacks on his incredible leadership, we want to show Dr. Fauci how grateful we are for all he's done.

**So we 're calling on 35,000 of our best supporters to sign his birthday card before midnight tonight. Can we count on you?**

[](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/~j-)

Dr. Fauci has worked tirelessly to crush this deadly pandemic, but Republicans have done nothing but attack him.

_Fox News has undermined his science-based leadership with their lies and conspiracy theories.

Governor Ron DeSantis suggested he should be ARRESTED for spreading life-saving information about masks.

And Trump's top crony Steve Bannon even encouraged violence against him._

Despite it all, Dr. Fauci has never stopped fighting to overcome this pandemic and build a safe, healthy future for the American people.****

**So please: Will you help us make Dr. Fauci 's special day INCREDIBLE by signing his card straight away?**
[QUICKLY: Sign Dr. Fauci's birthday card before midnight >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/aRwEBe4R0ZF_)
---

Thank you,

DCCC
---

Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc.org/contact/) | www.dccc.org | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
---

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=46146532&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjE0MjUxMzM5NgS2&l=14280191&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. If you'd like to unsubscribe from DCCC emails, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=46146532&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjE0MjUxMzM5NgS2&l=14280191&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). If you'd like to make an online donation, click [here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dcccactblue?amount=25). Thanks for your support of Democrats!

Contributions or gifts to the DCCC are not tax deductible.

Both of my parents are in unions, my dad is a Teamster, and my mom is SEIU Local 73. **So when I heard that Amazon workers in Cicero, IL were walking out at 4am today to fight for their right to unionize,**[**I knew I had to be there in solidarity.**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/dSCQfi9FLISmU3ZE3bfPhlkzDVz-IUuFiAvYTVo2U-kjMZw1cEJcrBjL1n0B_57PxWkfyWGZwDRLwDMOyeJgUPhnrW9lypPsxqL3RNCTUzpbp5GFuzNp0OBpajgShuNuREjkYiDi-hM02eJxOVUrsswtjR31Zc_CLG6BcuguBcdlFEAzx38MzZlaXStfS-mMWmxmqEeIYH0M9uIsJdUM7--Wa2kVEqXLJpGJID7isgNjpA2LwYzjiajacYKL0qKJN-XdJZb3rFAq0RPrycYHO44fJ6WAgTCHT16PfDH7Z-uvfZ5H6MX5vvF87-QqLEh2Z9VdbqLBqV_OZO4OLycjSTf6sgGRy1kWfQeCZhExF0I/3i2/R5acCpD_Tria4M93xBgB0g/h1/bSdQJTpPlPNHQ9mWTe3wybVUmmQ051tZOns401WDgCE)**** For me the question was not why go, it was why would anyone seeking to represent working class voters in Congress ever consider staying home. Showing up is who I am. Whether it was the fight to oppose Rahm Emanuel's confirmation, standing with youth organizers downtown for International Migrants Day last week, or driving to Cicero at 4am this morning, I will always choose to stand with our community— our district. Period. [**I believe we deserve those same values from our Representative in Congress. Can you donate $15 to help me raise what we need to bring the fight on the ground to the halls of Congress? Together, we can change everything.**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xx70stB4rOWn3H33v0Otzfg_MFm6BR_xj-hzOHTO7k2-8PiLcy6SBXosTgG-1E58GvTddUlYuK3WiK6klXSljLq9gb1XcHMamO_BVF8eWVKKJHeqgWJI1iyXouMY1hIzC5YgZNuA4LYU5WN63QIJsdZSTjl4CmnMOEhSVvi4d2dVwrUnZoproAPxUC0Jkfu1-kW6umnfhKQkgZuHMym7FUB_zsUNzq4r2_QcJTG6iPLY0U06oZ8_fuhaewwqecGKjurg0JAJKvywV6WfnnUDJPeSz7DXJnncfDpcjYl4-xZ5qJ9nkkdkRu3TJZoHwGgrbmQSdKTV3NJyH6ADjUNgK2/3i2/R5acCpD_Tria4M93xBgB0g/h2/Ibd-l4Gp9BdtO_uVTFP62e6s3JuzoVweOvEuNHiVOeU) [Donate](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xx70stB4rOWn3H33v0OtzfwwNRdXAOPsvXvJ4gntgXrKeSRoyi1JHwaUHUrGueouVnGQwEXjPsBc7irKKp-EQOseff0zdVJUcv1LfD5XkGAtRwQElRJsX7ndUdiVYF13mu-34WQuC4s9GjtdcsZ-UFE8L3hn74XOVBGLmQ3vNg6TpTs9-P5Tez-IrWVBqBta109PcMZ4t61F__OQZFhYOVlkI5g64pXMnGbziCw12PK06w1pVI2SywCNcy06_K8ZDLSNYjhu47_A5gFT5V2fXzWRITuE5bNM5r3uSrlqjgeK6adeNtf6mxoGD3rWVoFzDaM2qTcEKJAaiywoTMOrb3/3i2/R5acCpD_Tria4M93xBgB0g/h3/ctlbZVQa2D23u-bsa43iNUXNoEQPCn3SArMpQBAnO-Y) Team, the corporate interests consolidating power on the backs of working class Americans do not sleep. clean_body: Corporate interests don’t sleep so neither do we. | | | Team, Workers fighting in solidarity are my superheroes. Both of my parents are in unions, my dad is a Teamster, and my mom is SEIU Local 73. So when I heard that Amazon workers in Cicero, IL were walking out at 4am today to fight for their right to unionize,**** For me the question was not why go, it was why would anyone seeking to represent working class voters in Congress ever consider staying home. Showing up is who I am. Whether it was the fight to oppose Rahm Emanuel's confirmation, standing with youth organizers downtown for International Migrants Day last week, or driving to Cicero at 4am this morning, I will always choose to stand with our community— our district. Period. Team, the corporate interests consolidating power on the backs of working class Americans do not sleep. Throughout this pandemic, as we have struggled just to get by, and as frontline workers have risked their lives every day, billionaires and their corporations like Amazon have only gotten richer. Our leaders shouldn’t just quietly stand by, but they are, because those same corporations have with year after year. In solidarity, Kina Collins | To give by check: Kina Collins for Congress 901 Lake Street, Unit 4093 Oak Park, IL 60301

body:

| | Dear Friends,

One of my favorite parts of the holiday season is gathering with family for Christmas dinner. **Unfortunately, Initiative Petition 13, the radical proposal to outlaw hunting, fishing, farming, and ranching, would jeopardize the Christmas dinner we all know and love.**

**If you believe in the right to hunt, fish, farm, and ranch like I do, will you please sign my petition to oppose IP 13** and send a message to those who would try to destroy these vital industries in Oregon's economy?
---
| [Sign the Petition!](https://jessicagomezforgovernor.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=38928f39f4567607835360484&id=617612b0fc&e=7e91be8cad "Sign the Petition!")
---
| As a reminder to most Oregonians, you have the ability to donate $50 (or $100 as a couple) to a political campaign and **receive it all back as a tax credit**. In order to fight back against these radical proposals as your governor, we need to show some strong fundraising numbers.

_**Will you chip in $5 or $10, or use your full credit of $50 or $100? Together, we can protect the rights of everyday Oregonians and stop the radical proposal to outlaw hunting, fishing, farming, and ranching.**_

Please donate today!
---
| [Donate $50](https://jessicagomezforgovernor.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=38928f39f4567607835360484&id=a7851688b0&e=7e91be8cad "Donate $50")

---
| Thank you,

Jessica Gomez
Republican for Governor

body:

| Peter,
We're reaching out with a quick finance update from the Lombardo for Governor campaign here in Nevada...
Our end of year target number was set at $10,000 in order to head into Election Year with as much momentum as possible.
So many of you have already stepped up for this fund, proving once again why keeping Nevada safe is very much within our grasp next year! But in order to finalize this end of year strategy, we still need one last push:

name: Tim Ryan
subject: 50 isn’t enough
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=1819%2E3611125%2EMsL8YN ][IMG]

Folks,

I’m pissed off.

A 50-50 Senate isn’t cutting it. If we want to actually get sh*t done, we
need to expand the Democratic Senate majority. And political experts say
Ohio is our best shot.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6364?t=1016&amount=25&akid=1819%2E3611125%2EMsL8YN ]Will you rush $25 or more right now to help us flip Ohio blue and
expand the majority? We’re coming up on our most important deadline of the
year and this is a make-or-break moment for our campaign.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6364?t=1017&amount=25&akid=1819%2E3611125%2EMsL8YN ]Chip in →

Joe Manchin is blocking the Build Back Better Act while the hardworking
people of this country overwhelmingly support this bill.

This legislation will put money in the pockets of our families by
extending the child tax credit, lowering prescription drug costs, creating
universal Pre-K, and rebuilding the middle class.

It’s crystal clear that we can’t pass the bills we need to with a 50-50
Senate split. If we want to make progress, we can’t let a single Senator
have all the power and stand in the way.

We need to expand our Democratic majority now. If you’re going to make a
donation to a Senate campaign today, donate to ours. Here’s why:

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6364?t=1018&amount=25&akid=1819%2E3611125%2EMsL8YN ]Ohio is our best chance at picking up a Democratic Senate seat and
expanding our majority—that’s why the Wall Street Journal called me “the
Democrats’ most important candidate.” Can you chip in $25 to help us flip
this seat blue?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6364?t=1019&amount=25&akid=1819%2E3611125%2EMsL8YN ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6364?t=1020&amount=50&akid=1819%2E3611125%2EMsL8YN ]Donate $50
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6364?t=1021&amount=100&akid=1819%2E3611125%2EMsL8YN ]Donate $100 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6364?t=1022&amount=200&akid=1819%2E3611125%2EMsL8YN ]Donate $200
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6364?t=1023&amount=250&akid=1819%2E3611125%2EMsL8YN ]Donate $250 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6364?t=1008&amount=25&akid=1819%2E3611125%2EMsL8YN ]Other Amount

Working people need a damn break and I’m not giving up on them. When we
expand our majority, I’m going to do everything in my power—even if it
means standing up to my own party—to cut workers in on the deal.

I’m sick and tired of Congress prioritizing the top 1% while hardworking
Ohioans get the short end of the stick. That’s why I’m running for the
Senate.

But we’re up against a ton of GOP mega-donors and billionaire funded super
PACs—the only way we’ll win this is with a surge of grassroots support.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6364?t=1009&amount=25&akid=1819%2E3611125%2EMsL8YN ]Will you chip in what you can so we can expand the Senate majority and
rebuild the middle class? Anything you can give matters in a moment like
this.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6364?t=1010&amount=25&akid=1819%2E3611125%2EMsL8YN ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6364?t=1011&amount=50&akid=1819%2E3611125%2EMsL8YN ]Donate $50
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6364?t=1012&amount=100&akid=1819%2E3611125%2EMsL8YN ]Donate $100 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6364?t=1013&amount=200&akid=1819%2E3611125%2EMsL8YN ]Donate $200
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6364?t=1014&amount=250&akid=1819%2E3611125%2EMsL8YN ]Donate $250 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6364?t=1015&amount=25&akid=1819%2E3611125%2EMsL8YN ]Other Amount

Let’s do this!

—Tim

subject: We haven’t heard from you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Feenstra for Congress
body:
| | |
| [](http://link.email.dynect.net/link.php?DynEngagement=true&H=qJ9juQrYQnx6GiLoZRCFRfx5vplALQMA1LebiplKf4js5R%2BwvBYsJ8nBcFZfED7vTaNfMWgRqS1NxbKvYAYZ037St3tMch85zW%2B7up8TZ0Ds56jpqyucY8ZCzZOQ5ULM&G=0&R=https%3A%2F%2FXIEGG4ZTGNA.hatchbuck.com%2FTrackLinkClick%3FID2%3D4gG3FISjII7h3evcHmpHgczjhkKoL0QRVxGT4Rw-Zd7KCRq2e1nE6WNMEsKmzWV40&I=20211222164851.00000002410f%40mail6-42-ussnn1&X=MHwxMjcwODUwOjIzOTQ1MDA2MzY7MXwxMjcwODUxOjE4ODg5NDQ3Njs%3D&V=3&S=2W2DthS_XnYqMNi7elEDzIaQnFHZ3l1gjThiI8dbUPE)
---
| Friend,
---
| You know the slogan “Feenstra Delivers.” But, to my friend Congressman Randy Feenstra, it’s more than a slogan – it’s how he serves the great people of Iowa. After his first year in Congress, one thing is crystal clear – _he has delivered for Iowa._ **_Randy never missed a vote and ALWAYS voted in person_** **_He visited all 39 counties in the Fourth District – two times this year – carrying on a tradition I started by meeting with Iowans in every county, every year since I was first elected to the U.S. Senate._** **_Randy passed legislation to hold the Chinese Communist Party Accountable_** **_He passed legislation to help our students find apprenticeships here in Iowa_** **_Randy voted 100% pro life and defended our 2nd Amendment rights_** **_He helped secure relief for our farmers recovering from last year’s derecho_** As you can see – Feenstra Delivers for Iowa. Now, it’s time for us to help him close out the year strong. We are less than 2 weeks from Randy’s biggest fundraising deadline of the year – **and we need your help!**
---
| | [Donate](http://link.email.dynect.net/link.php?DynEngagement=true&H=qJ9juQrYQnx6GiLoZRCFRfx5vplALQMA1LebiplKf4js5R%2BwvBYsJ8nBcFZfED7vTaNfMWgRqS1NxbKvYAYZ037St3tMch85zW%2B7up8TZ0Ds56jpqyucY8ZCzZOQ5ULM&G=0&R=https%3A%2F%2FXIEGG4ZTGNA.hatchbuck.com%2FTrackLinkClick%3FID2%3DSzaVZqUDVfc8E8KOV0xIx-VFJZkPnDWijSdiXHPDsoz8RF_JiQ0gDt9mf-M34q6O0&I=20211222164851.00000002410f%40mail6-42-ussnn1&X=MHwxMjcwODUwOjIzOTQ1MDA2MzY7MXwxMjcwODUxOjE4ODg5NDQ3Njs%3D&V=3&S=hv7ZHHhd6XS5OOR3Ryi12RV1eAJ_IeybNq7DUUdpGNo)

clean_body: | | | | | Friend, | You know the slogan “Feenstra Delivers.” But, to my friend Congressman Randy Feenstra, it’s more than a slogan – it’s how he serves the great people of Iowa. After his first year in Congress, one thing is crystal clear – he has delivered for Iowa. Randy never missed a vote and ALWAYS voted in person He visited all 39 counties in the Fourth District – two times this year – carrying on a tradition I started by meeting with Iowans in every county, every year since I was first elected to the U.S. Senate. Randy passed legislation to hold the Chinese Communist Party Accountable He passed legislation to help our students find apprenticeships here in Iowa Randy voted 100% pro life and defended our 2nd Amendment rights He helped secure relief for our farmers recovering from last year’s derecho As you can see – Feenstra Delivers for Iowa. Now, it’s time for us to help him close out the year strong. We are less than 2 weeks from Randy’s biggest fundraising deadline of the year – and we need your help! | | | Iowa is a top battleground for control of the House and Senate – I know this first hand. We need to ensure our strong conservatives have the resources needed to keep Iowa RED. Every dollar counts, | | | Thank you for your continued support! Senator Chuck Grassley | | Paid for by Feenstra for Congress Not interested in email updates from Feenstra For Congress? name: Ron DeSantis
subject: Keep Florida Free
body:
Thank you for supporting our efforts.
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001AheDvre2CCUqj0BSqpaB6tKzwB840JuErLAryRG8NGfe59Ohw3sWp23qm7BnHbxk5EYc5Hz1BI6kktcdxb9EXMesvY7vl0TkgCf2T26RJ4RFLdjU6nx4lkFPBDymTJhTA2OQon4A9iy-LRfFcI4jfgJSEx0JAOTrCiQyNlZ7zuZRyxzXtEKKEqqXql4tToUE&c=tMS-kbUK8cndLXRduufO1_bUzBlrA4dHKJHAehTY_nsSGM_9o-HCFw==&ch=uxDN3GGtsZeckxzN5f0Ua2VONu58kPc5vduxhEoFMy3-bUfvVsVuVg==)

| Dear Peter,
Thank you for supporting our efforts to keep Florida free. By joining our team, you are helping us defend our constitutional republic.
Contrary to "the science," the radical left and the liberal media have been on a crusade to destroy lives by adhering to their political ideology rather than the evidence and truth.
From the onset of this pandemic, I stood STRONG for the people of Florida by rejecting their narrative and holding true to my constitutional oath that preserved limited government and liberty for our residents.
I took hits from every political opportunist and corporate media entity who wanted to use this pandemic to destroy me and create more power for themselves.
In Florida, we lifted people up, we didn't lock people down, and the results speak for themselves...
I encourage you to get involved in this upcoming election. The future of our state and our nation is on the line.
We need to send a message that Florida is free, we're open for business, and our people are happy.
With a resounding victory in 2022, we will reject the left's attempted takeover of America and we will solidify a prosperous future for Florida.
[Please CLICK HERE to see how your support has been essential to our efforts!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001AheDvre2CCUqj0BSqpaB6tKzwB840JuErLAryRG8NGfe59Ohw3sWp5F0RrjjwJs6FpQN8y4MVRn3my9ym34j3SHDCN1b1_JzmuTVsqkxDZALGH0PZd4DnPBSiFu7-LQd9AR7vSVWk2UYTd0r_Xlnp3Nr0lAvVs74&c=tMS-kbUK8cndLXRduufO1_bUzBlrA4dHKJHAehTY_nsSGM_9o-HCFw==&ch=uxDN3GGtsZeckxzN5f0Ua2VONu58kPc5vduxhEoFMy3-bUfvVsVuVg==)
Thank you for your support and just know, I have only begun to fight!
Sincerely,
---

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: This is what we’re up against
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

The entire political establishment has attacked the Squad this year.
Right-wing foreign policy hawks at AIPAC, extremists on Fox News, and
corporate Democrats — they've all targeted the Squad. The political
establishment attacks Cori, Jamaal, AOC, Rashida, Ilhan, and Ayanna
because Justice Democrats threaten the status quo of the powerful, from
D.C. to Wall Street.

We wanted to recap just some of what we’re up against going into an
election year. AIPAC spent much of the year smearing the Squad for
standing up for the lives of Palestinians. AIPAC even ran these
disgusting, misleading Facebook ads:

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/87821?refcode=em20211222-21101&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=21101%2E1203867%2EZFRls7 ]AIPAC Facebook ads calling Ilhan, AOC and Cori liars

One of the despicable ads continued a smear campaign against Ilhan Omar
started by Fox News, the GOP, and the far-right comparing her to
"terrorists."

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/87821?refcode=em20211222-21101&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=21101%2E1203867%2EZFRls7 ]AIPAC Facebook ad comparing Ilhan a terrorist

Fox News targeted the Squad for speaking out when Palestinians were being
displaced and killed by the Israeli government earlier this year.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/87821?refcode=em20211222-21101&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1004&akid=21101%2E1203867%2EZFRls7 ]Fox News graphic with pictures of AOC, Ilhan, Rashida and Ayanna
condemning attacks on Palestinians

This is all to sow hate against the Squad. We can’t stand for it.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/87821?refcode=em20211222-21101&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=21101%2E1203867%2EZFRls7 ]Help Justice Democrats fight back against these awful smear campaigns
by chipping in $3 right now. We expect even more attacks
during 2022, when the Squad faces re-election races.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/87821?refcode=em20211222-21101&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1024&akid=21101%2E1203867%2EZFRls7 ]Contribute $3

Right wing groups were already spending campaign money against the Squad
this year and we know they’ll spend more and more this year trying to tear
down Cori, Jamaal, AOC, Ilhan, Rashida, and Ayanna.

Corporate Democrats will continue their smears too. They want to blame
progressives for everything, even when it’s their own fault — for
listening to Wall Street instead of the people.

Right after Democrats lost elections in Virginia, Corporate Democrats
started blaming progressives for the GOP victory.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/87821?refcode=em20211222-21101&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1025&akid=21101%2E1203867%2EZFRls7 ]Tweet from reporter Heather Cagyle right after the Virginia 2021
election reads 'Dem members are already texting me blaming progressives
for debacle in Virginia'

When corporate Democrats lose, they blame progressives. They did it when
the House majority shrunk after the 2020 election. They’ll do it at every
turn because they will never admit responsibility. Yet, it’s the
Democratic establishment’s failure to deliver for the people that weakens
the party in elections. Corporate Dems listen to corporate lobbyists
instead of the people. This is the problem. NOT progressives advocating

subject: Did you see this?
body:
Albany is getting more and more radical. |

https://secure.winred.com/friends-of-rob-astorino/illegal-immigration-voting-rights?amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mc&utm_campaign=20211222_robastorino_illegal-immigration-voting-rights

Friend,

It’s out of control.

First, it was welfare benefits for non-citizens. Then it was “free” college. Next, it was driver’s licenses. Then $15,000 per non-citizen as part of the “excluded workers fund.”

Then earlier this summer, to deal with the southern border crisis, the Biden administration began secret midnight flights into Westchester County Airport, transporting and resettling thousands of migrants who illegally entered into our country. I broke that story on August 13 and when I demanded answers from our federal, state and local leaders, all they did was shout racism and spew lies.

And now, the New York City Council voted and approved an unconstitutional bill that allows for more than 800,000 non-citizens to register and vote in local elections.

What is the point of citizenship anymore and when does this all end?
If we want to preserve the integrity of our elections, and preserve the rule of law, we need to FIGHT BACK.

As governor, I will welcome immigrants who come into our country and state LAWFULLY. But I will also uphold the rule of law and we will no longer be a sanctuary for those who break our laws.

Please make an urgent donation to help fight back against these continued attacks on the rule of law. >>> (https://secure.winred.com/friends-of-rob-astorino/illegal-immigration-voting-rights?amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mc&utm_campaign=20211222_robastorino_illegal-immigration-voting-rights)

DONATE $100 (https://secure.winred.com/friends-of-rob-astorino/illegal-immigration-voting-rights?amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mc&utm_campaign=20211222_robastorino_illegal-immigration-voting-rights)

MAKE AN URGENT DONATION (https://secure.winred.com/friends-of-rob-astorino/illegal-immigration-voting-rights?utm_medium=email&utm_source=mc&utm_campaign=20211222_robastorino_illegal-immigration-voting-rights)

Thank you,

Rob Astorino
Republican Candidate
Governor of New York

DONATE NOW (https://secure.winred.com/friends-of-rob-astorino/illegal-immigration-voting-rights?amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mc&utm_campaign=20211222_robastorino_illegal-immigration-voting-rights)

============================================================

Rob Astorino is running for governor of New York. A former two-term Westchester County Executive who currently works as a business and media consultant, and serves as an independent director on two company boards. In 2014, Astorino was the Republican nominee for Governor of New York. Astorino stunned everyone by holding Andrew Cuomo to only 54%, the closest election of Cuomo’s career. Astorino is a lifelong resident of Westchester. He and his wife, Sheila, are the parents of three children.

body:
a 39 year high |

| Friend,

Month after month we have watched Bidenflation worsen, and now consumer prices are up 6.8%... They’ve hit a 39 year high!

**We know who is to blame for this desperate economy– _Joe Biden and his army of socialists in congress. _**_ _

As Americans struggle with the devastating impact of Biden’s failed leadership, the Left keeps pushing through policies that only make matters worse for families and small businesses.

[_**It’s time to make America affordable again; donate to Team Curry today and let’s bring the Red Wave and Republican policies to Georgia! >>>**_](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=f3b97c2da8&e=598f6aa24c) **[](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=bf29403bc8&e=598f6aa24c)

Together we can fix what Joe Biden broke.

[_**Can I count on you to chip in $5, $10, or even $25 today to fight against the Radical Socialist policies that are destroying our country? >>>**_](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=cd0720be86&e=598f6aa24c) [****](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=f61bc80264&e=598f6aa24c)

David Curry
