name: Justin Atkins
subject: UPDATE: Student loan payment pause extended until May
body:
| | Friend, **Thanks to pressure from organizers and activists like you, President Biden just extended the student loan payment pause until May 1, 2022!** This extension provides immediate but temporary relief for Americans who are struggling to balance paying for food, housing, and health care alongside their student debt. This is a significant victory for 45 million borrowers around the country,**but we will not rest until President Biden makes this short-term relief permanent by canceling all federal student loan debt.** [Act now: Tell President Biden to take executive action to cancel student loan debt.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/39946341/322135819/2046256699?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzViZTg4Mi03MjYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kpxcdYVF__mfCb2_bnMEJGQpKqnJuhX9j6rqA6jVIkw=&emci=9682f96c-5b63-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=735be882-7263-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=6787172) Together, the NextGen community sent over 12,000 personal letters urging President Biden to use his office to transform our education system and end the student debt crisis. **Though the president hasn’t done nearly enough on student debt, today’s major announcement proves that the Biden-Harris administration is still listening to us.** Nevertheless, this last-minute decision caused unnecessary stress for working families that are already dealing with rising COVID cases and continued economic uncertainty. Though we are relieved to hear this decision, we expect much more from the Biden-Harris administration. [President Biden needs to hear from you: Write to tell him we need full cancelation of federal student loan debt.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/39946342/322135820/-1442141543?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzViZTg4Mi03MjYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kpxcdYVF__mfCb2_bnMEJGQpKqnJuhX9j6rqA6jVIkw=&emci=9682f96c-5b63-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=735be882-7263-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=6787172) **This extension through May gives us even more time to convince President Biden to cancel student debt and implement long-term solutions to fix our education system.** Today’s announcement was an important step, but our work is just getting started! Thank you, Justin Atkins
National Political Manager
NextGen America
---

clean_body: | | Friend, Thanks to pressure from organizers and activists like you, President Biden just extended the student loan payment pause until May 1, 2022! This extension provides immediate but temporary relief for Americans who are struggling to balance paying for food, housing, and health care alongside their student debt. This is a significant victory for 45 million borrowers around the country,but we will not rest until President Biden makes this short-term relief permanent by canceling all federal student loan debt. Together, the NextGen community sent over 12,000 personal letters urging President Biden to use his office to transform our education system and end the student debt crisis. Though the president hasn’t done nearly enough on student debt, today’s major announcement proves that the Biden-Harris administration is still listening to us. Nevertheless, this last-minute decision caused unnecessary stress for working families that are already dealing with rising COVID cases and continued economic uncertainty. Though we are relieved to hear this decision, we expect much more from the Biden-Harris administration. This extension through May gives us even more time to convince President Biden to cancel student debt and implement long-term solutions to fix our education system. Today’s announcement was an important step, but our work is just getting started! Thank you, Justin Atkins National Political Manager NextGen America | NextGen America 268 Bush St. #2919 San Francisco CA 94104-3503 This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | =

name: Karen Bass
subject: Supporting our community year-round
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Bass for Mayor 2022 (ID # 1441328)
body:
Hello —

No matter how you celebrate, the holidays are the perfect time to give thanks and give back.

Our city is continuing to face a public health crisis that has reshaped how we all live and work together. At the same time, Los Angeles is in the middle of a public safety and economic crisis, and an increase in the number of unhoused people has evolved into a humanitarian emergency.

**People across the community need our support. With my whole heart, I hope you take a moment this holiday season to help the folks in need if you're able. Will you join me in giving back to our community?

[Here in L.A., InnerCity Struggle is bringing together youth and families on the Eastside of Los Angeles to promote healthy, safe, and nonviolent communities.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39946515/322136630/-110753655?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85NDYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4M2M4NjM4OC03MzYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FBlFrjI9JGOEBytU8eZgCAFrRkzZdv9fGrOt7w5s9d4=&emci=be718504-d361-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=83c86388-7363-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=2429742)

[Peace4Kids is providing consistency, stability, and trust to youth in foster care.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39946516/322136631/-1164759799?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85NDYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4M2M4NjM4OC03MzYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FBlFrjI9JGOEBytU8eZgCAFrRkzZdv9fGrOt7w5s9d4=&emci=be718504-d361-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=83c86388-7363-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=2429742)

[Pacoima Beautiful is tackling the climate crisis here in L.A. by providing education and supporting local arts and culture to promote a healthy and sustainable San Fernando Valley.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39946517/322136632/-586839699?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85NDYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4M2M4NjM4OC03MzYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FBlFrjI9JGOEBytU8eZgCAFrRkzZdv9fGrOt7w5s9d4=&emci=be718504-d361-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=83c86388-7363-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=2429742)**

I've spent my entire life bringing groups of people together in coalitions to solve complex problems and produce concrete change — especially in times of crisis. And right now, there are countless people on the ground fighting for social and economic justice in our city who need your help.

We can create a city where everyone can afford housing, where everyone can be paid livable wages, and where services and resources are provided to help get folks who may have stumbled back on their feet. But it will take bringing people together — across neighborhoods, ethnicities, generations, and ages — to be part of the solution.

**I'm ready to build a city that works for everyone as L.A.'s next mayor. I hope you'll join me today by learning more about how you can give back to our community.**

In solidarity,

Karen

Paid for by Karen Bass for Mayor 2022 (ID # 1441328)

clean_body: Hello — No matter how you celebrate, the holidays are the perfect time to give thanks and give back. Our city is continuing to face a public health crisis that has reshaped how we all live and work together. At the same time, Los Angeles is in the middle of a public safety and economic crisis, and an increase in the number of unhoused people has evolved into a humanitarian emergency. People across the community need our support. With my whole heart, I hope you take a moment this holiday season to help the folks in need if you're able. Will you join me in giving back to our community? I've spent my entire life bringing groups of people together in coalitions to solve complex problems and produce concrete change — especially in times of crisis. And right now, there are countless people on the ground fighting for social and economic justice in our city who need your help. We can create a city where everyone can afford housing, where everyone can be paid livable wages, and where services and resources are provided to help get folks who may have stumbled back on their feet. But it will take bringing people together — across neighborhoods, ethnicities, generations, and ages — to be part of the solution. I'm ready to build a city that works for everyone as L.A.'s next mayor. I hope you'll join me today by learning more about how you can give back to our community. In solidarity, Karen Paid for by Karen Bass for Mayor 2022 (ID # 1441328) Paid for by Karen Bass for Mayor 2022 777 S Figueroa St STE 4050 Los Angeles, CA 90017 United States Additional information is available at . | | ---|---|--- We rely on this email to communicate with this grassroots team, but if you no longer want to receive our emails, please .

subject: "Expert" advice

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39946698/322137396/-851526706?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDkwNGFkNC03NDYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ziVE54KczrZQ_FhmYlgIZ61op_IP8Wc6fXxbzY0fLEE=)
Friend,

Since I launched this campaign, I've received a ton of advice from political operatives who always seem to know what works best.

It's the same formula: raise money, avoid tough questions, air the same old TV ads, then hope for the best. This should go without saying, but that's not how we’re doing things.

**This is Western North Carolina, and until Democrats really start campaigning in rural districts and telling folks what we actually stand for, the other guys are going to keep controlling the narrative -- and it ain’t pretty.**

We're meeting voters where they're at and engaging on the issues that matter -- affordable housing, education, jobs, and health care. I'll never shy away from tough conversations. And I won't write off anyone or their community because they're "too conservative" or too disillusioned with the process.

**[We need to bring in another $6,809 before we break for Christmas to hire field staff and mobilize enough voters to flip Madison Cawthorn’s seat. Will help support this project with a donation of $3 today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39946699/322137397/1573898945?refcode=em-122221-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDkwNGFkNC03NDYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ziVE54KczrZQ_FhmYlgIZ61op_IP8Wc6fXxbzY0fLEE=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39946700/322137398/1573898945?refcode=em-122221-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDkwNGFkNC03NDYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ziVE54KczrZQ_FhmYlgIZ61op_IP8Wc6fXxbzY0fLEE=)

Too often, “winning” in politics means dividing our community and riling up the extreme wing of your base for votes. For us, winning means actually uniting our community so we can get back to work for Western North Carolina families.

That’s how we’re doing things, and I’m thankful to have you by my side.

Yours,

Eric

name: Team Morgan Harper
subject: We have to be honest with you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
body:
This is a crucial test of our campaign’s ability
# [](https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20211222-470-footer-ak&t=2&akid=470%2E90090%2ETu8Row)
The end of the year also marks the end of the fundraising quarter — our first full quarter since we launched this campaign to send Morgan to the U.S. Senate. **[We’ll explain where we’re at, but if you’re all in already, you can chip in here.](https://act.morganharper.org/go/18660?t=3&akid=470%2E90090%2ETu8Row)**
**So, we’ll be honest: We are way behind on our fundraising goals.**
We’re running a grassroots-focused campaign that refuses to take a single dollar from corporate PACs. We also know that according to the Center for Responsive Politics, Black women candidates raise on average half of what white candidates raise.
That means this is an uphill battle, and unfortunately our numbers reflect that. **We set a goal of raising $50,000 from emails like this in Q4 of 2021, and right now, we’re $24,345 behind.**
**[Can you rush a contribution of $5, $15, $25, or whatever you can to help us catch up and reach our end-of-year fundraising goal?](https://act.morganharper.org/go/18660?t=4&akid=470%2E90090%2ETu8Row)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.morganharper.org/go/18666?refcode=em20211222-470&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=470%2E90090%2ETu8Row)**
We know that Ohio needs someone who will do whatever it takes to get political and economic power back on the side of everyday Ohioans. That’s why we’re in this fight to elect Morgan.
But honestly, if we don’t reach this end-of-quarter goal, our mission to _flip_ this Senate seat blue will be more like a _flop_. The gas, materials, events, organizers, ads, and even coffee required to run a Senate campaign all come with monetary costs, and they add up.
And additionally, everything we’ve been able to raise before midnight on December 31 will be published publicly in the coming weeks by the Federal Elections Commission. That means whatever we can raise right now is a crucial, public test of the viability of this campaign in the months to come.
**Only with the help of our grassroots donors will we be able to do everything we need to in 2022 to win this election.**
**[If you’re ready to send Morgan to the Senate to fight for a better Ohio, please, rush a contribution right now so we can reach our end-of-year fundraising goal.](https://act.morganharper.org/go/18660?t=24&akid=470%2E90090%2ETu8Row)**
Thank you,
Team Morgan Harper

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-email?refcode=em20211222-470-footer&t=25&refcode2=470_90090_Tu8Row&akid=470%2E90090%2ETu8Row)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/mh4oh/) | [](https://twitter.com/mh4oh) | [](https://www.instagram.com/mh4oh)
Email us: contact@morganharper.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Morgan Harper for Ohio, P.O. Box 15008, Columbus, OH 43215.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.morganharper.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.morganharper.org/sign/personal_info/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.morganharper.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=470%2E90090%2ETu8Row)

Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio

| | _Deja Alvarez is running to become the first openly trans Latina member of the Pennsylvania House of Representatives in the 182nd District. With more than a decade of experience in the nonprofit and public health field, Deja is committed to building on progressive values, economic recovery, and historic LGBTQ representation in Harrisburg. In May of 2022, we have an opportunity to continue to grow representation in our legislative body in Harrisburg that closely reflects the needs, interests, and diversity of the 182nd District. Join us as we get the work done. [www.dejaforpa.com](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=c0de8b451b&e=3f8e2ea1e3)_

body:
Thank you for your generous support of Tom's campaign! Keep reading for a recap of his time on the campaign trail, an update on upcoming events, and ways to get involved.
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39946851/322138173/-999108642?refcode=bpi-email-LaunchEmaillogo&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjVkYTRiMy03NjYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DDK4rnnz30OKkSUkKvz7LjN9u6S8U7x1AjjJ-TOSIXs=)

**Team Tom Weekly Update | Wednesday, December 22nd, 2021**
Peter,
HUGE NEWS!
This week, 14 elected and community leaders from the Baltimore region announced their support for Tom!
**[Watch our announcement](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39946852/322138183/1214088889?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjVkYTRiMy03NjYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DDK4rnnz30OKkSUkKvz7LjN9u6S8U7x1AjjJ-TOSIXs=&emci=c9b0b59a-6663-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=d25da4b3-7663-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=14684837)** and **[read](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39946853/322138189/1145539830?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjVkYTRiMy03NjYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DDK4rnnz30OKkSUkKvz7LjN9u6S8U7x1AjjJ-TOSIXs=&emci=c9b0b59a-6663-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=d25da4b3-7663-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=14684837)** why these leaders are on **#TeamTom**!
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39946854/322138194/1214088889?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjVkYTRiMy03NjYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DDK4rnnz30OKkSUkKvz7LjN9u6S8U7x1AjjJ-TOSIXs=&emci=c9b0b59a-6663-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=d25da4b3-7663-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=14684837)
Our broad, diverse coalition continues to grow each and every day, and we recognize that this is thanks to supporters like you. From everyone here at **#TeamTom** , we want to wish you all a safe and happy holiday season surrounded by friends, family, and loved ones.
Best,
Haley Link Krogman
Deputy Campaign Manager
Tom Perez for Maryland
* * *
**On the Campaign Trail**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39946855/322138199/1083112743?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjVkYTRiMy03NjYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DDK4rnnz30OKkSUkKvz7LjN9u6S8U7x1AjjJ-TOSIXs=&emci=c9b0b59a-6663-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=d25da4b3-7663-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=14684837)
Last week, Tom joined AFSCME Council 3’s Local Presidents meeting, where he spoke about the importance of collective bargaining and strengthening the labor movement here in Maryland – because when unions succeed, MARYLAND succeeds. Tom is so **[thankful to have the support of AFSCME Council 3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39946856/322138205/242936613?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjVkYTRiMy03NjYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DDK4rnnz30OKkSUkKvz7LjN9u6S8U7x1AjjJ-TOSIXs=&emci=c9b0b59a-6663-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=d25da4b3-7663-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=14684837)** in this race and will continue to be a strong partner to working people in every corner of the state.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39946857/322138210/1083112743?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjVkYTRiMy03NjYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DDK4rnnz30OKkSUkKvz7LjN9u6S8U7x1AjjJ-TOSIXs=&emci=c9b0b59a-6663-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=d25da4b3-7663-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=14684837)
Tom met with Reverend Dantwan Broady and parishioners from the Temple of God Church in Baltimore City, where they discussed how we can work together to create a Maryland where everyone has access to justice and opportunity. Reverend Broady is a steadfast leader who has dedicated his life to creating positive change in Baltimore City, and we are proud to have him on **#TeamTom**.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39946858/322138215/1083112743?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjVkYTRiMy03NjYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DDK4rnnz30OKkSUkKvz7LjN9u6S8U7x1AjjJ-TOSIXs=&emci=c9b0b59a-6663-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=d25da4b3-7663-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=14684837)
Tom ended his weekend with a meet and greet in College Park with Prince George’s County municipal leaders. Tom was thankful for this opportunity to discuss how we can expand opportunity in Prince George’s County and beyond. Special thanks to College Park Mayor Patrick Wojahn for hosting this great event!
* * *
**Endorsements**
Last week, Tom was proud to announce an endorsement from Speaker Nancy Pelosi. Speaker Pelosi is a transformational leader and native Marylander who cares deeply about the future of our state, and it is an incredible honor to have her support.
Watch Speaker Pelosi’s endorsement **[here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39946859/322138226/-1322065059?s=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjVkYTRiMy03NjYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DDK4rnnz30OKkSUkKvz7LjN9u6S8U7x1AjjJ-TOSIXs=&emci=c9b0b59a-6663-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=d25da4b3-7663-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=14684837)**.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39946860/322138228/-1322065059?s=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjVkYTRiMy03NjYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DDK4rnnz30OKkSUkKvz7LjN9u6S8U7x1AjjJ-TOSIXs=&emci=c9b0b59a-6663-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=d25da4b3-7663-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=14684837)

Keep reading for a recap of his time on the campaign trail, an update on upcoming events, and ways to get involved. = Team Tom Weekly Update | Wednesday, December 22nd, 2021 Peter, HUGE NEWS! This week, 14 elected and community leaders from the Baltimore region announced their support for Tom! and why these leaders are on #TeamTom! Our broad, diverse coalition continues to grow each and every day, and we recognize that this is thanks to supporters like you. From everyone here at #TeamTom , we want to wish you all a safe and happy holiday season surrounded by friends, family, and loved ones. Best, Haley Link Krogman Deputy Campaign Manager Tom Perez for Maryland On the Campaign Trail Last week, Tom joined AFSCME Council 3’s Local Presidents meeting, where he spoke about the importance of collective bargaining and strengthening the labor movement here in Maryland – because when unions succeed, MARYLAND succeeds. Tom is so in this race and will continue to be a strong partner to working people in every corner of the state. Tom met with Reverend Dantwan Broady and parishioners from the Temple of God Church in Baltimore City, where they discussed how we can work together to create a Maryland where everyone has access to justice and opportunity. Reverend Broady is a steadfast leader who has dedicated his life to creating positive change in Baltimore City, and we are proud to have him on #TeamTom. Tom ended his weekend with a meet and greet in College Park with Prince George’s County municipal leaders. Tom was thankful for this opportunity to discuss how we can expand opportunity in Prince George’s County and beyond. Special thanks to College Park Mayor Patrick Wojahn for hosting this great event! Endorsements Last week, Tom was proud to announce an endorsement from Speaker Nancy Pelosi. Speaker Pelosi is a transformational leader and native Marylander who cares deeply about the future of our state, and it is an incredible honor to have her support. Watch Speaker Pelosi’s endorsement . ICYMI Our webstore is now live! Visit to let everyone know you're on . Team Tom Schedule of Upcoming Events Wednesday, January 5 | 4:00 PM Virtual Hosted by Emilio Cividanes, Gregory Gill, Warren Hamel, Peter Kiernan, Jeffrey Kurzweil, and Kenneth Roberts, Jonathan Smith, and Ann Marie Staudenmaier Sunday, January 9 | 2:30 PM Frederick, MD Hosted by Tom Slater, Melanie Galloway, Dr. Syed Haque, Dr. Shahid Rafiq, and Marcie Roth Monday, January 10 | 5:30 PM Virtual Hosted by Carole Brand, Barbara Goldberg Goldman, Corrine Parver, Carol Pensky, Catherine Leggett, Claire Lucas, Betsy Williams, Diane Robertson, Regina Montoya UFCW Local 1994 MCGEO, and Brice & Houston Barnes Saturday, January 15 | 3:30 PM Bethesda, MD Hosted by George Cohen Wednesday, January 19 | 6:00 PM The Home of Jim Lyons Annapolis, MD Hosted by Jim Lyons, Warren Hamel, John Griffin, and Fred & Eileen Hoover_ Authority: Tom Perez for Maryland, Stanley J. | I have good news and bad news. The bad news is Mehmet is using his millions of dollars to buy this election. He just spent $1.2 million on a huge ad buy!
The good news is that we can still keep up with Mehmet and his millions. Our new goal is to reach $1.2 million in grassroots donations, rather than using millionaire money - [and we can get there with your help.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001RZ15keq3NEwVJ2y5kdi3Z60WOX-xcGWz4xzP_BuZGlVzZGcB_uiv2TGPcMsbACgtpoZrAWODcpb-Gw0fqKtxkCV8vWTHmcmbq9hLfmNmMUGq5ByMTzWCOL442qUTxyXonUVtDU4ooYMfgox0JfEhuBktq5QUuQHfe3exrJywlCILmhWruPn61GWv6-s-Hnc4&c=l40PkN62jy_1VktahEH-3pnJEbY02s0SfrgR6r-svGolDqudwodGpQ==&ch=kSVkcYcGKd9W6rQfkts0wC9uRa8IlhZbNe8MpdNMnGlGTyoGaRf9Pw==)

| I'll be honest with you...it's going to be a stretch. But we can stay on track if just [1250 people](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001RZ15keq3NEwVJ2y5kdi3Z60WOX-xcGWz4xzP_BuZGlVzZGcB_uiv2TGPcMsbACgtpoZrAWODcpb-Gw0fqKtxkCV8vWTHmcmbq9hLfmNmMUGq5ByMTzWCOL442qUTxyXonUVtDU4ooYMfgox0JfEhuBktq5QUuQHfe3exrJywlCILmhWruPn61GWv6-s-Hnc4&c=l40PkN62jy_1VktahEH-3pnJEbY02s0SfrgR6r-svGolDqudwodGpQ==&ch=kSVkcYcGKd9W6rQfkts0wC9uRa8IlhZbNe8MpdNMnGlGTyoGaRf9Pw==) donate [$10 or more](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001RZ15keq3NEwVJ2y5kdi3Z60WOX-xcGWz4xzP_BuZGlVzZGcB_uiv2TGPcMsbACgtm2XRE3YAm8kUgXBvkBinnXI5Glh9eQS_aZxyuR4hKkjbTDvxzJ26DU3PnQiGJt9o_HEGix0FO72CNZit0EuIotqx-NIj174lu-z-SZfuCgghP3-mM87dO8vrfvCg4V_jrXaHxiUR2qOBtl2T34b9yg==&c=l40PkN62jy_1VktahEH-3pnJEbY02s0SfrgR6r-svGolDqudwodGpQ==&ch=kSVkcYcGKd9W6rQfkts0wC9uRa8IlhZbNe8MpdNMnGlGTyoGaRf9Pw==) before the end of the day.
We can defeat Mehmet Oz and his millions of dollars by staying out on the campaign trail and meeting with real Pennsylvanians. It's critical that our team can keep up with Oz, so I hope you'll be one of the 1250 donors we need NOW!
No one is going to give our country back to us. This is our fight. We can do it. But, we must engage now while we still have a chance.

body:
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/39946963/322138412/-2023352048?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ2NWRhNGIzLTc2NjMtZWMxMS05NGY2LTAwNTBmMmU2NWU5YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=fA3pDXkH_GqVsr1A5lHZGFhnGm0d6aqs2DbhcHw0X_M=&emci=a58c0aef-6363-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=d65da4b3-7663-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=16335001) Remember Scott Perry, team?

**He's a current U.S. Representative for Pennsylvania, and has been present at every step of the Big Lie – and now he's refusing to speak up for our democracy.**

In January, he admitted to introducing Trump to Philadelphia attorney Jeffrey Clark, who would eventually become a sympathetic figure in the Justice Department to those supporting Trump's false election claims. Trump would later go on to install Clark as attorney general and kickstart the Big Lie by pressuring Georgia to reverse the election results. Perry knew and was complicit in this plot.

Then in September, Perry made a show of publicly defending the insurrectionists, calling them "peaceful" and defending their instigation of the riot.

Now in December, Perry became the first sitting lawmaker the House select committee asked to voluntarily sit down for an interview to discuss his role in the January 6th attack. As of Monday, he also became the first sitting lawmaker to refuse to cooperate with the committee by refusing to participate in the interview.

It's only a matter of time before we find out what Perry is hiding.

If we want to protect our democracy, it's essential to uncover the full truth about January 6 and the Big Lie. Scott Perry must fulfill his duty to the American people and our country by telling the truth. clean_body: Remember Scott Perry, team? He's a current U.S. Representative for Pennsylvania, and has been present at every step of the Big Lie – and now he's refusing to speak up for our democracy. In January, he admitted to introducing Trump to Philadelphia attorney Jeffrey Clark, who would eventually become a sympathetic figure in the Justice Department to those supporting Trump's false election claims. Trump would later go on to install Clark as attorney general and kickstart the Big Lie by pressuring Georgia to reverse the election results. Perry knew and was complicit in this plot. Then in September, Perry made a show of publicly defending the insurrectionists, calling them "peaceful" and defending their instigation of the riot. Now in December, Perry became the first sitting lawmaker the House select committee asked to voluntarily sit down for an interview to discuss his role in the January 6th attack. As of Monday, he also became the first sitting lawmaker to refuse to cooperate with the committee by refusing to participate in the interview. It's only a matter of time before we find out what Perry is hiding. If we want to protect our democracy, it's essential to uncover the full truth about January 6 and the Big Lie. Scott Perry must fulfill his duty to the American people and our country by telling the truth. Do you agree? | | | Thanks, Team Never Again Never Again PAC is working to defend our democracy from the 147 Republican members of Congress who sought to overturn the results of a free and fair election. name: Christina Davidson
subject: No jab, no job
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Health Freedom Defense Fund
body:
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6602%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=2W17%2bTKmAdKrFOJQcx8jAw&sysid=1)
I don't know you and you don't know me, but the government is forcing me to choose between the jab and my job, and I'm writing to you today because I think we have something important in common. I think you're a patriot, and I think you know what's at stake. You know that freedoms given away are never given back... | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68160%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7A1YrUPhxmdiRCaWmcGqGA&sysid=1)
---

Friend,

I don't know you and you don't know me, but the government is forcing me to choose between the jab and my job, and I'm writing to you today because I think we have something important in common.

I think you're a patriot, and I think you know what's at stake.

You know that freedoms given away are never given back.

And no matter your vaccination status, you know that your medical decisions are between you and your doctor - not you and your government, or you and your boss.

**That's why I'm suing the federal government alongside of 6,000 other federal employees with the help of the Health Freedom Defense Fund and why I hope I can count on your generous support today.**

[**Will you give $25, $50, $100 or more and give us the ammunition we need to win this legal battle?**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68161%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2bRDxtpT1yjqF6mb5hDZ%2bag&sysid=1)

My name is Christina Davidson, I'm a paramedic firefighter, and I've worked for the Department of Defense for 14 years.

**_If I did what the government is doing I'd lose my license on the spot._**

I'm not allowed to give my patients medication without their consent, and I'm not allowed to threaten them to take medication.

But that's exactly what's happening to me and thousands of other employees across the country, and that's why we need you on our side.

_Because what starts with us won't end with us._

**If they can do it to me, they can do it to you.**

We're taking on this legal battle because we know if we give up and give in, it's only a matter of time before they come after you, your livelihood and your family the way they came after ours.

We want to stop tyranny in its tracks and codify our medical rights into law once and for all.

[**But we don't stand a chance without you.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68162%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kIksg1%2b0xrBFOWrdbQreHg&sysid=1)

I won't mince words...we've got our work cut out for us.

The government is going to fight us every step of the way.

They've already shown us how far they're willing to go to push these mandates.

They've blatantly defied the courts, and are encouraging private employers to do the same. The President has even told businesses to ignore the courts.

Federal employees lucky enough to get an exemption are required to undergo "reeducation" training.

On top of regular threats, we're told we have no chance of promotion unless we shut up and take it.

And if we're fired, it won't just be a matter of finding a new job.

They're making it so that we'll never be able to find work again.

They want to make us so desperate that we have no choice but to surrender once and for all.

This has nothing to do with health.

**They want to break our wills, break our spirits, and send a loud, clear message that they have control over our lives.**

And if we let them win, there's no turning back.

[**Which is why I hope you'll fight along with me with a generous gift of $25 or more today to help fund lawsuits to fight vaccine mandates and preserve medical freedom.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68163%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=MHsZwMHRdhYzsOWoKdkTfA&sysid=1)

**I don't know if you're vaccinated - and I don't want to know.**

It's none of my business.

I want to know if you'll stand up for your countrymen when it matters most.

Thank you for your consideration.

Sincerely,

Christina Davidson

| [ DONATE ](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68164%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=H95PjK8FOBBXIJkeF7gScw&sysid=1)

name: Ben Shapiro
subject: 9 Leftists Arrested for Attacking Free Speech
body:
Peter, Insidious leftist ideology has taken hold of our educational system. It's never been more important that we expose it, because the Left has lit an ideological fire, and that fire is now consuming the minds of young Americans, burning itself through the most aspects of American culture and politics. That's why it's of utmost importance that I hear back from you today. I'm no stranger to the authoritarian attitudes on campus; I famously felt the brunt of it when conservative students invited me to speak on the University of California, Berkeley campus. [**HELP US FIGHT THE RADICAL LEFT**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59082872:JQpDa1EVN:m:1:3253819041:7791C17E5E7C1B681C50E8628CA227D4:r) Radical leftist groups like Antifa vowed to riot and cause harm to others. The fear of violence from leftist agitators was so great that:
* It cost $600,000 in security expenses and required hundreds of policemen to ensure that agitators didn't disrupt or try to cause violence at my speech.
* The University shut down six buildings on campus during my speech and erected concrete barricades (YES, a wall) to secure the Berkeley campus.
* For the first time in 20 years, the City of Berkeley voted to allow the use of pepper spray against violent protesters.
* In the end, police arrested nine leftists for trying to sneak banned weapons into our event-with the likely intent to do harm.

It's no longer just about the Left trying to suppress your conservative views on campus. It's about using the threat of violence to silence the conservative values you and I share. Meanwhile, schools roll out the red carpet for leftists like Angela Davis, Bill Ayers, Barack Obama, Bill Clinton, and Bernie Sanders. At Berkeley, taxpayer-funded school administrators tried to derail my event from even taking place. They told me that they didn't have a lecture hall available, which was a lie. School administrators even cut the venue in half by not allowing students to sit in the balcony-a dirty tactic to minimize attendance. _**The good news is the radical Left's attempts to silence me completely backfired.**_**** More than 600 students showed up, and we were able to host an engaging and civil event. Then, OVER 10 MILLION PEOPLE watched my speech online (that's more viewers than any of the major evening newscasts). This victory for the Conservative Movement would have never happened if it weren't for the **Young America's Foundation** **(YAF)**. When Berkeley tried to illegally block me from coming to campus, YAF sued the university -**and won.** But the radicals who rioted and tried to incite violence at Berkeley are relentless. Their stranglehold on America's universities has not yet been broken. **Young America's Foundation** has been an incredible partner in making sure I am able to share our conservative values with students on campuses across the country. In fact, I speak on campuses **_exclusively_** through YAF because I know YAF has the experience and leadership necessary to run the nation's leading campus lecture program. Today YAF needs your help. **[Will you contribute $35 today to ensure that YAF can continue to present speakers, including Dr. Arthur Laffer, Katie Pavlich, Senator Ted Cruz, and many others to high school and college students? Without you, the mission to pass along our conservative values to future generations will stall out.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59082872:JQpDa1EVN:m:1:3253819041:7791C17E5E7C1B681C50E8628CA227D4:r)** Let me tell you a little bit more about what YAF does to advance conservative ideas. Speaking to an audience of Young America's Foundation students, Vice President Mike Pence noted, "Since its founding in 1960, YAF has been a bulwark of American greatness." YAF valiantly defends the values we share by educating impressionable young people who have been ideologically poisoned by leftist propaganda for decades, by the very teachers and professors they're told to trust. YAF's team is the best at what they do. They are _**#1: the LARGEST and MOST effective conservative youth outreach organization in America**._ Here's why:
* YAF introduces young audiences to the biggest names in the Conservative Movement through their leading campus lecture program. YAF speakers are the most inspiring conservative voices in America, including **Arthur Laffer, Katie Pavlich,** YAF's Ronald Reagan Presidential Scholar and Vice President **Mike Pence, Dinesh D'Souza, Lila Rose, Steve Forbes,** Lt. Col.**Allen West** , Speaker**Newt Gingrich, Michael Knowles, Dana Loesch, James O'Keefe,** NFL star and Congressman **Burgess Owens, Star Parker,** Fox News's**Jesse Watters,** and many others.
* YAF teaches **_millions of students_ **across the nation YOUR conservative values through breakthrough conferences, training seminars, and campus activism initiatives and activities. (In fact, YAF is the only Conservative Movement organization that has a full suite of conservative educational programs for high school students!)
* And YAF preserves and protects President Reagan's ranch in Santa Barbara, California and Boyhood Home in Dixon, Illinois. They saved these national treasures so young people can learn about Ronald Reagan's lasting accomplishments.

_No other organization reaches conservative students with foundational American ideas on a bigger scale than Young America's Foundation._ _That's why I prefer YAF to be my sole sponsor for campus events._ They fight for the right to ensure alternative voices are heard on college campuses. They stop campuses from being turned into Leftist echo chambers. I am glad I have YAF on my side and the side of the students. But YAF can't do this alone. As the Left continues to stoop to desperate new lows to silence conservatives, it's become more important than ever that our values are shared with the next generation of thought leaders. We both know that the Left doesn't want a fair discussion of ideas. But that's why YAF needs your help today. At any moment, a scheduled event could get shut down by campus radicals or administrators, and the YAF team must be ready to engage them on a moment's notice. [**Will you contribute $35 or more today so that YAF's rapid response team will always be ready to leap into action the next time leftists decide to shut down free speech and deprive students of the chance to hear your conservative ideas?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59082872:JQpDa1EVN:m:1:3253819041:7791C17E5E7C1B681C50E8628CA227D4:r) Friend, a donation of $35 or whatever you choose does more than you know. The impact amplifying conservative voices will have on the future of our country can't be overstated. I cannot encourage you enough to consider giving to YAF today. Partnering with YAF today is our opportunity to win a generation that values freedom. I can't think of a better investment. Ronald Reagan stated, "There is no better way to establish hope for the future than to enlighten young minds." I look forward to hearing back from you. -Ben Ben Shapiro [**Will you support Young America's Foundation with a contribution of $35, $50, $100, or even $1000 today, to save this generation by presenting conservative ideas to students across the country?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59082872:JQpDa1EVN:m:1:3253819041:7791C17E5E7C1B681C50E8628CA227D4:r) [**DONATE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59082872:JQpDa1EVN:m:1:3253819041:7791C17E5E7C1B681C50E8628CA227D4:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59082872:JQpDa1EVN:m:1:3253819041:7791C17E5E7C1B681C50E8628CA227D4:r) | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59082873:JQpDa1EVN:m:1:3253819041:7791C17E5E7C1B681C50E8628CA227D4:r) | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59082874:JQpDa1EVN:m:1:3253819041:7791C17E5E7C1B681C50E8628CA227D4:r) | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59082875:JQpDa1EVN:m:1:3253819041:7791C17E5E7C1B681C50E8628CA227D4:r)

[**_But if 550 people respond today, I’ll have the data I need to build an unbeatable campaign and win this important race for Democrats. So I’m personally asking: will you take my quick survey? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39947029/322138729/-273583134?source=20211222_em_surv_b1_tv_30op&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZDVjZmU2NS03NzYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JUQfXahSTk9-Bp8Y2Cx34mbKgXTpBUJMtg7R0jNL_M8=&emci=b5f4037b-7362-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=6d5cfe65-7763-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=19927889) | | [Take Tony's Survey!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39947030/322138730/-273583134?source=20211222_em_surv_b1_tv_30op&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZDVjZmU2NS03NzYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JUQfXahSTk9-Bp8Y2Cx34mbKgXTpBUJMtg7R0jNL_M8=&emci=b5f4037b-7362-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=6d5cfe65-7763-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=19927889)

This fight is personal. The American Dream made Tony’s story possible. He refuses to sit on the sidelines while others struggle to achieve the same dream.

name: Jamal Raad, Evergreen Action
subject: re: Joe Manchin
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
This moment is a defining test of leadership for President Biden.
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4193?t=3&akid=12930%2E53494%2EwmXTyd) Friend, I'm sure you've seen the news: On Sunday, Senator Joe Manchin declared his opposition to the Build Back Better Act. The same Build Back Better Act that will drive down energy costs for American consumers and businesses by $9 billion, whose investments will help tackle inflation, and will deliver reliable, affordable American-made clean energy to households across the country. I know how frustrated you feel—trust me. But hear me when I say that Evergreen's resolve has never been stronger. [**_If you, like us, aren't going to give up on bold climate investments so easily, sign your name here._**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4193?t=4&akid=12930%2E53494%2EwmXTyd) | [SIGN ON](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4193?t=5&akid=12930%2E53494%2EwmXTyd)
---
This moment is a defining test of leadership for President Biden. The transformative climate investments included in the Build Back Better Act are our last, best chance to tackle the climate crisis before it's too late.
It's time for President Biden and congressional leadership to get back to work and find a way to deliver real climate action. It's not "new year, new me" this time. **In 2022, it's "new year, new clean energy future."** And failure is not an option.
[**_As we head into the new year, we're more resolute than ever on bold climate action. If you're with us, add your name today._**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4193?t=6&akid=12930%2E53494%2EwmXTyd)
We're still in this together,
Jamal Raad
Executive Director, Evergreen Action
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4193?t=7&akid=12930%2E53494%2EwmXTyd)

body:
We need to keep pushing forward, making life just a little bit easier for those who need the most help.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39947136/322139059/-1995343361?refcode=abd_em_fr_2021.10.04_bX_logo_x__f1_s1_c1__header&amount=25&utm_campaign=abd_em_pet_2021.12.22_b1_bbb_x_f1_s1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&ms=ABD_EM_PET_2021.12.22_b1_BBB_X_F1_S1__ac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ODc2N2JjYS03ODYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eZXqauqGNmcpCSGxB64XyVn1e_AxCOW-H_V8qYPIJOQ=)
---
Friends,

As of right now, the Build Back Better Act is on hold in the Senate. This is a disappointment for the millions of working families who would have been helped by this bill.

But we’re not ready to give up. The Senate can still pass this monumental piece of legislation, but they won’t do it without tremendous pressure.

**So we’re asking:[Will you sign your name if you want the Senate to pass the Build Back Better Act?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39947137/322139060/-671862790?refcode=ABD_EM_PET_2021.12.22_b1_BBB_X_F1_S1__ac&utm_campaign=abd_em_pet_2021.12.22_b1_bbb_x_f1_s1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&ms=ABD_EM_PET_2021.12.22_b1_BBB_X_F1_S1__ac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ODc2N2JjYS03ODYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eZXqauqGNmcpCSGxB64XyVn1e_AxCOW-H_V8qYPIJOQ=&emci=64bef952-5d63-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=48767bca-7863-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=3200050)** | [SIGN MY NAME »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39947138/322139061/-671862790?refcode=ABD_EM_PET_2021.12.22_b1_BBB_X_F1_S1__ac&utm_campaign=abd_em_pet_2021.12.22_b1_bbb_x_f1_s1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&ms=ABD_EM_PET_2021.12.22_b1_BBB_X_F1_S1__ac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ODc2N2JjYS03ODYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eZXqauqGNmcpCSGxB64XyVn1e_AxCOW-H_V8qYPIJOQ=&emci=64bef952-5d63-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=48767bca-7863-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=3200050)
---
This bill would drastically help people across the country. If it passes, we would see help, like extending the Child Tax Credit, lowering the price of prescription drugs and extending the Medicare coverage gap.

But instead, families are being forced to suffer.

We can’t let this happen. We need to keep pushing forward, making life just a little bit easier for those who need the most help.

But we can’t do that without you. **[Will you sign your name if you want the Senate to pass the Build Back Better Act?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39947139/322139062/-671862790?refcode=ABD_EM_PET_2021.12.22_b1_BBB_X_F1_S1__ac&utm_campaign=abd_em_pet_2021.12.22_b1_bbb_x_f1_s1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&ms=ABD_EM_PET_2021.12.22_b1_BBB_X_F1_S1__ac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ODc2N2JjYS03ODYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eZXqauqGNmcpCSGxB64XyVn1e_AxCOW-H_V8qYPIJOQ=&emci=64bef952-5d63-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=48767bca-7863-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=3200050)**

name: Dan Crenshaw
subject: it's official
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Crenshaw for Congress
body:
---
| | | | | | |
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kFVzCqXbo7ecRISgb7TmXVhK2LHbDd1gsV2zJ0NuN2hdI7SgPqD0tmKkDeLi7G9AROo5z41KJWxyjB2Cft4dE_1l4J7QbyIAfFAzhKPtDynvCOr4YEls_CaxNht_7XUMmsvlce6FiQflsbaITL1KbEzBZpYWvduRNDNGa6s1aPY5FYzC1ldi79Z9OznvvvqU08uAlTqPPyVtigEatD44e-MZ42nUHDaad_mVQoWYG6qaFjv0pLvYWVop0mu4rk34eqvwtq2r5C8sMlVZS79_vdAZ_f4lSbdLdi2HLCrL1iPuJ8G33quzuACNoKVuCiCUZuI6mFJh0xE=&c=7nQVcuZ3FBCaH6rRyqytEUB9PAoKUP5OsAEz_Dco75-mgnMvk08KVg==&ch=qwEGF3QVDlACAfnebSNnJaVoIr6G2k42N5Bcr7TXiX6a_SQLEcW0Ww==)
---
| |
---
| Peter -
It's official: I have formally filed for re-election in 2022.
I haven't been in Washington, D.C. long, but during my short time there I've realized that we need more people in Congress who will speak their minds, tell the truth, and who understand the true purpose of fighting, which is to persuade others to join our cause.
That's what I've delivered in Congress.
I am in the top 10% of the most effective Republican lawmakers in Congress. And during Joe Biden's awful first year in office, I've fought back against his most dangerous policies.
I've fought back against his unconstitutional vaccine mandate, introducing legislation to stop this mandate in its tracks and outlaw things like "vaccine passports."
I've fought back against the left's attacks on the energy industry, introducing legislation to overturn Biden's ban on oil and gas drilling and exposing the truth about the Biden Administration's radical environmental agenda that is raising your energy prices and destroying American energy independence.
I've fought to rein in the Biden Border Crisis, calling for the impeachment of Biden's Homeland Security Secretary and calling on the left to reimplement President Trump's border security policies that finally got illegal immigration under control.
And I am one of the fiercest, most vocal critics against Joe Biden's socialist Build Back Better agenda, which is defeated for now but could be revived by Nancy Pelosi next year.
These are my priorities because they are your priorities. And I am running for re-election in Texas's Second Congressional District so I can continue to fight for you and your priorities in Congress.
Can I count on your support? Your donation will help me get my message out in Texas and across the country and help me continue my fight against the radical left and their policies.
I can't do this without you. Please join Team Crenshaw for 2022 and stand with me in this fight.
---

Team,

Before we break for the holidays, I wanted to take a second to check in. Team Tom is about to celebrate our six-month anniversary tomorrow, and we’re already planning for the next six months.

We have big plans to ramp up our voter engagement, grow our volunteer program, release new ads, and supercharge our momentum ahead of the primary. And the reality is, it’s going to be expensive.

We can’t afford to miss critical goals like the one we’re facing at the end of this month. So, I have to ask: _**[Will you chip in $6 to help meet our December goal? We’ve made incredible progress in the last six months thanks to you, but the Washington Post wasn’t kidding when they said Maryland’s Governor’s race was going to be the most expensive in the state's history.

Tom needs your support to make sure we can get the word out about his plans to build a Maryland where every worker has a voice, every child has access to a world-class education, every family has access to affordable healthcare, and where justice is equal for all.

_**[If you can, please donate $6 or whatever you can to help us close the gap ahead of our December fundraising deadline and make the next 6 months count.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39947447/322140805/1729229235?refcode=bpi-em-20211223-6-months-2-ND&amount=6&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOGYzOTRlNC03YTYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=891BXRSc5P9r4Cu9sP8YRHBQODf3HlOvC_-yAuRp6xY=)**_

Jessica

subject: Let's Send a Real Representative to DC!
body:
| |

| | |

|
## We Deserve Better!
I'm Kathleen Brown and I'm running to represent YOU in DC. Our current representative is Ronny Jackson, Donald Trump's ex-MAGA doctor. He is a COVID denier who refuses to encourage people to get vaccinated. He spends all his time whining about Democrats and no time bringing jobs or development to our district. He's repeatedly voted to cover up the January 6 insurrection, even though he recognized the perpetrators as domestic terrorists when he witnessed the attacks.

I'll be honest, I'm facing a tough fight. Ronny accepts donations from corporations and lobbyists. He's a well-funded Washington insider.

I'm a lot like you. Watch the video below and see my story of how I worked my way through school and am fighting for people. I want to get to DC with the help of people like you. Hundreds have come up to me in recent weeks offering support. I hate to ask for money, but we need it to deliver our message to the entire district over the coming months and fight the fake news generated by my opponent's media machine.

Please take a few minutes to chip in what you can.

name: Gavin Newsom
subject: Alex Padilla
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
He has led the fight on voting rights, gun violence prevention, combating climate change, passing the Build Back Better Act, and repealing the filibuster.
#

Hey there,
One year ago today, I appointed Alex Padilla to replace Vice President Kamala Harris as the junior United States Senator from California.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-dec21?refcode=em211222-1-30&t=1&refcode2=526_159979_ZI0P4R&akid=526%2E159979%2EZI0P4R)_Source: CNN_
Since then, Alex has made us nothing but proud.
He has led the fight on voting rights, gun violence prevention, combating climate change, passing the Build Back Better Act, and repealing the filibuster.
Now he’s up for election, in what many people say will be a tough year for Democrats — even in California.
But the truth is, we’ll hold this seat if all of us do our part. But that’s the key... do _**OUR**_ part. And hopefully $5 is a small price to pay to keep Alex in the Senate. What do you say?
[**Can you please make a $5 contribution to Alex Padilla’s campaign for U.S. Senate? Do it before Alex’s FEC fundraising deadline comes to a close in one week and he’s legally required to report his fundraising numbers.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-dec21?refcode=em211222-1-30&t=2&refcode2=526_159979_ZI0P4R&akid=526%2E159979%2EZI0P4R)
**[DONATE $5](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-dec21?refcode=em211222-1-30&t=3&refcode2=526_159979_ZI0P4R&akid=526%2E159979%2EZI0P4R)**
The Senate is a better place with Alex Padilla in office. But it is up to us to make sure he gets the chance to serve a full term.
Gavin Newsom

Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate

clean_body: He has led the fight on voting rights, gun violence prevention, combating climate change, passing the Build Back Better Act, and repealing the filibuster. Hey there, One year ago today, I appointed Alex Padilla to replace Vice President Kamala Harris as the junior United States Senator from California. : CNN Since then, Alex has made us nothing but proud. He has led the fight on voting rights, gun violence prevention, combating climate change, passing the Build Back Better Act, and repealing the filibuster. Now he’s up for election, in what many people say will be a tough year for Democrats — even in California. But the truth is, we’ll hold this seat if all of us do our part. But that’s the key... do OUR part. And hopefully $5 is a small price to pay to keep Alex in the Senate. What do you say? The Senate is a better place with Alex Padilla in office. But it is up to us to make sure he gets the chance to serve a full term. Gavin Newsom Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39940402/322105082/124312502?refcode=em21_emailheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OGI0ZWQ4MC01MzYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yQpPfPT9536MurjytREVdbA7lrGKHVNWiLIZT600UHU=)

Hey Peter,

I hope this holiday season is treating you well so far. I know between family dinners, cooking, gift wrapping, and decorating, _I'm_ as busy as ever! I'm sure you are too, so I'll make this email short and sweet.

Peter, I'm running for Congress to give power back to the people. To do that, I need to hear directly from you -- _your_ hopes, concerns, and priorities for the new year and beyond.

So, could you spare just a minute to **[make your voice heard on the issues you care about most?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39940403/322105083/843376801?ms=em21_211222_eoysurvey2&refcode=em21_211222_eoysurvey2&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OGI0ZWQ4MC01MzYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yQpPfPT9536MurjytREVdbA7lrGKHVNWiLIZT600UHU=&emci=db274098-6662-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=98b4ed80-5363-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=34271788)** We have this new survey out, and I'd love to hear about what's most important to you before we wrap up 2021. [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39940404/322105084/843376801?ms=em21_211222_eoysurvey2&refcode=em21_211222_eoysurvey2&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OGI0ZWQ4MC01MzYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yQpPfPT9536MurjytREVdbA7lrGKHVNWiLIZT600UHU=&emci=db274098-6662-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=98b4ed80-5363-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=34271788) Whether you're concerned about wildlife protections, want to see advancements in education, or more community resources for working families, **your voice matters,** and I'm ready to fight the good fight for you and alongside you.

But in order to serve you the best way I can, I need to know a little more about what matters most to you. It'll only take a minute, and your feedback will be truly meaningful for me. [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39940405/322105085/843376801?ms=em21_211222_eoysurvey2&refcode=em21_211222_eoysurvey2&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OGI0ZWQ4MC01MzYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yQpPfPT9536MurjytREVdbA7lrGKHVNWiLIZT600UHU=&emci=db274098-6662-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=98b4ed80-5363-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=34271788) Thanks so much, Peter! body:
Despite the challenges, we accomplished so much this year.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20211222-2700-header&t=1&akid=2700%2E2526796%2ERFml7T)
Despite the challenges, we accomplished so much together over the past year. We trained, organized, and built community. We showed how powerful grassroots campaigning can be even in the years with no election.
**Without further ado, we present to you our latest video with Alexandria:_21 wins for 2021_. **[Watch the video here, and then please make a donation to help us close out the year strong before our upcoming fundraising deadline.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211222?refcode=em20211222-2700-P_FND_VID_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=2700_2526796_RFml7T&akid=2700%2E2526796%2ERFml7T)
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211222?refcode=em20211222-2700-P_FND_VID_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&refcode2=2700_2526796_RFml7T&akid=2700%2E2526796%2ERFml7T)**[Watch the video »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211222?refcode=em20211222-2700-P_FND_VID_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&refcode2=2700_2526796_RFml7T&akid=2700%2E2526796%2ERFml7T)**
This was a challenging year for all of us. But it’s important to take a step back and celebrate these accomplishments and all the hard work that led to them.
Whether you volunteered, met with us on Zoom events, or donated to help Team AOC build for 2022, _thank you_ for being part of our movement.
Wishing you all the best this season,
Team AOC
[Watch the video »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211222?refcode=em20211222-2700-P_FND_VID_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&refcode2=2700_2526796_RFml7T&akid=2700%2E2526796%2ERFml7T)

name: SarahforWisconsin.com
subject: tipping point
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
Wisconsin will be the tipping point for Senate control. Here are three important reasons why: 1.

1. The Cook Political Report upgraded our race from Lean R to a Toss-Up.
2. Roll Call and CNN are calling Ron Johnson the most vulnerable GOP incumbent.
3. The latest poll of Wisconsin shows only one Democrat can defeat Ron Johnson in a general election: Sarah Godlewski.

We have real momentum in this race, but we have to grow and sustain it in order to win — that starts by hitting our crucial end-of-year FEC goal. The deadline is on December 31, which means we don’t have a whole lot of time left.

Sarah has never taken a dime from corporate PACs, and she is not going to spend a minute of this campaign asking special interests for donations. Our campaign is relying on supporters like you to believe in the critical work we're doing to flip this seat and to stand with us in the fights ahead.

Wisconsin’s U.S. Senate race is a dead heat right now, and Democrats need the strongest candidate to take on Ron Johnson in 2022. The polls prove Sarah Godlewski is the only one who can defeat him — so if you can chip in toward our final FEC deadline of the year, it would mean a great deal to our campaign. Thank you in advance.

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/godlewski-december2021-eoy

clean_body: Wisconsin will be the tipping point for Senate control. Here are three important reasons why: 1. 1. The Cook Political Report upgraded our race from Lean R to a Toss-Up. 2. Roll Call and CNN are calling Ron Johnson the most vulnerable GOP incumbent. 3. The latest poll of Wisconsin shows only one Democrat can defeat Ron Johnson in a general election: Sarah Godlewski. We have real momentum in this race, but we have to grow and sustain it in order to win — that starts by hitting our crucial end-of-year FEC goal. The deadline is on December 31, which means we don’t have a whole lot of time left. Sarah has never taken a dime from corporate PACs, and she is not going to spend a minute of this campaign asking special interests for donations. Our campaign is relying on supporters like you to believe in the critical work we're doing to flip this seat and to stand with us in the fights ahead. Wisconsin’s U.S. Senate race is a dead heat right now, and Democrats need the strongest candidate to take on Ron Johnson in 2022. The polls prove Sarah Godlewski is the only one who can defeat him — so if you can chip in toward our final FEC deadline of the year, it would mean a great deal to our campaign. Thank you in advance. — Team Sarah Sarah Godlewski is running for U.S. Senate to put hard-working Wisconsin families first. She's the only Democrat in this race who has won statewide twice. But the NRA and Mitch McConnell’s Super PACs are going to spend millions of dollars trying to defeat me. I’m a hard target for them, but they’ll try mightily because Senate control is on the line.

What we knew was going to happen, **Scott Perry has decided _NOT_ to cooperate with the House Committee’s investigation on the deadly Jan. 6th insurrection.** [**This is a disgrace to our district and to our entire country. It’s up to us to make sure Scott Perry testifies and faces the consequences for his part in destroying our democracy. If you agree, sign on and share our latest petition today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39948168/322143910/625136854?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTg2MjYzNC04MDYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SaZD4iFuWQwRMhdgFWX2muby7xxq0gpyRMwBCa6cS2c=&emci=da8a96a4-7463-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=35862634-8063-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=10203249) **[SIGN HERE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39948169/322143911/625136854?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTg2MjYzNC04MDYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SaZD4iFuWQwRMhdgFWX2muby7xxq0gpyRMwBCa6cS2c=&emci=da8a96a4-7463-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=35862634-8063-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=10203249)** As of now, Rep. Scott Perry is **_one of the only_** sitting members of Congress to be called to testify, under oath, for his involvement in the deadly insurrection that pushed our democracy to the brink. In fact, he’s been mentioned almost _**50 TIMES**_ in the Senate's own investigation. What is he hiding? It’s clear he’s violated his oath of office and any shred of trust he has left for the people of this district. It’s time for the committee to release what they have and for Rep. Perry to be subpoenaed to testify under oath – no more games, no more theatrics. [**But we need you to make it happen. We need our supporters to sign on and share our latest petition to make sure that every voice is heard: we need Scott Perry to be held accountable for his actions. Will you do your part and sign on right now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39948170/322143912/625136854?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTg2MjYzNC04MDYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SaZD4iFuWQwRMhdgFWX2muby7xxq0gpyRMwBCa6cS2c=&emci=da8a96a4-7463-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=35862634-8063-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=10203249) We deserve to know exactly what happened, and what led up to the attack on Congress that left 5 people dead and almost destroyed our democracy and the peaceful transition of our government for the first time in centuries. It’s time to cut the right-wing nonsense and let the January 6th Congressional Committee do the work it needs to do. We need to know everything they know about Scott Perry’s involvement, and we need Rep. Perry to stand up, face the fire, testify under oath, and be held accountable for his actions. [**If you believe that Scott Perry must testify and be held accountable for his actions in the January 6th insurrection, then I need you to sign on to my petition today. I need my supporters to have their voices heard, and for us to finally get to the bottom of what happened, so we can get back to fighting for our district.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39948171/322143913/625136854?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTg2MjYzNC04MDYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SaZD4iFuWQwRMhdgFWX2muby7xxq0gpyRMwBCa6cS2c=&emci=da8a96a4-7463-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=35862634-8063-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=10203249) Thank you,

\--- Eugene

clean_body: We need to hold Scott Perry accountable, but we also need to keep the fight going. | | = Here it is, team. What we knew was going to happen, Scott Perry has decided NOT to cooperate with the House Committee’s investigation on the deadly Jan. 6th insurrection. As of now, Rep. Scott Perry is one of the only sitting members of Congress to be called to testify, under oath, for his involvement in the deadly insurrection that pushed our democracy to the brink. In fact, he’s been mentioned almost 50 TIMES in the Senate's own investigation. What is he hiding? It’s clear he’s violated his oath of office and any shred of trust he has left for the people of this district. It’s time for the committee to release what they have and for Rep. Perry to be subpoenaed to testify under oath – no more games, no more theatrics. We deserve to know exactly what happened, and what led up to the attack on Congress that left 5 people dead and almost destroyed our democracy and the peaceful transition of our government for the first time in centuries. It’s time to cut the right-wing nonsense and let the January 6th Congressional Committee do the work it needs to do. We need to know everything they know about Scott Perry’s involvement, and we need Rep. Perry to stand up, face the fire, testify under oath, and be held accountable for his actions. Thank you, \--- Eugene ** | | Eugene DePasquale has dedicated his public service to tirelessly fighting for working people, our senior citizens, and our most vulnerable. Will you pitch in any amount to help us elect a real leader to represent PA-10? = ** PAID FOR BY DEPASQUALE FOR PA-10 Follow Eugene on social media for campaign updates: DePasquale for PA 10 P.O. disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I didn’t want to be the one to tell you this but we’re out of option and Conservatives are dangerously behind our LAST AND MOST CRUCIAL deadline of the year.
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?34o8x--fgxr-4qqlpo9&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

This is Sarah Huckabee Sanders. I have a personal favor to ask of you:
[**I’m hoping you’ll pitch in $17 right now. Why? Because Democrats just CRUSHED their “must-hit” fundraising goal AND outraised us by $115,000,000+ from texts and emails like this one.**](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-34o8x-1qgwf-4qqlpo1/)
Conservatives are so close to winning back the House but if we give up now, all our hard work will be for NOTHING.
**This is urgent.** I’m partnering with my friend Steve Scalise to build an unstoppable surge of support to help our Conservative allies and defeat the Democrats NATIONWIDE.
[**We are both counting on you to be a part of it.**](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-34o8x-1qgwg-4qqlpo2/)
Look, we don’t have scores of Trump-hating billionaires forking over tons of cash to our campaigns, and we don’t have the Liberal Media on our side _**(trust me, I know that better than anyone)**... _
**But what we DO have is something to be much more proud of:**
We have a movement of strong Conservative Patriots who love our Country and believe we should ALWAYS PUT AMERICA FIRST.
[**We cannot win back the House alone. Please do your part and join us by chipping in $17 or more straight away.**](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-34o8x-1qgwh-4qqlpo3/)
Thanks for all you do.

body:
It's hard to find someone with both great policy ideas and the ability to deliver real results. Cora Neumann is one of those rare people. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39940957/322107950/1820125544?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDY3ZDE3Zi01NzYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I22ug8HgFwQdNRjQGQYo-EQBiOxyY2MivlBRmT7mR8E=) Hi friend, Moffie Funk here.

**I'm proud to share that I have endorsed Cora Neumann's campaign in Montana’s new 1st Congressional District. Let me explain why:**

Back in 2014, I was elected to serve in Montana’s House of Representatives, and I’ve served alongside a number of incredible elected officials since. I can tell you from experience how rare it is to find someone with both great policy ideas and the ability to deliver real results. **Cora Neumann is one of those rare people.**

She has an undeniable commitment to communities across this state. Her voice is strong and her knowledge, energy, and innovative ideas make her the best choice to represent Montana in Washington.

**[Cora has a major year-end fundraising deadline at the end of this month and needs help picking up the pace to hit her goal. clean_body: It's hard to find someone with both great policy ideas and the ability to deliver real results. Cora Neumann is one of those rare people. | = Hi friend, Moffie Funk here. I'm proud to share that I have endorsed Cora Neumann's campaign in Montana’s new 1st Congressional District. Let me explain why: Back in 2014, I was elected to serve in Montana’s House of Representatives, and I’ve served alongside a number of incredible elected officials since. I can tell you from experience how rare it is to find someone with both great policy ideas and the ability to deliver real results. Cora Neumann is one of those rare people. She has an undeniable commitment to communities across this state. Her voice is strong and her knowledge, energy, and innovative ideas make her the best choice to represent Montana in Washington. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = I know what it takes to run for office in a state as big as Montana. It’s not for the faint of heart. Money isn’t everything, but it sure helps get your message out. And if there’s one thing I know about Cora, it’s that she’s not afraid of a challenge. = Thank you! = Moffie Funk Montana State Representative, District 82 = Paid for by Cora for Montana Cora Neumann is a public health and economic development expert running for Congress in Montana's new 1st Congressional District. To learn more about Cora, visit her website Consider supporting Cora's campaign = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Cora for Montana PO Box 428 Bozeman, MT 59771 United States

name: =?utf-8?Q?Tracey=20Mann?=
subject: The Democrats’ Days are Numbered
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mann for Congress, Inc
body:
I need your help today... | | |
---
| |
---
| Friends, Thank you for your continued support as I work to represent the First District of Kansas. Serving the Big First District and upholding our Kansas conservative values in Washington, D.C. is one of the greatest privileges of my life. I’m writing today to ask you to help me keep fighting for you and your families, push back against the big government socialism that is hurting America, and help support the election of other candidates who will join me in the fight to take back the House of Representatives. The Democrats’ days are numbered. Americans have been decisively rejecting this administration’s policies, President Biden’s approval rating is at an all-time low, and Nancy Pelosi has a toxic, shortsighted, socialist agenda. The outright deceitful build back better plan, unconstitutional vaccine mandates, and wasteful government spending have all soured the American people on this administration and their party. With your support, I can continue to advocate for agriculture and conservative Kansas values. I am working to make sure Republicans regain control of the House and Senate as soon as possible. We want to fire Pelosi and bring common sense back to our Country, and it can’t happen without your support. Your donation today will provide the fuel I need to keep fighting for a better tomorrow. [(click here to donate online)](https://traceymann.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60a16ea89a176679a5f31366c&id=3dcb9ebc0f&e=a9d1410029) I did not run for office to be a caretaker in the slow demise of our great nation. I ran to work hard for you, for your quality of life, and for the future of our children. Since I was sworn in, I have introduced 15 different bills that would help agriculture, strengthen private property rights, limit the President’s ability to issue executive orders, stop attacks on the 2nd Amendment, help our veterans, and end abortion. I have also cosponsored over 252 other pieces of legislation that would help our nation get back on track. But, in order for these bills to help our country, we must elect a Republican majority to the U.S. House. Your contribution will go directly to stopping the progressive socialist agenda in its tracks. Whether $11,600 (the maximum for a married couple) or $25, please know that your contribution is greatly appreciated and I will use it wisely. The challenges facing our nation are great, but our opportunities and potential are even greater – with hard work, our brightest days are yet to come.

Yours in the fight,

Tracey Mann

P.S. I will continue to stand for Kansas as we move forward, and I will do everything in my power to ensure that our kids have a bright future. Please _[(click here)](https://traceymann.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60a16ea89a176679a5f31366c&id=36f6ee23ea&e=a9d1410029)_ to donate by Dec 31st and help take our country back.
