name: Team De Gregorio
subject: De Gregorio: “Nothing Will Stop Me from Defending My Home”
body:
Vows Aggressive Campaign for CD5—Newly-Drawn By Partisan Gottheimer Allies
---
| | | | | | |
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_isyP3AdmXKOdkh9Vc6dCuPma73d3fHWmvT3nzq4CosGp-pP36nc5MUox3iXnYufW81RbEMkftaXO_Ob9zkEycEH1DIPONeGo-Amv-F8do4lQGsfxViUQQGqBU4I3uiD8awhMuoERnH1cMbDC3ZOGw==&c=x85IVQGkjE6nVYLXRoOkYDQr4EQozf22l9av6K4M8t8DQhaqgUHoHA==&ch=UtoP-o3FXJGjywKmzlJ0m3Uw5zdIKbpOSTKp22p6cL7FSr8to-8bew==)
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE Press@NickForNJ.com December 22, 2021 De Gregorio: "Nothing Will Stop Me from Defending My Home" Vows Aggressive Campaign for CD5--Newly-Drawn By Partisan Gottheimer Allies FAIR LAWN - Today, Nick De Gregorio, a Marine Veteran and Republican Candidate for Congress in New Jersey's Fifth Congressional District, released the following statement in response to the newly-drawn New Jersey Congressional map:
"With President Biden's approval tanking and inflation on the rise, Josh Gottheimer had no choice but to beg his allies on the Redistricting Commission to bail him out with a grossly gerrymandered map," said De Gregorio.
"But if Gottheimer and his cronies thought they could intimidate me from running, they were dead wrong. I am running, and I will win.
"The Democrats' radical agenda of higher taxes, reckless spending, defunding the police, and silencing parents will not succeed anywhere in America--and least of all in a district that saw Jack Ciattarelli run neck-and-neck with Phil Murphy despite being massively outspent.
"Home is always worth defending. Just as I fought against our nation's enemies overseas, I will continue to fight here to preserve and protect this country for my children and all future generations of Americans."
###
---
| | |
---

name: Mark Takano
subject: humbly asking you, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39948508/322145954/-2042826227?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDJmNTc0Ni04MzYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1lpGB3_x859GzvC4BUKugTGYeYFuWt1AbDUC5QFCJ3M=)
---
**Peter – If we lose the House majority next November, MAGA Republicans will derail President Biden’s agenda and roll back every step of progress.**

They’re already talking about making _Trump Speaker of the House,

Impeaching President Biden,

Passing absurd and harmful policies,

**And shooting down every single piece of legislation Democrats bring to the table.**_

The people who organized the January 6th violent insurrection on the Capitol would be back in power!

clean_body: I rely on grassroots supporters like you. | = | Peter, It’s not enough that my far-right opponent Lisa Scheller is pouring her own wealth into her campaign — there are also several Republican outside groups spending big against me. This is nothing new — just look at how much outside groups spent against me in 2020: = | = I’m not like my opponent. I don’t have millions of dollars of personal wealth to spend on my own campaign, and I don’t have shady outside groups spending on me the way Republicans are spending on her. I rely on grassroots supporters like you, Peter. = | = | = Every dollar you can spare makes me better equipped to stand up against Republican attacks. name: MattandCynthiaforRI.com
subject: Climate justice is housing justice
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Matt Brown for Governor and Friends of Cynthia
body:
While #SleepOutRI successfully won immediate action to ensure no one
freezes to death in Rhode Island this winter, we can’t forget that the
long-term solutions to resolving our housing crisis are tied directly to
climate justice.

Housing accounts for nearly 20% of Rhode Island’s emissions. That’s why a
major pillar of our platform is a Green New Deal for Rhode Island that
will slash carbon emissions, create good-paying union jobs, reduce air
pollution in our most polluted neighborhoods, and build thousands of
affordable and low-income green homes.

[ https://act.mattandcynthiaforri.com/signup/housing-gnd-petition-20211222/?t=1003&akid=329%2E43343%2E4ReBRD ]Matt and Cynthia know that housing justice is climate
justice.
Will you add your name to endorse a Green New Deal for Rhode Island?

[ https://act.mattandcynthiaforri.com/signup/housing-gnd-petition-20211222/?t=1004&akid=329%2E43343%2E4ReBRD ]ADD YOUR NAME

The climate crisis has laid bare the intersections between the economy,
housing, food insecurity, and racial and environmental injustice.

That’s exactly why we need a majority in the State House who won’t cave to
the fossil fuel lobby and will pass a Green New Deal for Rhode Island.

Thank you,

Team Matt & Cynthia

PO Box 2574 Providence, RI 02906

[ https://act.mattandcynthiaforri.com/go/445?t=1001&akid=329%2E43343%2E4ReBRD ]www.mattandcynthiaforri.com | [ mailto:info@mattandcynthiaforri.com ]info@mattandcynthiaforri.com |
[ https://act.mattandcynthiaforri.com/go/446?t=1002&akid=329%2E43343%2E4ReBRD ]Privacy Policy

[4]Matt and Cynthia for Rhode Island

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.mattandcynthiaforri.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=329%2E43343%2E4ReBRD

| | Hey Team - Jon here, Garrett's political director.

**First off, I want to thank you for being a part of this movement.** What we're building here is truly one-of-a-kind, and our grassroots momentum is real.

As you know, Garrett is supported by an incredible wife and wonderful family, who are taking this week off the campaign trail to spend some quality time together this holiday season.

Our campaign team had an idea for a Christmas present that we think Garrett would really appreciate - _a virtual Christmas Card signed by our movement's top supporters._

name: Josh Hawley
subject: Democrats, Stop Demonizing The Police!!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate
body:
[](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=adcbeeacf3fe4587b722bd3373f4d526&_e=d3xoUxDFd3Ul3TQmLvvceCO6E3aJnxag9q-0fhN5QXdgwI-qiLzmXzNfzKTRcDld4pQ7-H9mhXDYXU_rTquGe5KDH5L0QV-PZbTHZEyucgmf5iRw8BPiWJrimeZ5OLb6Uc1_pSKQaJLyrHmQqRpqPhWAMuW6DC8nKE93Y5P--TS3u7otCLdfSfEwq9rK-pZDAyvDsyTRsZZGGAwF_e3ySqTHP4dMdi9GigrykL3qJPuSn8SOn42cbhvDSn2kJDZxYI0N3EEzGuNY8jCGssV_bFbHajslmtmqkKxRFdGoVqmynxKqacUMrqyIIbOnDun0StpxJixnGsUvhrQg2fsYwDnvtKtctWHD9Ft01rkJOTZFB2lrzTsP0DD7_UxG-eJsHMP3HYzHy_QibJNZBP4lOibcZSyYsFdYz43DqZDX7u8%3D) | |
---
Peter,
Cities across America have seen a record number of murders this year (SEE MAP BELOW)— a tragedy. The rhetoric pushed by the left of “Defund the Police” and other more offensive epithets has taken a toll on our men and women in law enforcement.

America has seen an exodus of law enforcement members leaving, and who can blame them when democrats spent the last year and a half demonizing police officers across the nation? What is the result of this? Murder rates in cities across the nation have skyrocketed and are hitting all-time highs.

I won’t sit by and watch our heroes in blue get disparaged by the Left while Americans live in fear because their neighborhoods are more dangerous.
[](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=adcbeeacf3fe4587b722bd3373f4d526&_e=d3xoUxDFd3Ul3TQmLvvceCO6E3aJnxag9q-0fhN5QXdgwI-qiLzmXzNfzKTRcDld4pQ7-H9mhXDYXU_rTquGe5KDH5L0QV-PZbTHZEyucgmf5iRw8BPiWJrimeZ5OLb6Uc1_pSKQaJLyrHmQqRpqPhWAMuW6DC8nKE93Y5P--TS3u7otCLdfSfEwq9rK-pZDAyvDsyTRsZZGGAwF_e3ySqPn2-Nagp-HGmnJ9kD8KVhIePTmiIBOxCeO77uONlLoVNxLCEg1ET5jtBEs9hMKB1UeiuC_PHjc6oI0tdTbCEVrfjdEbrKwCLkF7JcPD7sn5fDogpjATZMwGqJ_W8-26adCcvMyCHdN0PpzDkWTx3ZudGjuvkbk6ZK2glWcDNHg3X9oGAxcGnwC_qpXj0MBwZKyZo3kh-kHzjatzW1Vix4%3D)
Instead of taking the Democrats' tactic of shaming and blaming the police for all of society's problems, I am taking _**REAL ACTION**_ — I introduced legislation in the Senate to hire 100,000 new police officers across the country. We must send the left a message — everyday Americans want _**SAFER NEIGHBORHOODS**_ , and hiring more police is the best way to do that!

If you believe that we need _**MORE COPS**_ , not less, join my campaign and help make America a safer place to live and raise a family!
[_**DONATE TO THE MOVEMENT**_](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=adcbeeacf3fe4587b722bd3373f4d526&_e=d3xoUxDFd3Ul3TQmLvvceCO6E3aJnxag9q-0fhN5QXdgwI-qiLzmXzNfzKTRcDld4pQ7-H9mhXDYXU_rTquGe5KDH5L0QV-PZbTHZEyucgmf5iRw8BPiWJrimeZ5OLb6Uc1_pSKQaJLyrHmQqRpqPhWAMuW6DC8nKE93Y5P--TS3u7otCLdfSfEwq9rK-pZDAyvDsyTRsZZGGAwF_e3ySq-ljzRxIk48Lt11Y26DWN4_vvpMquluD8iskmtQNUEJQRQntw41sVuu3BLgKqWuMMm_B00r8HPlenwfFNG772lYl-2m5X7cQT68O7CJPOZRDW3FPSUW8vGMOJywc8YMU7_0JmB7TfsWpFLBZFd29jJCqGOZVCOHYPqSqYUoGVg3rJV52a56Z3P0Ol--VF8uhMCny7WcXL4QjEkNXbiCXJY%3D)
Thank you,
Josh Hawley
|

name: Primary Sinema Project
subject: NEW: Sinema skips out on voting rights bill debatefor…Ecuador?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHANGE FOR ARIZONA 2024 PAC**
body:
She really said no to saving democracy and yes to international travel amid a COVID surge. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ylv71NjtRp9uAvapwZeG5Fwod7vf2Q19deFkSzINQB7pYO7Ed0TOwyvjuedJ39zpEnMq3REs_6qpHFEbObeQSeVtQfDWNLS6IBFr9NtQcwPCmjcoJo6t6y39xW3exZypF__9Qa9fO1Z5Vndlk8FM66hh8MGxztwuJC3op3k_0HSKO4vl0ECqkw8afuuEY_BDoNGfKK8mF_0ATpQxpFj9DN4DRyJ2XSQT_3S5q__L0OjS6pxQQu2QardQx-nz5PbicOJEbN5wAc5HVus74RZuQiS160NYyZ4UmLvUS6onNPmR_uY5cXdVZXLcYK59yvhlK29jATZNutzZuQ4hgrYc8lO7YPwuDTSvGBNRMZClpeDw/3i2/2KWmDTYnSGeGsnmDMsyFgQ/h0/Lqe6i5ZsmngJRbSAos9fjrT67wMxTO5uooJ9-D_dado)
Peter: We just learned that last week, while Democrats were trying to land a deal on voting rights, Kyrsten Sinema declared that she was done for the year because she had plane tickets to Ecuador. She flew out yesterday for a _vacation_ ...as COVID-19 cases skyrocket across the U.S. and the world...leaving the filibuster untouched, voting rights under threat, and Democrats’ entire legislative agenda in the lurch. **[Sen. Sinema’s disrespect for the people she is sworn to serve is staggering — we need to hold her accountable for it NOW. name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Cancel it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Peter, President Biden just announced that he is extending the pause on student loan payments until May 1, 2022!
This is great news for more than 42 million Americans, especially the nearly 80% of student loan borrowers that say they’re not financially ready to restart payments. Today’s news is thanks to our continued organizing, and it’s a testament to what happens when we speak out.
**But this is not enough. Simply delaying these crushing payments is not going to cut it.** President Biden must use his power to cancel at least $50,000 of student loan debt per borrower. All it takes is his signature.
[**Are you with me in this fight? If so, chip in to fuel our work today and let’s finally cancel student debt across America.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/9074?refcode=em20211222-898&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=898%2E420207%2Ewh5tUx)
**[Contribute $3 »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/9074?refcode=em20211222-898&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=898%2E420207%2Ewh5tUx)**
Once May 1 passes, folks crushed by student loan debt — debt that disproportionately affects women and people of color — will have to start paying again. That will mean picking between paying their loans and putting food on the table.
It’s clear: canceling student loan debt is the right thing to do. We must continue our organizing to make sure President Biden does the right thing.
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20211222-898-footer&t=21&refcode2=898_420207_wh5tUx&akid=898%2E420207%2Ewh5tUx)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=22&akid=898%2E420207%2Ewh5tUx)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=23&akid=898%2E420207%2Ewh5tUx)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

name: Cheri Beasley
subject: unacceptable
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
We need Build Back Better.
#

Friends -
As I travel the state, I meet with so many North Carolinians who can’t afford medication they need. Who struggle to balance jobs and caring for their families. Who are relying on tax cuts like the Child Tax Credit to pay for school supplies, medical care and more.
By not passing legislation like Build Back Better, politicians in Washington are failing families in North Carolina.
One thing is for sure: A 50 seat majority is not enough. This race in North Carolina is our opportunity to change that — and change what is possible.
**[If you’re ready to see real progress in the Senate, please make a $3 donation today to help us flip this seat. North Carolina is our best opportunity to expand the majority in 2022.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-dec21?refcode=em211222-1-ma&refcode2=168.357359.I_LcnV&t=1&akid=168%2E357359%2EI_LcnV)**

---
****
When I became Chief Justice of the NC Supreme Court, I learned we didn’t have a paid family leave policy.
It was unacceptable, so I created a family leave policy for more than 6,000 employees in our court system. It made a difference for a lot of families.
And it’s with that experience in mind that I say: we must pass paid family and medical leave.
Our best path forward right now is to fight as hard as we can to expand our majority. I promise to always be a vote and voice for justice and for the people in the Senate, but first, we need your help to flip this seat.
**[If you can, please make a $3 donation to our campaign to turn North Carolina blue today. Corporate special interests are going to spend a fortune to try to stop us, but together, we can win and change what’s possible.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-dec21?refcode=em211222-1-ma&refcode2=168.357359.I_LcnV&t=26&akid=168%2E357359%2EI_LcnV)**

[_**Peter — here’s why we keep emailing you to ask for $5 or more to fuel this campaign:**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39949017/322156061/-209395382?refcode=BLU-JRFC-20211222-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkY2FjMjU3NS04NzYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FZRcVyoKzzTvIBkArd681yMUsBHAcM08jTNqykcyTRM=)

**FIRST:** Claudia Tenney took money from special interests like pharmaceutical companies and funneled over $100k into companies SHE controls!

body:

We're virtually tied with the Democrat incumbent even though I've never run for political office before. It's incredible that this race would be so close out of the starting gate! On the other hand, this is also alarming news because national Democrats see how tight the race is and are desperately re-doubling their efforts to attack our campaign and prevent us from pulling ahead. The 4th quarter is the first full fundraising quarter we've had since entering this race, so we need to show strength on our year-end fundraising report. Our finance team has told me we need 338 more donors to give to our campaign BEFORE MIDNIGHT to give us the boost we need on our critical Federal Election Commission report. Republicans MUST WIN BACK the Senate majority this election. Everything is on the line: our military, our economy, the security of our streets and border, and the very fabric of our nation. It's clear that this 50-50 Senate split isn't working for the American people

---
Friend – I wanted to make sure you saw my note, because it's important.
It's clear that this 50-50 Senate split isn't working for the American people – a single senator can stand in the way of the progress the country desperately needs.

The Senate needs one more vote to provide universal preschool. One more vote to take action on the climate crisis. One more vote to extend the child tax credit and the other shared priorities to make sure working families can thrive.
I'm running for Senate to be that final vote Democrats need to build back better, but I can't win without your help. **[Will you rush $5 right now to defeat Marco Rubio and give Democrats the 51st vote they need to keep this country moving forward?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39949109/322158238/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk2002-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDEzY2IyOC04ODYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JtGwjBpg2OUVgvedV7QJcPd-Oypgh_22Lj1f9_Tzw4w=)**
I'll never stop fighting for American families.

Thanks for joining this movement,

Val Demings
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Val Demings**
Date: Sun, Dec 19, 2021
Subject: I will be the 50th vote for the Build Back Better Act
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39949110/322158239/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2002-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDEzY2IyOC04ODYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JtGwjBpg2OUVgvedV7QJcPd-Oypgh_22Lj1f9_Tzw4w=)

I want you to hear this directly from me, friend:

**The Senate is broken, and we can’t let any one senator stand in the way of progress like the Build Back Better Act. We have to expand our Senate majority. **

This is a once-in-a-generation piece of legislation, and if I were in the Senate I would fight like hell to make sure it passed.

That's why I'm here today personally asking you – **will you support my campaign to become the 50th vote Democrats need in the Senate to pass critical legislation like the Build Back Better Act?**

**[Please, give now to defeat Marco Rubio and defend the Democratic Senate majority. Every single dollar helps in this critical race that would guarantee a Democratic Senate and enough votes to pass our agenda.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39949111/322158240/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2002-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDEzY2IyOC04ODYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JtGwjBpg2OUVgvedV7QJcPd-Oypgh_22Lj1f9_Tzw4w=)**

**The Build Back Better Act could do so much for everyday Americans:**

– It could provide the largest funding increase to Medicaid since its creation, expand Medicare and reduce the cost of prescription drugs.
– It could help support more than 17 million low-wage workers.
– It could make the single largest investment in affordable housing in history.
– It could represent the largest effort to combat climate change in American history.

And so much more. **This kind of legislation is what more than 81 million Americans voted for last year – but too many of our elected officials continue to stand in the way.**

I promise you, I'll fight for – and vote for – this progress every single day as your next U.S. senator.

**But I can't get there without your help.[Please, will you make a donation to my campaign right now to send another Democrat to the U.S. Senate who will fight for everyday Americans and secure President Biden's Senate majority for two more years?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39949116/322158245/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2002-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDEzY2IyOC04ODYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JtGwjBpg2OUVgvedV7QJcPd-Oypgh_22Lj1f9_Tzw4w=)**

I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. Will you donate today to help me flip Florida blue? **[Click here to donate now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39949119/322158248/1804727444?refcode=jtk2002-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDEzY2IyOC04ODYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JtGwjBpg2OUVgvedV7QJcPd-Oypgh_22Lj1f9_Tzw4w=)** If you’d like to purchase merchandise to show your support for this campaign, **[please click here to visit my campaign store.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39949120/322158249/-460395862?refcode=jtk2002-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDEzY2IyOC04ODYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JtGwjBpg2OUVgvedV7QJcPd-Oypgh_22Lj1f9_Tzw4w=&emci=dc62bc7c-6763-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=b013cb28-8863-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=20244100)** Thank you for your continued support. Dear Friend,
This is a campaign about opportunity. It’s about giving all Marylanders a chance to succeed.
This is the state where I raised my two boys, graduated college, started a small business, became a member of the House of Delegates, and became the first woman to serve as the cabinet secretary for the Department of Labor and the Department of Commerce – now, I’m running for governor. [**

My story is an example of what is possible to achieve here in Maryland.
And this campaign is about making sure that all Marylanders have the opportunities to pursue their own dreams, and that is only going to happen if we continue to keep moving our state in the right direction.
[**With your help, we can keep moving forward. **](https://u21639199.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=DRhu97MwZOafZz0axKBSuHM4TyUiRDjO7WRT-2Bn4igr193XMreDNS7fl2A4g9SL86i-2FQV5YOPuH0GDsJb-2FO7ExkBjXqRBrIOoMy6FNa1GOnQPk2e86ik6qA6xLoaFtaZTlfdd_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz6qN8GNotieWoUp8KVtatPqzAGfn-2BbmN-2B4Ir8NMwrefF4HzLO30Jde1WSuNlLLUeJR-2BgPeSEWIL6-2B3NS2PSQpWJ-2FyUF-2B3Q63AjhqtmemGG-2FcAe-2FfXCE0AYDWvpfB7zuAFB9j6mwAcMXyHEOPsV0-2BkL2J4HZAdFyi8pyGYNd85SX6pCen6JJXUV1gevvs-2BKLUS3OGcgTDj1zJ-2FlQrY5HkJyHB2uFRegjhbxM6Fdjjr-2BAyJNRJSdX0Ph-2FCTHz-2B7X3z2Mq2Ny-2FSpxl2CpzmYjNgBB5mkDLXNDD8CrMueQeqvXe1dfPs9pmnscQAYjpRjVhEdWD0kKcgbSgPXlaP97xFNm8l2Mbh6PzuVlPd4y4Umr3MILktmX3uxZMTDL6scsNV7f-2FYc6rECqemRq0uWS-2FKXch-2Fyb2XEX6adUDjAiJBSjh58qtd0EfHqUqSBUXz3OOiuBZP-2FNYrecf5hU7eb77tly3ru86UiQ3lXKcDfsn0Ztr-2FNlgl467uWbTHzoxW3x-2BaO08wX4lv4DgrJ0jdoP3S6WOlhZhiry9FzEyjXZ6jdT90qbplNmUTV0MkCyNgjA8wz5-2B2nCr3T2S9a32-2Fbf945b-2Be1Jlz-2BXrojHbSnV3jfxQMkmQZbBcYZyLYB9Vhtfp7wBZG6KMJ0b1HsHcNVSA-2BJP-2BudjV62NKFOYl9ZV8jUnCSrJ-2F1JLLRHU2c2Ha8BZAju5Q4INFNziR6gmLDyOYbv0EnB8U6YJ17gHRd6RXStA9HuSDDmqo2Z6DG9UWYHtysOdrcHvlbpyYfz-2FBl0xXBxwALlq0-2F-2FMQaZwsHfJ4Q-2FiJCFxXqlRtpOa9OIknLObbgyNHC6YQ5L2TRV7XyMlz62tQA-3D-3D)
Over the last eight years, Governor Hogan has led this state in the right direction. We’ve made tremendous progress cutting taxes, creating jobs, and making Maryland a more affordable place to live. I’ve been proud to serve in the Hogan administration and I’ve been proud to stand with the governor.
Each one of my opponents wants to take this state in a drastically different direction. I want to build upon the successes of the past eight years, and **I am the only candidate in this race who will be able to do that.**

clean_body: | | | | This is a campaign about opportunity - It’s about giving all Marylanders a chance to succeed. Dear Friend, This is a campaign about opportunity. It’s about giving all Marylanders a chance to succeed. This is the state where I raised my two boys, graduated college, started a small business, became a member of the House of Delegates, and became the first woman to serve as the cabinet secretary for the Department of Labor and the Department of Commerce – now, I’m running for governor. My story is an example of what is possible to achieve here in Maryland. And this campaign is about making sure that all Marylanders have the opportunities to pursue their own dreams, and that is only going to happen if we continue to keep moving our state in the right direction. Over the last eight years, Governor Hogan has led this state in the right direction. We’ve made tremendous progress cutting taxes, creating jobs, and making Maryland a more affordable place to live. I’ve been proud to serve in the Hogan administration and I’ve been proud to stand with the governor. Each one of my opponents wants to take this state in a drastically different direction. I want to build upon the successes of the past eight years, and I am the only candidate in this race who will be able to do that. Sincerely, | | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | instagram.com/kellymschulz "Instagram" ---|---|--- Kelly Schulz P.O. Box 6528, Annapolis, MD 21401 Authority: Kelly Schulz for Governor, Inc. Treasurer: Sam Malhotra

body:
This Christmas is going to be the most expensive EVER.
[](https://a.crowdskout.com/v1-1/email-click/aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9mcmllbmRzLW9mLWNocmlzdGlhbi1uYXNjaW1lbnRvL21tX2hmX21vc3RleHBlbnNpdmVjaHJpc3RtYXNldmVy?b=eyJjc0lkIjo5OTI3OTc0MDcsImNsaWVudElkIjozNDA2LCJvcmdhbml6YXRpb25JZCI6IjIxODU1NTMiLCJzb3VyY2VJZCI6IjI5NDQyIiwiZW1haWxpbmdJZCI6bnVsbCwidjJFbWFpbGluZ0lkIjoxMTg3OSwiZnJvbSI6ImEzNTI1ODMyLTNjY2YtNDFiNy1iNTg2LWQ2NzU5OGU5NGMzZiJ9) Peter, **American families are facing the MOST EXPENSIVE CHRISTMAS EVER.** And it’s all thanks to Joe Biden’s disastrous economic policies. Prices are higher than ever, store shelves are empty, and Americans are facing more economic uncertainty than ever before under Joe Biden’s “leadership.” These are problems Communist and Socialist countries like North Korea and Venezuela deal with – _NOT the United States of America._ Make no mistake about it: if Republicans don’t WIN BIG in 2022, the Democrats will turn America into a **SOCIALIST NIGHTMARE.** **_Can I count on your support this giving season to help Republicans retake Congress from the Democrats?_** [_**Please CONTRIBUTE HERE to help END the destructive polices of Nancy Pelosi and House Democrats. >>**_](https://a.crowdskout.com/v1-1/email-click/aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9mcmllbmRzLW9mLWNocmlzdGlhbi1uYXNjaW1lbnRvL21tX2hmX21vc3RleHBlbnNpdmVjaHJpc3RtYXNldmVy?b=eyJjc0lkIjo5OTI3OTc0MDcsImNsaWVudElkIjozNDA2LCJvcmdhbml6YXRpb25JZCI6IjIxODU1NTMiLCJzb3VyY2VJZCI6IjI5NDQyIiwiZW1haWxpbmdJZCI6bnVsbCwidjJFbWFpbGluZ0lkIjoxMTg3OSwiZnJvbSI6ImEzNTI1ODMyLTNjY2YtNDFiNy1iNTg2LWQ2NzU5OGU5NGMzZiJ9) Did you ever think we’d have problems stocking shelves in America? Joe Biden and the Democrats are making a mockery of our country. We need strong, Conservative leaders in DC to protect our economy from Joe Biden’s tax-and-spend craziness. clean_body: This Christmas is going to be the most expensive EVER. Peter, American families are facing the MOST EXPENSIVE CHRISTMAS EVER. And it’s all thanks to Joe Biden’s disastrous economic policies. Prices are higher than ever, store shelves are empty, and Americans are facing more economic uncertainty than ever before under Joe Biden’s “leadership.” These are problems Communist and Socialist countries like North Korea and Venezuela deal with – NOT the United States of America. Make no mistake about it: if Republicans don’t WIN BIG in 2022, the Democrats will turn America into a SOCIALIST NIGHTMARE. Can I count on your support this giving season to help Republicans retake Congress from the Democrats? Did you ever think we’d have problems stocking shelves in America? Joe Biden and the Democrats are making a mockery of our country. We need strong, Conservative leaders in DC to protect our economy from Joe Biden’s tax-and-spend craziness. Sincerely, Christian Nascimento | | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by The Friends of Christian Nascimento

| A Message From Team Bruno We are so grateful for folks like you this year. **Below, we're sharing some incredible highlights from our year together, but before we do, can you chip in $10 now before our biggest fundraising deadline yet? Every day we get closer to 2022 is a day we can show how unfit Kevin McCarthy is to represent us in Congress.** [Contribute $10 »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wdVjEO4QrP5WbNA1-PnVdBux3ukqZ5OVwRapTFnCEYWMKjHDJaILMC5LIQvFprvVmLgQMeUQvY91YpnBgV52IYp7miqaRSHlwSX4dHGA4hOsTpd9nzxhM2UYjQIz4-vQFZu2lXrqOLPZXM2Bf6Svi8bY8B1gxyJHah1y2Iu33qyKENtqKPjdEHLCRJFICmM8PDH93-Y--U3cCxQCQ6R4ah10USSuiE7iNDZ9rdlUYY_S3LwRWb-IIp_xIT3mpRmr4BI07YGin_0cjK3RlLK3rTiqZE3cRKRGp2MV1cFO3otaJqvK7ZIgw7EWRurv94q74afgpCdENorOm4LvVvgYgO/3i2/6b-3VgxRQZiYi-VpImLeOA/h1/HrJyGFKoA9tQlcrvTrJpMf9WuCqGTFKzwYc31DkF_fA)

With support from people like you, we’ve been able to build a grassroots campaign for the people of CA-23 and we’re so proud of that. Here’s just a bit of what we accomplished together:

**Our Year Together**
* We launched an ad that we were able to share across our district and the country — [**if you haven’t seen it, click here to watch!**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wdVjEO4QrP5WbNA1-PnVdBIKVwrCIZKyfeCevkYY36O61uQtuV20-JLD05cZplxCW9TGi4_8izPr6h1_QSHm_dbdn5yOMVBoVpggbUAwrZ4DBlyFI3eNlI2ZtQynO8_5z9erkXgE8WJe38EIm9Q8AO9ScoFPLZW_j2h13vLHt5QT9wfcHnXpKJ2FtTzabHhvgTMAigb8wisUomGyh6N1MSuqy1nK3E57vC9mGOxN6TV1YnIqnhRw5ESi5gLarDWbCZTnXQTMz5sJsUCTPWJ1Hm0-yFGFmHVguiQWERvyreyKeHXd5EwN3greHFMvd8BURPIeba7uDqDwZTrlMgO02-/3i2/6b-3VgxRQZiYi-VpImLeOA/h2/WLhlDXVXsp_DEFISw__Kn0h5q0j2BKB29oLZVrH2uBI)

* We launched our first phone banks and canvasses in the district, engaging with people, and hearing about their concerns and hopes for their lives. Check out one of the photos of some amazing volunteers who turned out at our canvasses!

* Bruno attended events, including standing in solidarity with folks outside Kevin McCarthy’s Bakersfield district office, as we demanded that he fully support the investigation into the attempted insurrection on January 6th.

* Our movement was endorsed by VoteVets — a leading organization that helps veterans like Bruno run for office and win.

* Bruno called out Kevin McCarthy when he refused to condemn his colleagues for making dangerous racist statements.

* After the Supreme Court heard the first arguments in a case to potentially overturn Roe v. Wade, together, _we raised over $600 for the National Network for Abortion Funds._

* **And, we did all of this because people like you chipped in an average of $17.56.**

---
This is what a people-powered movement looks like. This is what we have built together.
In order to make sure we can keep ramping up our campaign and defeat Kevin McCarthy next year, we’re counting on folks like you to power our efforts.
Your contributions are what made everything possible this year — and they are what will help us win this election.
[**If you’re ready to defeat one of the most dangerous members of Congress and elect real leadership that will fight for working families, chip in what you can today and ensure we can hit the ground running in 2022.**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wdVjEO4QrP5WbNA1-PnVdBqj2NS_TrntczFnyniG-zlaPlErnVKJ1l1_WTlEhlxz-DK2_3pNT-AcSD_Ge-z5LRw7NCNMweSqqLTN0tPmoX1Dq-8counl9YAkcQTLyRyD_qe1VJlWDrtMcE_RtKFUHFhqKD_5fGlm_W5p0bEYeWJZWxfykiwbdtmd_lPToJwRibPyNPom8ynlUJ-8QRl4trp8ZPozYpSe9UfVi9VEHTNJKDiksbKwW_mpaeeAyImBWKON0SmIdLs1-JQou94q3mGFsd0k3lIHxuEuzuYTecVM7PXaSk2pfy6QelpJpyL6nTvMxQWBOYKphp4P-rwRiK/3i2/6b-3VgxRQZiYi-VpImLeOA/h3/kybT0_7ovpAh0Rix4py5UtMGPcrcMoBygByLNJxmQtE)
From all of us here on Team Bruno, we hope you have a safe, healthy, and happy holiday. Thank you for being with us in this fight.
In solidarity,
Team Bruno

Bruno has been backed by VoteVets, an organization committed to helping veterans run for office. clean_body: Your contributions are what made all of this possible this year — and they are what will help us win this election. | | | | A Message From Team Bruno We are so grateful for folks like you this year. Below, we're sharing some incredible highlights from our year together, but before we do, can you chip in $10 now before our biggest fundraising deadline yet? Every day we get closer to 2022 is a day we can show how unfit Kevin McCarthy is to represent us in Congress. With support from people like you, we’ve been able to build a grassroots campaign for the people of CA-23 and we’re so proud of that. Here’s just a bit of what we accomplished together: Our Year Together We launched an ad that we were able to share across our district and the country — We launched our first phone banks and canvasses in the district, engaging with people, and hearing about their concerns and hopes for their lives. Check out one of the photos of some amazing volunteers who turned out at our canvasses! Bruno attended events, including standing in solidarity with folks outside Kevin McCarthy’s Bakersfield district office, as we demanded that he fully support the investigation into the attempted insurrection on January 6th. Our movement was endorsed by VoteVets — a leading organization that helps veterans like Bruno run for office and win. Bruno called out Kevin McCarthy when he refused to condemn his colleagues for making dangerous racist statements. After the Supreme Court heard the first arguments in a case to potentially overturn Roe v. Wade, together, we raised over $600 for the National Network for Abortion Funds. And, we did all of this because people like you chipped in an average of $17.56. This is what a people-powered movement looks like. This is what we have built together. In order to make sure we can keep ramping up our campaign and defeat Kevin McCarthy next year, we’re counting on folks like you to power our efforts. Your contributions are what made everything possible this year — and they are what will help us win this election. From all of us here on Team Bruno, we hope you have a safe, healthy, and happy holiday. Thank you for being with us in this fight. In solidarity, Team Bruno | ---|--- Bruno Amato is a proud veteran, working class guy, a Democrat, and is committed to serving his country once again by running for Congress in California’s 23rd District.** Unlike some lifelong politicians in Washington, Bruno is ready to roll up his sleeves and get to work for the great people of the Central Valley. Bruno has been backed by VoteVets, an organization committed to helping veterans run for office. He is running to fight for universal healthcare, economic justice, and real investments in education, and so much more. He's not taking a dime from corporations or corporate PACs — because he's running to work for the people. Paid for by Bruno Amato for Congress PO BOX 22472 BAKERSFIELD, CA 93390

body:
I am running for re-election to serve as the Congresswoman from California’s 51st Congressional District.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39943782/322123467/-1384613475?refcode=BLU-SJC-20211222-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTA5OTBkZC02MjYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5lvw0kLL8n85jefV5PCtF1w6KkuXYEAkoXuhH1qaP4I=)

| This week, the California Independent Redistricting Commission delivered their final revised maps of our congressional districts. I am excited to continue to serve so many of my current constituents and a number of new communities that mean so much to San Diego in the newly drawn 51st Congressional District.

I am so proud of what we’ve accomplished during my time in Congress thus far, from delivering the Child Tax Credit to passing the historic Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act to passing the Build Back Better bill in the House. Additionally, I have stood with my colleagues to demand an extension of the federal eviction moratorium, cosponsored 339 pieces of legislation, and was the only freshman member appointed to Speaker Pelosi’s Select Committee on Economic Disparity and Fairness in Growth.

**But there’s so much more work still to be done: that’s why I’m excited to share with you today that I am running for re-election to serve as the Congresswoman from California’s 51st Congressional District.** [_**Will you become a founding donor of my 2022 campaign with a contribution of any amount today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39943783/322123468/-1384613475?refcode=BLU-SJC-20211222-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTA5OTBkZC02MjYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5lvw0kLL8n85jefV5PCtF1w6KkuXYEAkoXuhH1qaP4I=)

clean_body: I am running for re-election to serve as the Congresswoman from California’s 51st Congressional District. | = | This week, the California Independent Redistricting Commission delivered their final revised maps of our congressional districts. I am excited to continue to serve so many of my current constituents and a number of new communities that mean so much to San Diego in the newly drawn 51st Congressional District. I am so proud of what we’ve accomplished during my time in Congress thus far, from delivering the Child Tax Credit to passing the historic Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act to passing the Build Back Better bill in the House. Additionally, I have stood with my colleagues to demand an extension of the federal eviction moratorium, cosponsored 339 pieces of legislation, and was the only freshman member appointed to Speaker Pelosi’s Select Committee on Economic Disparity and Fairness in Growth. But there’s so much more work still to be done: that’s why I’m excited to share with you today that I am running for re-election to serve as the Congresswoman from California’s 51st Congressional District. = = Together, we can continue delivering real results for families and workers in California and across the country. Any amount you can give to show that you have my back as we enter a crucial election cycle will be deeply appreciated. = | | | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Sara * | | = Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress Sara Jacobs for Congress PO Box 120085 San Diego, CA 92112 United States | | | ---|---|--- = If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please

body:
Because Texas gained 2 NEW seats.
| [](https://links.wesleyhuntfortexas.com/u/click?_t=a8d68b28a7304093af83aba8f7fea4dc&_m=6bc83c0aacb8437b9115208bd3c445e9&_e=QurFoZGDZMFgVDJOnBe03FTo67TXY0ogvhE3ZgeQsEs8pdLaTE9A01dzsQwS2YUUEEcZcC4xhuJWDeOa3tYQGDT104QVGB81a9i3XaEKvkRCV8XGXS8ZLcbnJSwM3oBIat6q1Xs7pmvn4EoffPknKDVnffD5h5XdkotuXeMZAQKPQ2GmOwct0Cl0npW7nv8FhD8XDsUnqI0kRiHOU7X61RYqvOuZPZ5t6YiJCHVeuAFnExfgQ55TByIroDqpzloj5gDzV49E9_g9aVFY-uJOZFi6hz-HL-xcID9Ng9iFCJ57e_XAT-VQwB15gX4SGiHVTAwVdbRsNP8z83_kbPSBGj2lRmdqBAzXeXYkJiFhNkeFrjCNaVX9IHkULj5xUFG-QqbeeqE2UfjCvo--5lib7LaaWJg5TQ_W9Hc8UxZD3_8zN4Nq_E7Ba9ly1ARbvpXDfX58moOJ3M-e4fkybgwfsgiYXL5BjNAaXK8w-IxX7cggoJ_rBMtH5S3yK5RB9c1RtQHm7rws-4mU14kSw8FRaA%3D%3D)
---
Friend,
---
Nancy Pelosi privately admitted to her donors that her majority could fall apart because of Texas’ 2 NEW congressional seats.
---
**_That’s why I’ve set such an ambitious goal to raise $1,000,000 for our campaign’s final goal of the year as we fight to win one of Texas’ new seats._**
---
With only 5 seats needed to take back the House majority from Pelosi, our race will truly be the MUST-WIN race of the midterms.
---

Compare that to her leading Democratic opponent: Marcus Flowers. Marcus has served our country on multiple continents and he understands the meaning of patriotism. clean_body: Help us get ahead on our fundraising goal. | | | Hey y, Our campaign is making the final preparations of the year as we seek to start off 2022 on the path to victory. Since launching her campaign, Mia has been talking the talk and walking the walk — standing up for ALL of South Carolina’s communities in the SC State Senate, meeting with folks in every corner of the state, and laying out priorities for her administration. Most of all, she’s proving she has the unique record of service which gives her the courage to lead, the guts to govern, and the ability to do the job on day one. As we look forward to 2022, our fundraising will become even more critical to our success — with the race heating up, we’re counting on grassroots contributions to help us hire more staff, grow our organizing team, launch advertisements, and keep building the resources it will take to defeat Henry McMaster. That’s why we’re coming to you today — before the holiday — in hope of getting ahead on our year-end fundraising push to keep us in a strong position to compete in 2022. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Thanks for anything you’re able to give. We are relying on supporters like you to help us win this race. — Team Mia Please, disregard if you are a registered lobbyist. | | | Paid for by Mia for South Carolina | | Sent via . name: Marcy Kaptur for Congress
subject: We won’t let it go
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marcy Kaptur for Congress
body:
The Senate has failed to pass the Build Back Better agenda. We can't give up. |
Marcy Kaptur | |
---
[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNXS5KvDi5wrxDE5VytOtCwVpc5i8Die8BmDyLxt2ux4ZdoZGS3PKLkv8O1RsIqsus4FKnK5NumQZ334yN_qBcsqPgw86ueTJiVyvOTvUlJIT5pIGS0N07bhsC9rN4D579Rxf8igzx_VsY5bd-JveiGZica_Ll5WWxBSy32Pz-p88FMV6T3TxB0Fix0jPzmCZj6bzjcZ2oNZdY-5aqkQNj69XABKbWXLZFb41bPPttGDDVsEp1NjDVEWb_L1ASKDtLU0TMnUvtLP8P2w0zme0-WtFb816uQtrV2CzuDRXIcpOHPaQZs01LeCi9iS1N7lH17Pegv2GFZXVulY5wtHEQrIkF-vsVyaqapajiFohtYGIe45rc0tjhSLkl2irQTC6eBZRbI3GSvY5W_umjueOJeClxcTZy-2kQVQD_AbZIaw/3i2/k2CelZdeRq62zuwOYZrd2g/h0/emOeVatBu4FYbyHqgOsEGXZABm1H7-mldsOYV8lNF-M)

| | Team,

We won’t sugarcoat this: We are extremely disappointed that President Biden’s Build Back Better agenda has yet to pass in the Senate.

**Along with her House colleagues, Congresswoman Marcy Kaptur worked tirelessly to pass this bill for the American people. They _did their job_. Now, we must pressure the Senate to finish the job.**

This is not where we wanted to be, but it shows _just how vital keeping this seat in Congress is_. We need Marcy in the House fighting for President Biden’s priorities.

Team, we know you believe in fighting for working families and supporting our children’s future, and **so does Marcy. The Build Back Better agenda prioritizes Ohioans struggling to make ends meet, and _we won’t let it go._**

**[We need to send a strong message to the Senate, and let them know we won’t stop fighting for the Build Back Better agenda. Will you chip in $25 today to show them that we’re not going anywhere?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNXS5KvDi5wrxDE5VytOtCwVpc5i8Die8BmDyLxt2ux4ZdoZGS3PKLkv8O1RsIqsus4FKnK5NumQZ334yN_qBcsqPgw86ueTJiVyvOTvUlJDVkfyT1oioQLAMTgApuGeGyuDniZf95WD_Iin_cgtFilKyPrVY1nhLldNk58mfDeVpQs8xdLB4vBREyXuNxWe2fncYXbJpQSoZuXeRvv-BcxrAJyltxypHlqB4IyHuMiNcQrn_o6cMCLzQrPlRkttZTZ-LOXfItGyPWKopsQgc4utNKh_o2CChsj79ydvTLuKzjhCHhPFGbNQ3PEPAmR8ojFAifCzRZvcmh_Fr0-RT1qxAnZVngQHr-Yw1ChuqdjWepRdlOgR1YyvFO7y7ShCzLuffibIyOy_TxNU-17EcExvBz2cZEhshJqGpNLspIy3epINhW0kK54eX8u3alIb4/3i2/k2CelZdeRq62zuwOYZrd2g/h1/MBpA44kQqpE9Ckitb3Vdg6iw2Y65NTXqm25uVrRyVTk)**

name: Team Erica Smith
subject: This is what we call momentum
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
[1]Erica Smith

This is
what we call momentum:

Democracy for America, Elect Black Women PAC, and Future Generations PAC
have officially endorsed Erica Smith for Congress!

We’re so proud to have these progressive organizations on Team Erica as we
work to grow our people-powered movement for North Carolina's 2nd district
and deliver this seat to the people.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/31705?refcode=em20211222-708&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=708%2E3698%2Er9Jb2O ]Will
you make a donation today to add to our momentum ahead of our upcoming FEC
fundraising deadline on December 31st?

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/31705?refcode=em20211222-708&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=708%2E3698%2Er9Jb2O ]Donate $5

Erica has always been a proud progressive and a fierce advocate for
working people. She’s spent her life fighting for the small communities
and farmers in our district as an educator, a minister, and a three-term
state senator.

Our race for Congress will be one of the most competitive races in 2022,
so it’s not an exaggeration that control of the U.S. House — and our
country’s future — depends on the outcome of this race.

Erica is the progressive champion we need in Congress and she has what it
takes to win — but only if we channel this momentum into the race ahead.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/31705?refcode=em20211222-708&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=708%2E3698%2Er9Jb2O ]Can you chip in right now so we can head into the election year strong
and build a powerful movement to send Erica to the halls of Congress,
where she will fight for progressive policies?

Let’s do this!

Team Erica Smith

Contribute to Erica's campaign:https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20211222-708-footer&t=1022&refcode2=708_3698_r9Jb2O&akid=708%2E3698%2Er9Jb2O

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ericaforus.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=708%2E3698%2Er9Jb2O

name: Kevin Kiley
subject: Major Court Victory
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kiley for Assembly 2022 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
body:
|
---
Hi Peter, I've just published a new blog post: [Endemic Insanity](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQziopbfZv4pwMRIau2fzi6sWzOwVJ-lTJI55pNgKh8WodKXw&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=dec_22_final&n=1) Two months ago, I sent a clear message to the state’s large school districts: _Under California law school districts cannot mandate the COVID vaccine without a personal belief exemption. Don’t try it. You will get sued and will lose._ Well, San Diego Unified tried it. They got sued. And they just lost. A Superior Court has struck down the district’s mandate in its entirety. This comes a week after LA Unified cancelled theirs for next semester. This also comes as Joe Biden admits the science is “overwhelming” that “schools should be open.” I told Newsom that a year and a half ago. But he ignored the science, obeyed the unions, and pocketed millions. Meanwhile, yesterday Newsom announced the first “[booster mandate](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=ByhkdA7RrYhHtdiUMWUYvCnSX0QzZ0uDiS8dn5ZG89XV9K86BN0fPS6BQkKmrGzieA7hPWqGraBoy3d7NLJpOWlasMkbTFXCWaz5mKLJpCILHbfFSwksGLD4g4ZWzRMpwXJa-2JdMu4937A4aGCzOVwbJ2fMYxuZaHMRM_xm18M&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=dec_22_final&n=2).” This has to be a new world record for the time between conspiracy theory and reality. The word _endemic_ describes a pathogen being around indefinitely. What's truly become endemic is the insanity this virus has spawned. One of Newsom’s big union funders just declared “there’s never a good time to start disarming against COVID-19.” My home school district, for one, disagrees. Rocklin Unified passed a resolution against Newsom’s mandates that promises legal action if he extends the emergency. The forces of sanity are gaining strength. [Ask your school board to do the same](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=T5He9HRd2mnp6QN0SYKMHEGgI-Mi0Nowc5mws1asme-cGpsTB9w5tuCOD6oZ19KFcmYZJDjcX-kZh_e4TCk2rDjhxrNXh9-BeJZ6b8Mu_ug5fOxh-aw8s18HDTbXun8E&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=dec_22_final&n=3) [Share this Post on Facebook](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6lpHI-UVcODcFSdMgu5zpAyWTjOzCm7Y-DswsQpTcxFRfvx3YnhzSUiAYlTKSN4JUg&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=dec_22_final&n=4) Kevin Kiley
[](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=yFGvxrZFfEAGNDSajUG67jFpOTi1EXIJZKzd_Af4NVQ&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=dec_22_final&n=5)California Legislator
Paid for by Kiley for Assembly 2022 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=dec_22_final&n=6).

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CISCOMANI FOR CONGRESS
body:
| Peter,
---
As I was putting the finishing touches on gift wrapping my family’s Christmas presents, I received an urgent email from my campaign manager Becky that I had to share with you.
---
I really hate to bother you this week, but we are in real danger of falling short of our end-of-year fundraising goal, and with so much at stake, I had to reach out.
---
_You see, if every one of my supporters donated $5 or more, we would be in a great position to win this seat and take back the majority from Nancy Pelosi._
---
Can I count on your support Peter?
---

**It's incredibly important that we finish strong in the 4th Quarter so we launch full-speed-ahead into the new year - _the election year!_**

The best players give the remaining minutes, even seconds, their absolute all I have the mentality that in the 4th quarter of every game, you PLAY UP. The best players give the remaining minutes, even seconds, their absolute all. | Fellow American, We are all preparing for the holidays with our families, but before you turn off your emails and shut down your notifications to spend some important, quality time with your loved ones, we have one final request before Christmas. It's incredibly important that we finish strong in the 4th Quarter so we launch full-speed-ahead into the new year - the election year! To do that, Team Herschel needs to put up strong fundraising numbers on the year-end report to the Federal Election Commission (FEC), Throughout my football career, I have embraced the idea that in the 4th Quarter of every game, you PLAY UP. When the clock runs out, nothing can be changed. The best players give the final minutes, even seconds, their absolute all. This time, of course, the outcome is not just winning or losing a football game; the future of our country is on the line. That's why we're asking each member of Team Herschel to PLAY UP to a greater potential, to play their best game in this fight to win back the U.S. Senate, and to PLAY UP before the clock runs out on 2021. You don't have to wait until the final seconds on December 31st to make your critical year-end contribution. Thanks, Herschel Walker P.S. The 4th Quarter is the first full fundraising quarter our campaign has had since launching in August, so it's critical that we put up strong numbers. name: Derek Schmidt
subject: We’re fighting a new Biden mandate
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC
body:
I know you’re busy preparing for the Christmas holiday, so I won’t take too much of your time. I just wanted to provide a quick update on my ongoing f Friend, I know you’re busy preparing for the Christmas holiday, so I won’t take too much of your time. I just wanted to provide a quick update on my ongoing fight against President Biden’s vaccine mandate agenda: **Yesterday we filed a new lawsuit against the Biden administration. ** This one involves a new vaccine mandate that’s gotten much less attention than the other higher profile mandates. The Biden administration recently quietly announced vaccine and masking requirements for Head Start early childhood education programs. Staff, volunteers, and others who come in contact with Head Start students must get the vaccine by January 31 and children aged two and up will be forced to wear a mask. Kansas families are already facing challenges finding child care and this one-size-fits-all mandate will make the problem worse. This mandate is likely to result in the loss of staff, closure of facilities or at least reduced capacity for low-income children. It is another example of the administration taking shortcuts and failing to consider consequences as it rushes forward, and the courts should strike this mandate down as they have others. **[If you agree we should do everything we can to defend early childhood educators and children...would you please chip in $25? ](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=e93e8354c5b64687a028c4b0c23b7ab6&_e=LVoCGn7op3EfBecl5OfBMCYwBnLuRfpB5KMxeinYv9TuUDBFWNBESv1ylinvwi--O2QcE2gCZ9svjyFZjgsoMT0UYPZPWHhkl_VygeC6kCopd57qGpnmFIDOI6UloCJWK5hUcPd9LVkH9s3rdRfM2f8OiBtez11vsgRAxr4M2a4DQ2YG6eBhFjTsLcGnIrP3InMwAqDndOWFheIup7p-uNXsnHprMs1vod9VMEWkK4N99gVXKLyalHm14SBEka4ZyCh8ujo1aKNVMKDHUt192hkM4Mb3yaU5uFDYPgyyp3XdTdFHBjb6far894qWunGz4cKC1AFZLYd2yYUQRL-sjmJnVvjzbiDRYj0LdnW5G19uhIETm3We3X5Mn9Tz2L1h-VrxBFT9LTa4LT6uVEAYrjTbKYGE5Cpz7WgmMBMhFt5Lfel3JiLC97LHAgaKN-Aw9hIW5JgJ_4EfhHGvsWYtzc_B0A8CoV5Yg0tEw5X1SJdzmOyc_V14Isw5wPAKoDZk)** We’ve already had some great victories in court against the Biden administration’s dangerous mandates, but they keep pushing. I’m going to keep fighting back as your attorney general. As governor, I promise to never repeat the damaging mistakes of Governor Kelly’s COVID response. **[Will you chip in now to support my efforts to win the governor’s office in 2022?](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=e93e8354c5b64687a028c4b0c23b7ab6&_e=LVoCGn7op3EfBecl5OfBMCYwBnLuRfpB5KMxeinYv9TuUDBFWNBESv1ylinvwi--O2QcE2gCZ9svjyFZjgsoMT0UYPZPWHhkl_VygeC6kCopd57qGpnmFIDOI6UloCJWK5hUcPd9LVkH9s3rdRfM2f8OiBtez11vsgRAxr4M2a4DQ2YG6eBhFjTsLcGnIrP3InMwAqDndOWFheIup7p-uNXsnHprMs1vod9VMEWkK4N99gVXKLyalHm14SBEka4ZyCh8ujo1aKNVMKDHUt192hkM4Mb3yaU5uFDYPgyyp3WIE5SiTXhL-mktjsVVksj-GAmqMSujbyEioeN_mHj-yHsFIQfnHpR4W4Lgfo8tXwAgHlvCMb5xi_VfnKtMZlWSJMCTL2i78F-ZZZ6hpRGMO1Zb_N86iorF0hLmtjLX6KEZi7AVpCZlRjkOxQhp5pXkKJ6ZRpGo93a7aO-3b5nmoinNuuRTURVPecew3eU3ILuy6OWnzwJeBSrw77CmLK8T)** [**CHIP IN $25**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=e93e8354c5b64687a028c4b0c23b7ab6&_e=LVoCGn7op3EfBecl5OfBMCYwBnLuRfpB5KMxeinYv9TuUDBFWNBESv1ylinvwi--O2QcE2gCZ9svjyFZjgsoMT0UYPZPWHhkl_VygeC6kCopd57qGpnmFIDOI6UloCJWK5hUcPd9LVkH9s3rdRfM2f8OiBtez11vsgRAxr4M2a4DQ2YG6eBhFjTsLcGnIrP3InMwAqDndOWFheIup7p-uNXsnHprMs1vod9VMEWkK4N99gVXKLyalHm14SBEka4ZyCh8ujo1aKNVMKDHUt192hkM4Mb3yaU5uFDYPgyyp3WXONYW-MMG_4CxZAxDnihHdkmjRQht84ZjRweNtBxli__SaxxlOMHJk5AH-0zLN2lh2wobXfMP1Wb8RMMdxpsC6b5YqTDBpksMUqG-HO6evxTF2BB7kq5MmWb3kgAP2tNjVB1RJ0yQTL1gxGlJMoroiq1ZOONuab4h-JaK1_KZGo0M4s3kw0xUBZarBUEJnb0P8xA2VNom0dOQ1G-56hDy) Nothing is more important to me than ensuring the safety of our children and protecting Kansas parents’ right to make their own decisions for themselves and their families. There is no pandemic exception to the Constitution. [**If you agree that Biden's new mandate is unacceptable and dangerous,****stand with me and chip in now to help fight back.**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=e93e8354c5b64687a028c4b0c23b7ab6&_e=LVoCGn7op3EfBecl5OfBMCYwBnLuRfpB5KMxeinYv9TuUDBFWNBESv1ylinvwi--O2QcE2gCZ9svjyFZjgsoMT0UYPZPWHhkl_VygeC6kCopd57qGpnmFIDOI6UloCJWK5hUcPd9LVkH9s3rdRfM2f8OiBtez11vsgRAxr4M2a4DQ2YG6eBhFjTsLcGnIrP3InMwAqDndOWFheIup7p-uNXsnHprMs1vod9VMEWkK4N99gVXKLyalHm14SBEka4ZyCh8ujo1aKNVMKDHUt192hkM4Mb3yaU5uFDYPgyyp3UU_wxMLn-Xekr9udw7S6u-PvgN9s7Hvd23StR0d2TmNwNWH20VmXya-RbMk0ViMBRd0KJJ_5JXwIYO37ukdg_630WqIKpf_mnpSrxkk7ImPdQo0r1EcRpsihsVfUYq7KA-BKEYEy81888tL5fdFgIx_zd5oJBF2-SBw05EVGJ9Sb_FILdnFGTob80o-4xgkZHwP9aTAJu1NdSbIqiImw9r) [**CHIP IN $25**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=e93e8354c5b64687a028c4b0c23b7ab6&_e=LVoCGn7op3EfBecl5OfBMCYwBnLuRfpB5KMxeinYv9TuUDBFWNBESv1ylinvwi--O2QcE2gCZ9svjyFZjgsoMT0UYPZPWHhkl_VygeC6kCopd57qGpnmFIDOI6UloCJWK5hUcPd9LVkH9s3rdRfM2f8OiBtez11vsgRAxr4M2a4DQ2YG6eBhFjTsLcGnIrP3InMwAqDndOWFheIup7p-uNXsnHprMs1vod9VMEWkK4N99gVXKLyalHm14SBEka4ZyCh8ujo1aKNVMKDHUt192hkM4Mb3yaU5uFDYPgyyp3Uls5wbeisj3aSygQX8rZzgUNKElUx8UjV0mDSsP2d10jNzqALmhdZck_OEeqOUy47AeLMNphilO3B9NZO77u6crkrfcCXlN2MZEVnq8lE6D3Ngbdh24t1-CC1IHP_VL18SdRwQAjN2ZjDgRkngsP8slLI--nZ3bNfCBVuV_mUT0-LYSP5EyWB7r9667-T4TE7IkMWPeIoTjxFSIcgSWNcD) I’m so grateful to have you with me in this fight, friend. I know that together, we can stop this federal overreach in its tracks. Thanks, Derek Schmidt | |

name: Paul Schimpf
subject: Schimpf from the Trail 12/22/21
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Citizens for Schimpf · P
body:
| [](http://www.schimpf4illinois.com/?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_12_22&n=1)
---
Friend, From my entire family to yours, I wish you a Merry Christmas filled with warmth and love from family and friends. I'm excited to spend the Christmas holiday at home with the ones I love most! In 2022, we won't let our foot off the gas because there is too much at stake for the future of our state and the families who call Illinois home. I'm eager to get back on the campaign trail meeting voters and talking about how I will renew our state and fire JB Pritzker, but I'm looking forward to enjoying this special time around Christmas. Whether you are traveling or staying home, have a safe and Merry Christmas! S/F, Paul Schimpf
* * *
**Volunteer of the Week** I have to give a special shoutout to Tom Stevenson who let me put one of our big signs up at a great location along I-80. Thank you, Tom, for the support and friendship! [****](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6pOa_jPCOozcMV6SuBWw6qN_OJoa7J36ca-ChygC20ZIhewEaNfpkDncTWuD4ajnwW1s0Ycbf6s1L6_oAxQ2df8&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_12_22&n=2) Big signs like this can be claimed at [Signs@Schimpf4Illinois.org](mailto:Signs@Schimpf4Illinois.org).[If you'd like to volunteer on our campaign, click here.](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/volunteer?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_12_22&n=3)
* * *
**In the News** [](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6tVgirLU9XjeyDlXT2NtRv9aKztbX_-_I_c_F8kqjFqAA-JbKDCQCZgCQxIGnZO-yIray4ZQtGTannBvxwK1mzk&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_12_22&n=4) I had the tremendous honor to be part of a wreath laying ceremony at the national cemetery in Danville this week. During this season of giving, I am proud that so many remember the gift our veterans have given us. The News-Gazette covered the ceremony and I spoke to them about how much it meant to be in attendance. "Sometimes, it’s just not enough to say ‘thank you,’” said Schimpf...“Sometimes, actions are required.” [Read the full article here.](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=UhXOzfvwWc2DQ3Q6Axuk_BpgUrSqMvKDtNj1H0YZ4eqb7ndbl66TuWEcnj0RjspTYJdU8hef_LekJ7OpxRZFsBZf3mLD7rK6RjGLb_uV2AxRhLxWiJcLtzXWqzbY_Eq_BuLUApPSrGlpTkfxhlU-JA7odQJhby1K39s4XJKtn7BpJCX05OhvBpxqGVe0k9slYjl65ug-YV1BTz3MpiPcITHrvK8-IRCCiF4_WNz5LEx7Z5-Xsyek0Nm2PkJc3PkH&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_12_22&n=5)

clean_body: | Friend, From my entire family to yours, I wish you a Merry Christmas filled with warmth and love from family and friends. I'm excited to spend the Christmas holiday at home with the ones I love most! In 2022, we won't let our foot off the gas because there is too much at stake for the future of our state and the families who call Illinois home. I'm eager to get back on the campaign trail meeting voters and talking about how I will renew our state and fire JB Pritzker, but I'm looking forward to enjoying this special time around Christmas. Whether you are traveling or staying home, have a safe and Merry Christmas! S/F, Paul Schimpf Volunteer of the Week I have to give a special shoutout to Tom Stevenson who let me put one of our big signs up at a great location along I-80. Thank you, Tom, for the support and friendship! Big signs like this can be claimed at mailto:Signs@Schimpf4Illinois.org. In the News I had the tremendous honor to be part of a wreath laying ceremony at the national cemetery in Danville this week. During this season of giving, I am proud that so many remember the gift our veterans have given us. The News-Gazette covered the ceremony and I spoke to them about how much it meant to be in attendance. "Sometimes, it’s just not enough to say ‘thank you,’” said Schimpf...“Sometimes, actions are required.” Social Media Spotlight Get Involved Want to make a direct impact on our campaign? to help us share with more people across Illinois to show what real leadership in Illinois looks like. subject: Manchin vs. Moms

body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]Hi Peter,
Can I take a minute to tell you more about or friend and inspiration Congresswoman Katie Porter , Peter?
Katie is a force to be reckoned with. She’s a fearless advocate for working families, and one of our champions in the fight for paid family leave. You do know about her white board, right?
She’s also at serious risk of losing her House seat.
Here’s why: The GOP listed her as a top target in the midterm elections. They are determined to retake the House majority and in order to do so, they need to flip Katie’s seat.
Can you please rush a donation to support her re-election campaign today? We promised her that Moms for Katie Porter could raise her $10,000 by the end of this month and we are so close. We are counting on you to chip in to help us close the gap. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsforkatieporter?refcode=0920]
In 2018, Katie was the underdog and narrowly flipped her district blue. If she’s going to keep her seat next year, she’ll need supporters like you and organizations like us to power her campaign.
None of this work would be possible without you.
With gratitude,
Simona Grace
Founder and Executive Director
Moms in Office

name: =?utf-8?Q?Victoria=20Spartz?=
subject: My No Vote on Democrat Spending & Holding China Accountable
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Victoria Spartz for Congress
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/spartzforcongress/my-no-vote-on-democratic-spending-10770956?e=57d5bacdc3)
---
[](https://spartzforcongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c85918f147157cf1c0ccdcf91&id=1d0863895a&e=57d5bacdc3)
Good Afternoon —A year out from the Midterms, one thing is clear — Republicans have the momentum to **FLIP THE HOUSE**!
[](https://spartzforcongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c85918f147157cf1c0ccdcf91&id=8fcaf9be6e&e=57d5bacdc3)
|
---
# 2021 in Review: 20 In-Person Town Halls
Over the past year, we’ve visited businesses and organizations large and small, and heard directly from so many of you in the 20 in-person town halls. We hosted town hall meetings in **Alexandria, Anderson, Arcadia, Carmel, Cicero, Elwood, Fairmount, Fishers, Gas City, Greentown, Hartford City, Lawrence, Indianapolis, Marion, Noblesville, Pendleton, Sheridan, Tipton, Westfield, **and** Zionsville**.We’ve heard loud and clear how disappointed Hoosiers are in the ever-expanding size of the federal government.
# Holiday Season in the 5th District
As I attended holiday events across the 5th District over the past few weeks, I’ve seen a lot of energy on the ground. We’ve participated in the fun parade in Kokomo with the [**Howard County Republican Party**](https://spartzforcongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c85918f147157cf1c0ccdcf91&id=cd0b9f69bc&e=57d5bacdc3), had holidays meals with the [**Indiana Federation of Republican Women**](https://spartzforcongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c85918f147157cf1c0ccdcf91&id=aa574308fc&e=57d5bacdc3), and the [**Hamilton County**](https://spartzforcongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c85918f147157cf1c0ccdcf91&id=5656468a18&e=57d5bacdc3) and [**Madison County Women’s Clubs**](https://spartzforcongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c85918f147157cf1c0ccdcf91&id=7a5e675475&e=57d5bacdc3). It was also a pleasure welcoming [**Dennis Prager**](https://spartzforcongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c85918f147157cf1c0ccdcf91&id=85bc52f0c8&e=57d5bacdc3) at the First Principles Forum holiday event and hearing his talk on freedom and conservative principles.It’s been an energizing season — and I’m looking forward to what is to come in 2022!
|
---
# Deep Dive: “Build Back Broke” Bill
While families around Indiana are forced to fork over more of their paycheck to buy gas and groceries, Washington has no problem spending trillions of taxpayer dollars on socialist policies in their “Build Back Better” bill.**My Perspective:** Plain and simple, the spending that House Democrats approved in November will benefit the rich and DC's big government machine, while hurting seniors, employers, workers, small businesses, and young people. **I grew up in the Soviet Union and know socialism and totalitarianism when I see it, which is why I emphatically voted NO on this bad bill.** Recently, Congressional Budget Office confirmed that this bill would cost taxpayers **$5 TRILLION** and add **$3 TRILLION** to our **$29 TRILLION** debt.
### Some Examples Below:
**1\. Overbearing Fines on Employers:** While Biden’s [**vaccine mandate**](https://spartzforcongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c85918f147157cf1c0ccdcf91&id=0696e82737&e=57d5bacdc3) on businesses was tied up in the court system, that didn’t stop Speaker Pelosi from pushing through the fine increases.
* This legislation authorizes****[**OSHA to fine businesses**](https://spartzforcongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c85918f147157cf1c0ccdcf91&id=e5735179cd&e=57d5bacdc3) up to $700,000 per violation and gives the Administration **$707 MILLION** to [**enforce the policies**](https://spartzforcongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c85918f147157cf1c0ccdcf91&id=4e712ea4de&e=57d5bacdc3)**.**
* While the legislation passed the House on a party-line vote, I went a step further by introducing legislation to nullify the federal vaccine mandate.

**2\. Padding the IRS:** The Democrats also set aside **$80 BILLION** for the IRS to [**enforce tax collections**](https://spartzforcongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c85918f147157cf1c0ccdcf91&id=ae1adb3fd3&e=57d5bacdc3) and add a new reporting requirement for transactions over $600.
* **The IRS doesn’t need to be snooping around in the pocketbooks of American families.** So many are simply trying to get by with a paycheck that’s dwindling in power thanks to increased inflation from Democratic policies.

**3\. Handouts to Millionaires and Billionaires:** Buried deep in the bill is a tax cut for the rich, better known as SALT. According to the Committee for a Responsible Federal Budget, the 5-year provision would cost roughly **$285 BILLION** and overwhelmingly benefit very high earners.**So, what happens now?** The House bill is sitting in Chuck Schumer’s Senate where it faces a very uncertain future after Senator Joe Manchin announced he could no longer even consider voting for this “mammoth” bill. No matter how the Democrats try to spin it though, **this is a bad bill.** I joined Fox news to talk through the ways that the financial gimmicks and murky math here create political elites, jack up inflation, and hurt middle class families.
[](https://spartzforcongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c85918f147157cf1c0ccdcf91&id=7ebc221550&e=57d5bacdc3)
|
---
# Standing Up to Washington:
No on Debt Limit
If the **$1.7 TRILLION** social spending plan wasn’t enough, Democrats also pushed through a vote to raise the debt ceiling by roughly **$2.5 TRILLION** into 2023.
* I voted**NO** on this measure because our federal spending is completely out of control.
* **Furthermore, taking out a second credit card simply is not the solution.** We must get spending under control, reform welfare to empower, not suppress low income individuals, and balance the budget. The debt can be tackled, not by raising taxes on US citizens, but by taking a critical look at the unnecessary spending of the federal government.

_Graph Courtesy of the Committee for a Responsible Federal Budget_
|
---
# New Legislation to Hold China Accountable
It’s incumbent on Congress to level the playing field and decrease dependencies in our relationship with China. This month I introduced two important pieces of legislation to keep China in check.
**Accelerating Holding Foreign Companies Accountable Act:**
* **How it works:** This legislation accelerates the delisting of the Chinese companies traded on U.S. exchanges without proper auditing and oversight by U.S. regulators

**National Critical Capabilities Defense Act:**
* **How it works:** Improves the supply chain transparency for critical products and materials

**Why we need to act:** We must address our dependencies on the adversaries like China and protect U.S. investors.
| [See the Accelerating Holding Foreign Companies Accountable Act →](https://spartzforcongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c85918f147157cf1c0ccdcf91&id=696f3d24f1&e=57d5bacdc3)
---
| [See the National Critical Capabilities Defense Act →](https://spartzforcongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c85918f147157cf1c0ccdcf91&id=f65704be5b&e=57d5bacdc3)
---
|
---
# Biden Flip Flops on $450k Payout to Illegal Immigrants
Earlier this fall, word spread that the Biden Administration was planning on paying $450k settlements (per person!) to immigrants who illegally crossed the border. **Simply put, this misuse of taxpayer dollars is inappropriate.** While Biden initially denied the proposal, a few days later his [**Administration towed the line for the ACLU and walked back his initial denial**](https://spartzforcongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c85918f147157cf1c0ccdcf91&id=0a720d6d49&e=57d5bacdc3) leaving room for compensation down the road.
**My perspective:** The reported settlement of $450,000 per person to illegal immigrants is outrageous and an overreach by the executive branch. Congress must reassert itself and take its powers back.**What I’m doing to push back:** I introduced [**a simple, two-page piece of legislation**](https://spartzforcongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c85918f147157cf1c0ccdcf91&id=9efb34ffd9&e=57d5bacdc3) alongside Representative McClintock to prevent the Attorney General from making settlement payments to individuals and families who entered the United States illegally.
| [Read More →](https://spartzforcongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c85918f147157cf1c0ccdcf91&id=05c461bfc0&e=57d5bacdc3)
---
|
---
# Help Me Retire Speaker Pelosi!
I’m headed into 2022 with renewed drive to ensure the Democrats are moved into the **MINORITY**. With your help, we can elect more constitutionally conservative members and bring our party back into the majority!
| [Donate Today →](https://spartzforcongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c85918f147157cf1c0ccdcf91&id=67839a5255&e=57d5bacdc3)
---
|
---
|
---
# Merry Christmas and Happy Holidays!
This is the season to be thankful for the many blessings our families have in this great country and remember and support those who are in need.
| | |

We hosted town hall meetings in Alexandria, Anderson, Arcadia, Carmel, Cicero, Elwood, Fairmount, Fishers, Gas City, Greentown, Hartford City, Lawrence, Indianapolis, Marion, Noblesville, Pendleton, Sheridan, Tipton, Westfield, and Zionsville.We’ve heard loud and clear how disappointed Hoosiers are in the ever-expanding size of the federal government. We’ve participated in the fun parade in Kokomo with the , had holidays meals with the , and the and . It was also a pleasure welcoming at the First Principles Forum holiday event and hearing his talk on freedom and conservative principles.It’s been an energizing season — and I’m looking forward to what is to come in 2022! | Deep Dive: “Build Back Broke” Bill While families around Indiana are forced to fork over more of their paycheck to buy gas and groceries, Washington has no problem spending trillions of taxpayer dollars on socialist policies in their “Build Back Better” bill.My Perspective: Plain and simple, the spending that House Democrats approved in November will benefit the rich and DC's big government machine, while hurting seniors, employers, workers, small businesses, and young people. I grew up in the Soviet Union and know socialism and totalitarianism when I see it, which is why I emphatically voted NO on this bad bill. Recently, Congressional Budget Office confirmed that this bill would cost taxpayers $5 TRILLION and add $3 TRILLION to our $29 TRILLION debt. Some Examples Below: 1\. Overbearing Fines on Employers: While Biden’s on businesses was tied up in the court system, that didn’t stop Speaker Pelosi from pushing through the fine increases. This legislation authorizes up to $700,000 per violation and gives the Administration $707 MILLION to . While the legislation passed the House on a party-line vote, I went a step further by introducing legislation to nullify the federal vaccine mandate. 2\. Padding the IRS: The Democrats also set aside $80 BILLION for the IRS to and add a new reporting requirement for transactions over $600. The IRS doesn’t need to be snooping around in the pocketbooks of American families. So many are simply trying to get by with a paycheck that’s dwindling in power thanks to increased inflation from Democratic policies. 3\. Handouts to Millionaires and Billionaires: Buried deep in the bill is a tax cut for the rich, better known as SALT. According to the Committee for a Responsible Federal Budget, the 5-year provision would cost roughly $285 BILLION and overwhelmingly benefit very high earners.So, what happens now? The House bill is sitting in Chuck Schumer’s Senate where it faces a very uncertain future after Senator Joe Manchin announced he could no longer even consider voting for this “mammoth” bill. No matter how the Democrats try to spin it though, this is a bad bill. I joined Fox news to talk through the ways that the financial gimmicks and murky math here create political elites, jack up inflation, and hurt middle class families. | Standing Up to Washington: No on Debt Limit If the $1.7 TRILLION social spending plan wasn’t enough, Democrats also pushed through a vote to raise the debt ceiling by roughly $2.5 TRILLION into 2023. I votedNO on this measure because our federal spending is completely out of control. Furthermore, taking out a second credit card simply is not the solution. We must get spending under control, reform welfare to empower, not suppress low income individuals, and balance the budget. The debt can be tackled, not by raising taxes on US citizens, but by taking a critical look at the unnecessary spending of the federal government. Graph Courtesy of the Committee for a Responsible Federal Budget | New Legislation to Hold China Accountable It’s incumbent on Congress to level the playing field and decrease dependencies in our relationship with China. This month I introduced two important pieces of legislation to keep China in check. Accelerating Holding Foreign Companies Accountable Act: How it works: This legislation accelerates the delisting of the Chinese companies traded on U.S. exchanges without proper auditing and oversight by U.S. regulators National Critical Capabilities Defense Act: How it works: Improves the supply chain transparency for critical products and materials Why we need to act: We must address our dependencies on the adversaries like China and protect U.S. investors. | | | Biden Flip Flops on $450k Payout to Illegal Immigrants Earlier this fall, word spread that the Biden Administration was planning on paying $450k settlements (per person!) to immigrants who illegally crossed the border. Simply put, this misuse of taxpayer dollars is inappropriate. While Biden initially denied the proposal, a few days later his leaving room for compensation down the road. My perspective: The reported settlement of $450,000 per person to illegal immigrants is outrageous and an overreach by the executive branch. Congress must reassert itself and take its powers back.What I’m doing to push back: I introduced alongside Representative McClintock to prevent the Attorney General from making settlement payments to individuals and families who entered the United States illegally. | | Help Me Retire Speaker Pelosi! I’m headed into 2022 with renewed drive to ensure the Democrats are moved into the MINORITY**. With your help, we can elect more constitutionally conservative members and bring our party back into the majority! | | | Merry Christmas and Happy Holidays! This is the season to be thankful for the many blessings our families have in this great country and remember and support those who are in need. | | | Copyright (C) 2021 Victoria Spartz for Congress. All rights reserved.

Peter,

We are all preparing for the holidays with our families, but before you turn off your emails and shut down your notifications to spend some important, quality time with your loved ones, we have one final request before Christmas.

**It's incredibly important that we finish strong in the 4th Quarter so we launch full-speed-ahead into the new year - _the election year!_**

To do that, Team Herschel needs to put up strong fundraising numbers on the year-end report to the Federal Election Commission (FEC), **[and we need your help to make that possible.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=202f9e1722e046faad054bba01a9f218&_e=osFKC18dMA0CjDnWKwyk758ERx4b-esr9WE1osEyW3FAY23IElPyHM1swfiCEfjNcqY5096VxjjPfqfo4ALL05RrWi5_Pe-i1f0FkNa6sLQaa0Ezoz5z8BWf628cbo7D2_gNuThTJb5k4h_uPcOstZ5dA2-2_BVsxUBSg7L82p3a-SgmJJbdx3oAOH-uonBgCd9q20qTygRtRgqS3r0WjQq2EvYhIK1Bc3Nx2Xe4iRP7_ESwl_DqFpLMbvnaM5ncqz7niu02Nlxhx3hoMc1yJdF3bx3FvFC8NH_Oe8PjCDUwPJJSOx79nLAM2bH4Xai2Cd_2AOJ27cAbOhDn83kSJMoDHAtWoQMhmkb_gT6JnSwEDiLn9UlIs8IuvGl618T32j99KN7S49fl33bQS6CMPSOuGr8iFjxoXGmfSmh4MTE7oySTQvc27bya7hUF3dw1tnTBNSf_LQ9VZ5uIuPve5g%3D%3D)**
