www.philarballo.com

Phil Arballo is a Latino, a Central Valley native, a father, and a husband. He's running for Congress in California to replace Devin Nunes -- a far-right, MAGA Republican who just abandoned the Central Valley. Phil is a champion for real working families and will fight to protect health care access, keep guns out of the wrong hands, and stand up to traitorous Republicans who are working to ruin our Democracy.

One more thing: MAGA Republicans are desperate to keep this open seat red with Devin Nunes stepping down. We came so close in 2020, even though Nunes outspent our campaign four-to-one. Make no mistake: redistricting has made this district the most competitive it's been in decades, but we need every good Democrat to step up and do their part to beat them.

name: Beto for Texas
subject: WATCH: Beto's message on our deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
We're funding this campaign with grassroots donations of $3, $5, and $10 because Beto's in this race to serve ALL Texans.
#
One thing is clear: **Beto O'Rourke is the candidate to defeat Greg Abbott.**
Since launching this campaign, Beto has traveled to over three dozen cities and met thousands of folks in our effort to build the biggest grassroots campaign this state has ever seen.
We're on our way to turning out a historic number of voters — Democrats, Republicans, Independents, and folks who've never voted. But first, we have to face a huge test of our strength: the December 31st filing deadline, when we'll have to publicly share our fundraising numbers.
This is so critical that Beto took a minute to explain why we need your help before this deadline. **[Please take a moment to watch this video, then contribute $3 or more if you're able to power our campaign to elect Beto.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50576?refcode=ema20211222-167959&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=167959%2E444211%2EP9WkAR)**
[](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50576?refcode=ema20211222-167959&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=167959%2E444211%2EP9WkAR)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50576?refcode=ema20211222-167959&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=167959%2E444211%2EP9WkAR)**
We're funding this campaign with grassroots donations of $3, $5, and $10 because Beto's in this race to serve ALL Texans — not just those in power.
Greg Abbott built up his $55 million war chest with donations from super PACs and industry insiders, and as a result, he has simply stopped listening to the people of Texas. **This is what happens when industry owns politicians.**
This is why it's so important to Beto that our campaign makes its way _all across_ Texas. We're prioritizing the voices of people who have been overlooked for far too long by our government — because that's the kind of governor that Beto will be.
[Please, will you chip in now to help us defeat Greg Abbott and elect Beto as the next Governor of Texas?](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50576?refcode=ema20211222-167959&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=167959%2E444211%2EP9WkAR)
Thank you for being a part of this,
Beto for Texas

clean_body: We're funding this campaign with grassroots donations of $3, $5, and $10 because Beto's in this race to serve ALL Texans. One thing is clear: Beto O'Rourke is the candidate to defeat Greg Abbott. Since launching this campaign, Beto has traveled to over three dozen cities and met thousands of folks in our effort to build the biggest grassroots campaign this state has ever seen. We're on our way to turning out a historic number of voters — Democrats, Republicans, Independents, and folks who've never voted. But first, we have to face a huge test of our strength: the December 31st filing deadline, when we'll have to publicly share our fundraising numbers. This is so critical that Beto took a minute to explain why we need your help before this deadline. We're funding this campaign with grassroots donations of $3, $5, and $10 because Beto's in this race to serve ALL Texans — not just those in power. Greg Abbott built up his $55 million war chest with donations from super PACs and industry insiders, and as a result, he has simply stopped listening to the people of Texas. This is what happens when industry owns politicians. This is why it's so important to Beto that our campaign makes its way all across Texas. We're prioritizing the voices of people who have been overlooked for far too long by our government — because that's the kind of governor that Beto will be. Thank you for being a part of this, Beto for Texas Email us: info@betofortexas.com

name: =?utf-8?Q?Brencia=20Berry?=
subject: Happy Holidays!
body:
| | | |
---
| | | Happy Holidays Friends!

2021 has been as challenging a year as any for many of us. Between the ongoing pandemic and threats to our democracy, the resilience of our party, and our nation, were tested. Despite these challenges, Democrats have found ways to deliver for the people. The Biden Administration has offered stability in these times, something that the last administration could not do. It started with getting money into the pockets of Americans with the American Rescue Plan and has lead to repairing the foundation of our nation with the Bipartisan Infrastructure Bill.

In the final newsletter of 2021, I want to highlight all of the work that we have done over the past 12 months. More importantly, thank you all for your continued support. Without your help, none of this could have been possible.

As we round the corner into 2022, I look forward to building on what we have accomplished. Together, we can ensure a better future for all Americans.

Thanks again and Happy Holidays,
Brencia Berry
Director of Coalitions and Community Engagement
Democratic National Committee
---
|
---
| **2021 Toplines**
In President Biden's first year in office, he has been able to bring America back from the brink of democratic and economic ruin. In just this year, Americans have gotten a taste what the President's plans will mean for the state of our country.
* **72 percent of American adults are now fully vaccinated and 490 million total vaccine doses have been administered.**
* **The unemployment rate has dropped to 4.2 percent from 6.3 percent when President Biden first took office.**
* **99 percent of schools are open, as opposed to the 46% that were open before President Biden took office.**
* **Unemployment claims have dropped from 18 million to 2 million.**
* **GDP growth is on pace for 5-6 percent, the highest since 1984.**

These unprecedented accomplishments have all been achieved in the Biden Administration's first year. It is clear that the President is delivering for working Americans and will continue to do so for the next three years.
---
|
---
| **The American Rescue Plan**
After just 50 days of taking office, President Joe Biden and Congressional Democrats were able to pass much needed relief to millions of working Americans across the country with the American Rescue Plan. The American Rescue Plan put money directly into the pockets of millions, ramped up vaccine distribution, and so much more. Here are just a few of the highlights that we saw with the historic plan:
* **$1400 direct payments to 85% of households**
* **$20 Billion for vaccine distribution**
* **11 million people lifted out of poverty with the Child Tax Credit, as well as cutting child poverty in half**
* **The enhancement of unemployment insurance for around 11 million Americans**
* **Tens of billions of dollars in rental assistance**
* **$39 Billion for child care providers**

Even after passing this bold plan, this was only the beginning for the Biden Administration.
---
|
---
| **The Bipartisan Infrastructure Deal**
At the beginning of November, the Biden Administration and Congressional Democrats were able to once again make history. Together, they were able to pass a once-in-a-generation investment into the physical foundation of our nation. This deal will rebuild America's roads, bridges, railroads, and utilities, while addressing the ongoing climate crisis. Here are some major points that only touch on the surface of the bill:
* **$55 Billion to expand access to safe drinking water and to replace pipes**
* **$65 Billion to ensure that every American has access to reliable high-speed broadband internet**
* **$110 Billion toward repairing and rebuilding safe and environmentally friendly bridges**
* **Nearly $129 Billion toward modernizing transit in America, while seeking to reduce greenhouse gas emissions with investments in public transit**
* **$65 Billion investment in clean energy for our power grids**
* **Over $50 Billion to protect our infrastructure against the threats of extreme weather events**

This legislation and it's investment will revolutionize how Americans move, live, and even breathe. This is an investment in Americans now and Americans in the future.
---
|
---
| **News Clips**
The successes of President Biden's Administration are not only clear to us, but to the media as well. Here is what the media has to say about President Biden's economic plan:
* [**Bloomberg: President Biden's Economic Performance Has Proved Unbeatable**](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=a4c288dff7&e=d6c5c7d7ec)
* [**The Atlantic: Biden Won Big With a Bad Hand**](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=a4309a9569&e=d6c5c7d7ec)

President Biden has also ensured that supply chain issues would be resolved ahead of the Holidays:
* [**New York Times: Why Christmas Gifts Are Arriving on Time This Year**](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=ace06ce5fa&e=d6c5c7d7ec)

---
|
---
| | | _Copyright © 2021 DNC Community Engagement, All rights reserved._
This is a test distribution list.

**Our mailing address is:**
DNC Community Engagement430 S Capitol Street, SEWashington, DC 20003
[Add us to your address book](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/vcard?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=acfdb5d126)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/profile?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=acfdb5d126&e=d6c5c7d7ec&c=0bb8c23209) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=acfdb5d126&e=d6c5c7d7ec&c=0bb8c23209).

[](http://www.mailchimp.com/email-referral/?utm_source=freemium_newsletter&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=referral_marketing&aid=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&afl=1)
---

Fellow Conservative,

[](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=15235d20976e43fcb4331e7cbf1022e9&_e=qHMwA6pFL53YaN65hyS84pEdNCP79vG-4JEluACAahUTIr2dvuqjDIPO-1Ve2L_iBFxJoyh6lPbmgLv_4tAIKyz_ceYo4NkgaC49u2p-MZK470q_gAyg-kLTnv90qHYrEWvFj3yI32TIbRc8w3ODgcIOPt5Q57wIDHabV3znytcw1L7V5E25bfK1cWjmVakOSojHi1g9BI9dS_T8cCDbsoYHCqN7tyYvpD-WNv0u91Zv4pt8zWx_b2F-2TScfGbIeOcspclsCI_Dw6aOvkWZZQ69u0b1uBP9DCdtG8c_NoxqWPSV_YD4OcuqsBYPhJGf5g8BvaIrZtJuNZDCEdma0yNrokDZbYzfAZUboG9LYpl0IOFoARCP_SNNLHstYYDORUDSacv7w2J9AZCvxXCk1ny9Dqn7tpXSnK3GJ5d6DTtqn1orj2aYXbZLVRwGwvP4Nk8W6eUWZ4MhTs-gPWPU2g%3D%3D)
Senator Mark Kelly and I agree on something; we need to close the gaps in the border wall in Yuma.

**But on February 5th, May 20th, and August 4th, Mark Kelly voted against finishing the wall. He's changed his tone now that he knows my campaign is a threat to him.**

[**Ending illegal immigration should be a top priority for anyone who represents Arizona. Yet again and again, Mark Kelly has defunded the wall construction.**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=15235d20976e43fcb4331e7cbf1022e9&_e=qHMwA6pFL53YaN65hyS84pEdNCP79vG-4JEluACAahUTIr2dvuqjDIPO-1Ve2L_iBFxJoyh6lPbmgLv_4tAIKyz_ceYo4NkgaC49u2p-MZK470q_gAyg-kLTnv90qHYrEWvFj3yI32TIbRc8w3ODgcIOPt5Q57wIDHabV3znytcw1L7V5E25bfK1cWjmVakOSojHi1g9BI9dS_T8cCDbsoYHCqN7tyYvpD-WNv0u91Zv4pt8zWx_b2F-2TScfGbIQak6aRHT8KPNLMegsjPs1vWc2rdPIVLpPI88gjKi8QbECaZVWlbnLpB7b_fgSiPgaGKOtgou54PtAEXcg8KGMsCf_3QXzCMs7MsrQrqFZi6lX_xzFp21eBb09ejQHNh0C_ScKkGLJ6xiob3SYcU7375NcvbWRiptO0p4bIUyU0oi3581ZW_vbWHM8pUz-G-YKUhMjc3IsDFE4V5JlR4hWA%3D%3D)

Senator Mark Kelly has become the politician candidate Mark Kelly said he wouldn't, a liberal hack who says one thing in Arizona but does the opposite when Democrat party leaders in Washington tell him to.

If Republicans want to close the border once and for all, we need to take back the Senate. The easiest way to do that is to take back Arizona from Mark Kelly.

Arizona is the one Senate seat that will flip the Senate back to Republican control. We must win, and we need the support of every grassroots conservative to make that happen.

clean_body: We do need to deal with these gaps | Fellow Conservative, Senator Mark Kelly and I agree on something; we need to close the gaps in the border wall in Yuma. But on February 5th, May 20th, and August 4th, Mark Kelly voted against finishing the wall. He's changed his tone now that he knows my campaign is a threat to him. Senator Mark Kelly has become the politician candidate Mark Kelly said he wouldn't, a liberal hack who says one thing in Arizona but does the opposite when Democrat party leaders in Washington tell him to. If Republicans want to close the border once and for all, we need to take back the Senate. The easiest way to do that is to take back Arizona from Mark Kelly. Arizona is the one Senate seat that will flip the Senate back to Republican control. We must win, and we need the support of every grassroots conservative to make that happen. | | | ---|---|--- | | ---|---|--- Thank you, Blake Masters Republican Candidate for Senate, Arizona | | Paid for by Blake Masters for Senate Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

clean_body: ################### | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. We’re running out of time to protect Voting Rights and END GOP voter suppression. | | | | | | | | The truth is: We’re witnessing an all out assault on voting rights. From Georgia, to Texas, to Wisconsin, the GOP is THE anti-voting rights party. We can’t allow National Republicans to continue to pass HORRIBLE voter suppression laws like they did in these states. So we need a massive outpouring of support from Democrats to fight back if we want to keep our Democratic Majority out of the hands of voter suppression Republicans. | | | | | | Thanks for stepping up! \-- Team Ruiz | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? Every dollar makes a difference: | | | | | | I believe these emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with dedicated supporters like you. clean_body: Help us beat the End of Quarter deadline! | | | | | | | | | Hey - Did you see this email from Delegate McGuire? The last fundraising quarter of the year ends December 31st at midnight, and Democrats are doing everything in their power to turn the American people against each other. We are committed to electing leaders who aim to bring the American people together in times of hardship, but we can’t do it without your support. Use this secure link to help bring in leaders who aim to unite the American people: [[Secure Link]]() Thanks, Jenny | Team McGuire \---------Forwarded Message----------- Friend, As we approach the CRUCIAL End of Year deadline, Democrats are still fighting to divide Americans. With your support, we will elect leaders that will bring us together in 2022! The Radical Left aims to pit Americans against each other based on race and gender, when instead we should be united as one. It’s time that we remind these politicians of this sentiment and stop them from pitting Americans against each other. God Bless, John McGuire Paid for by John McGuire for Virginia Use of John McGuires’ military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense. Our mailing address is: 11357 Nuckols Road #190 Glen Allen, VA 23059 Don't want to receive our emails anymore?

subject: The Libs who stole Christmas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lawson for Congress]( "Paid for by Lawson for Congress")
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://us8.campaign-archive.com/?e=fc83fb200d&u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=1fadb5265c)
---
| |
---
|
---
| **It was a season of joy, a season of wonder,
Yet here comes cancel culture from on yonder

No more Christmas parties, no more Christmas trees,
replaced by holiday or season on their woke sprees

It’s all just to be politically correct,
They are so beyond nonsense I can only say "what the heck”

The left won’t stop until our culture is erased,
And they throw their wokeness right in our face

It’s time to say enough is enough,
I’m really done with this stuff

In Congress, I won't push cultural Marxism,
And will put a stop to this destructive schism

I’ll stand up for our values and won’t hesitate to say,
Merry Christmas to all and have a great day

I’ll stand up for you, but I need your support,
So please donate below for the year-end report**

subject: Is there ANYTHING we can say?

body:
What if we told you that CNN ranks this as one of the most likely seats for Democrats to flip in 2022?
#

Friends -
Is there ANYTHING we can say to convince you to make your first contribution to Cheri Beasley’s Senate campaign today?
What if we told you that Cook Political Report rates this a TOSS UP and just last week CNN ranked this as one of the most likely seats for Democrats to flip in 2022?
What if we told you that Club for Growth is planning to spend at least $10 million in our state and that Trump’s hand-picked candidate has pumped $275,000 of his own money into this race to try to buy this seat?
And how about if we told you that in just a few days we close the books on the final FEC fundraising deadline of the year and when it’s over we’re required to report our fundraising numbers which EVERYONE will be watching?
So please. Cheri needs you today. What do you say?
**[Can you please make your first $3 contribution to Cheri Beasley’s campaign for U.S. Senate? We would not ask if it were not tremendously important.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-dec21?refcode=em211222-2-ma&refcode2=169.357359.Qv0xpo&t=1&akid=169%2E357359%2EQv0xpo)**

Thank you in advance for chipping in. With our primary opponents dropping out and endorsing Cheri as our presumptive nominee, all eyes will be on this FEC report.

\- Team Beasley

body:
We need your support!

| [ ](http://www.nick4wa.com/?e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=donation_ask&n=1)

Peter, This is a big moment for our campaign. As we head toward the election, all eyes are on our campaign to see if we can actually stand up to my opponent. **We need to raise money now to show we have what it takes to win.** Can you chip in $25 to help build momentum? [Click here](https://www.nick4wa.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzuogiVwveL6kExd8kLdIhceiTOfVH_iAjowMYhozKQdA2J4048Njt25dmujuAIwKqk&e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=donation_ask&n=2). We’ve been sending out volunteers to knock on doors and talk with voters. We’re building an effective campaign to win this election. **With the money we raise, we will be able to expand our field program, hire staff, run ads, and build a war chest to carry us through Election Day.** [Click here to donate $25 today! ](https://www.nick4wa.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzuogiVwveL6kExd8kLdIhceiTOfVH_iAjowMYhozKQdA2J4048Njt25dmujuAIwKqk&e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=donation_ask&n=3) Together we can do big things.
